  33:
  34:// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  35:// Constants
  36:// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  37:
  38:const TASK_NAME = 'MemoryTree Heartbeat'
  39:const LAUNCHD_LABEL = 'com.memorytree.heartbeat'
  40:const QUICK_START_HEARTBEAT_INTERVAL = '5m'
  41:
  42:// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  43:// Subcommands
  44:// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  45:
  46:export function cmdInstall(options: { interval?: string; autoPush?: string }): number {
  47:  let config = loadConfig()
  48:
  49:  if (options.interval) {
  50:    config = { ...config, heartbeat_interval: options.interval }
  51:  }
  52:  if (options.autoPush) {
  53:    config = { ...config, auto_push: options.autoPush === 'true' }
  54:  }
  55:
  56:  saveConfig(config)
  57:  const seconds = intervalToSeconds(config.heartbeat_interval)
  58:  const scriptPath = heartbeatScriptPath()
  59:
  60:  const sys = platform
  61:  if (sys === 'linux') return installCron(scriptPath, seconds)
  62:  if (sys === 'darwin') return installLaunchd(scriptPath, seconds)
  63:  if (sys === 'win32') return installSchtasks(scriptPath, seconds)
  64:
  65:  process.stderr.write(`Unsupported platform: ${sys}\n`)
  66:  return 1
  67:}
  68:
  69:export function cmdUninstall(): number {
  70:  const sys = platform
  71:  if (sys === 'linux') return uninstallCron()
  72:  if (sys === 'darwin') return uninstallLaunchd()
  73:  if (sys === 'win32') return uninstallSchtasks()
  74:
  75:  process.stderr.write(`Unsupported platform: ${sys}\n`)
  76:  return 1
  77:}
  78:
  79:export async function cmdRunOnce(options: { root?: string; force?: boolean } = {}): Promise<number> {
  80:  const { main } = await import('../heartbeat/heartbeat.js')
  81:  return main(options)
  82:}
  83:
  84:export async function cmdWatch(options: { interval?: string }): Promise<number> {
  85:  const config = loadConfig()
  86:  const intervalStr = options.interval ?? config.heartbeat_interval
  87:  const seconds = intervalToSeconds(intervalStr)
  88:  const { main } = await import('../heartbeat/heartbeat.js')
  89:
  90:  process.stdout.write(`Watch mode: running heartbeat every ${seconds}s. Press Ctrl+C to stop.\n`)
  91:  try {
  92:    // eslint-disable-next-line no-constant-condition
  93:    while (true) {
  94:      await main()
  95:      await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, seconds * 1000))
  96:    }
  97:  } catch {
  98:    process.stdout.write('\nWatch mode stopped.\n')
  99:  }
 100:  return 0
 101:}
 102:
 103:export function cmdStatus(): number {
 104:  const registered = isHeartbeatRegistered()
 105:
 106:  const sys = platform
 107:  const platformName = sys === 'darwin' ? 'Darwin' : sys === 'win32' ? 'Windows' : 'Linux'
 108:  process.stdout.write(`Platform:   ${platformName}\n`)
 109:  process.stdout.write(`Registered: ${registered ? 'yes' : 'no'}\n`)
 110:
 111:  const pid = readLockPid()
 112:  if (pid !== null) {
 113:    process.stdout.write(`Lock:       held by PID ${pid}\n`)
 114:  } else {
 115:    process.stdout.write('Lock:       not held\n')
 116:  }
 117:
 118:  if (existsSync(configPath())) {
 119:    const config = loadConfig()
 120:    process.stdout.write(`Interval:   ${config.heartbeat_interval}\n`)
 121:    process.stdout.write(`Auto-push:  ${config.auto_push}\n`)
 122:    process.stdout.write(`Projects:   ${config.projects.length}\n`)
 123:  } else {
 124:    process.stdout.write('Config:     not found (using defaults)\n')
 125:  }
 126:
 127:  return 0
 128:}
 129:
 130:export function isHeartbeatRegistered(): boolean {
 131:  const sys = platform
 132:  if (sys === 'linux') return isCronRegistered()
 133:  if (sys === 'darwin') return isLaunchdRegistered()
 134:  if (sys === 'win32') return isSchtasksRegistered()
 135:  return false
 136:}
 137:
 138:export function cmdRegisterProject(options: {
 139:  root: string
 140:  name?: string
 141:  worktree?: string
 142:  branch?: string
 143:  quickStart?: boolean
 144:  heartbeatInterval?: string
 145:  autoPush?: string
 146:  generateReport?: string
 147:  reportPort?: string
 148:  rawUploadPermission?: string
 149:}): number {
 150:  const root = resolve(options.root)
 151:  const config = loadConfig()
 152:  const existingProject = findProjectForPath(config, root)
 153:
 154:  if (options.quickStart && options.branch !== undefined) {
 155:    process.stderr.write('Quick Start uses the default memorytree branch. Omit --branch to customize it.\n')
 156:    return 1
 157:  }
 158:
 159:  const requestedBranch = options.quickStart
 160:    ? existingProject?.memory_branch ?? defaultProjectWorktreeBranch()
 161:    : options.branch ?? existingProject?.memory_branch ?? DEFAULT_MEMORY_BRANCH
 162:  if (!isValidWorktreeBranchName(requestedBranch)) {
 163:    process.stderr.write(`Invalid MemoryTree branch name: ${requestedBranch}\n`)
 164:    return 1
 165:  }
 166:
 167:  const heartbeatInterval = options.quickStart
 168:    ? existingProject?.heartbeat_interval ?? QUICK_START_HEARTBEAT_INTERVAL
 169:    : options.heartbeatInterval ?? existingProject?.heartbeat_interval ?? config.heartbeat_interval
 170:  const autoPush = options.quickStart
 171:    ? existingProject?.auto_push ?? true
 172:    : parseOptionalBoolean(options.autoPush) ?? existingProject?.auto_push ?? config.auto_push
 173:  const generateReport = options.quickStart
 174:    ? existingProject?.generate_report ?? true
 175:    : parseOptionalBoolean(options.generateReport) ?? existingProject?.generate_report ?? config.generate_report
 176:  const rawUploadPermission = options.quickStart
 177:    ? existingProject?.raw_upload_permission ?? DEFAULT_RAW_UPLOAD_PERMISSION
 178:    : options.rawUploadPermission !== undefined
 179:      ? parseRawUploadPermissionOption(options.rawUploadPermission)
 180:      : existingProject?.raw_upload_permission ?? DEFAULT_RAW_UPLOAD_PERMISSION
 181:  if (rawUploadPermission === null) {
 182:    process.stderr.write('Invalid raw upload permission. Use not-set, approved, or denied.\n')
 183:    return 1
 184:  }
 185:
 186:  const requestedPort = options.reportPort ? parseInt(options.reportPort, 10) : NaN
 187:  const reportPort = Number.isInteger(requestedPort) && requestedPort > 0 && requestedPort <= 65535
 188:    ? requestedPort
 189:    : existingProject?.report_port ?? config.report_port
 190:
 191:  const updated = upsertProject(config, root, {
 192:    name: options.name ?? existingProject?.name ?? basename(root),
 193:    development_path: root,
 194:    memory_path: options.worktree
 195:      ? resolve(options.worktree)
 196:      : existingProject?.memory_path ?? defaultProjectWorktreePath(root),
 197:    memory_branch: requestedBranch,
 198:    heartbeat_interval: heartbeatInterval,
 199:    auto_push: autoPush,
 200:    generate_report: generateReport,
 201:    report_port: reportPort,
 202:    raw_upload_permission: rawUploadPermission,
 203:  })
 204:
 205:  const project = findProjectForPath(updated, root)
 206:  if (!project) {
 207:    process.stderr.write(`Failed to register project: ${root}\n`)
 208:    return 1
 209:  }
 210:
 211:  const worktree = ensureProjectWorktree(project)
 212:  saveConfig(updated)
 213:  ensureManagedGitignore(root)
 214:  let upstream: ReturnType<typeof ensureBranchUpstream> | null = null
 215:  let upstreamError = ''
 216:  if (project.auto_push) {
 217:    try {
 218:      upstream = ensureBranchUpstream(project.memory_path, worktree.branch)
 219:    } catch (error: unknown) {
 220:      upstreamError = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error)
 221:    }
 222:  }
 223:
 224:  process.stdout.write(`Registered project: ${project.name}\n`)
 225:  process.stdout.write(`Development path: ${project.development_path}\n`)
 226:  process.stdout.write(`Memory path: ${project.memory_path}\n`)
 227:  process.stdout.write(`Memory branch: ${project.memory_branch}\n`)
 228:  process.stdout.write(`Heartbeat interval: ${project.heartbeat_interval}\n`)
 229:  process.stdout.write(`Auto-push: ${project.auto_push}\n`)
 230:  process.stdout.write(`Generate report: ${project.generate_report}\n`)
 231:  process.stdout.write(`Raw upload permission: ${project.raw_upload_permission}\n`)
 232:  process.stdout.write(`Worktree branch: ${worktree.branch}\n`)
 233:  process.stdout.write(`Worktree created: ${worktree.created ? 'yes' : 'no'}\n`)
 234:  if (upstreamError) {
 235:    process.stderr.write(`Upstream configured: failed (${upstreamError})\n`)
 236:  } else if (upstream === null) {
 237:    process.stdout.write('Upstream configured: skipped (auto_push disabled)\n')
 238:  } else if (upstream.remote === null) {
 239:    process.stdout.write('Upstream configured: no remote available\n')
 240:  } else {

 116:
 117:export function transcriptHasContent(parsed: ParsedTranscript): boolean {
 118:  return parsed.messages.length > 0 || parsed.tool_events.length > 0 || parsed.events.length > 0
 119:}
 120:
 121:export function writeCleanMarkdown(parsed: ParsedTranscript, manifest: ManifestEntry, filePath: string): void {
 122:  const lines: string[] = [
 123:    '---',
 124:    `client: ${manifest.client}`,
 125:    `project: ${manifest.project}`,
 126:    `session_id: ${manifest.session_id}`,
 127:    `title: ${yamlEscape(manifest.title)}`,
 128:    `started_at: ${manifest.started_at}`,
 129:    `imported_at: ${manifest.imported_at}`,
 130:    `cwd: ${yamlEscape(manifest.cwd)}`,
 131:    `branch: ${yamlEscape(manifest.branch)}`,
 132:    `raw_source_path: ${yamlEscape(manifest.raw_source_path)}`,
 133:    `raw_sha256: ${manifest.raw_sha256}`,
 134:    `raw_upload_permission: ${manifest.raw_upload_permission}`,
 135:    `cleaning_mode: ${manifest.cleaning_mode}`,
 136:    '---',
 137:    '',
 138:    `# ${manifest.title || manifest.session_id}`,
 139:    '',
 140:    '## Metadata',
 141:    `- Client: \`${manifest.client}\``,
 142:    `- Project: \`${manifest.project}\``,
 143:    `- Session ID: \`${manifest.session_id}\``,
 144:    `- Started At: \`${manifest.started_at}\``,
 145:    `- Imported At: \`${manifest.imported_at}\``,
 146:    `- Raw SHA256: \`${manifest.raw_sha256}\``,
 147:    `- Raw Source: \`${manifest.raw_source_path}\``,
 148:    `- Repo Raw Path: \`${manifest.repo_raw_path}\``,
 149:    `- Repo Clean Path: \`${manifest.repo_clean_path}\``,
 150:    '',
 151:    '## Messages',
 152:  ]
 153:
 154:  if (parsed.messages.length > 0) {
 155:    for (let i = 0; i < parsed.messages.length; i++) {
 156:      const message = parsed.messages[i]!
 157:      lines.push(
 158:        `### ${i + 1}. ${message.role}`,
 159:        `- Timestamp: \`${message.timestamp ?? manifest.started_at}\``,
 160:        '',
 161:        message.text,
 162:        '',
 163:      )
 164:    }
 165:  } else {
 166:    lines.push(
 167:      'No user or assistant messages were extracted deterministically from the source transcript.',
 168:      '',
 169:    )
 170:  }
 171:
 172:  writeFileSync(filePath, lines.join('\n'), 'utf-8')
 173:}
 174:
 175:export function writeFullJson(parsed: ParsedTranscript, filePath: string): void {
 176:  const artifact: TranscriptArtifact = {
 177:    schema_version: 'transcript.full.v1',
 178:    ...parsed,
 179:  }
 180:  writeFileSync(filePath, JSON.stringify(artifact, null, 2) + '\n', 'utf-8')
 181:}
 182:
 183:export function preserveExistingImportTimestamp(
 184:  existing: Record<string, unknown> | null,
 185:  payload: ManifestEntry,

  71:  mkdirSync(join(output, 'knowledge'), { recursive: true })

  75:  mkdirSync(cacheDir, { recursive: true })
  76:
  77:  // Ensure Memory/07_reports is gitignored
  78:  ensureGitignore(root, 'Memory/07_reports/')
  79:
  80:  // Load all manifests (own project + extra registered projects)
  81:  const manifests = [
  82:    ...loadManifests(root),
  83:    ...extraManifestDirs.flatMap(dir => loadManifestsFromDir(dir)),
  84:  ]
  85:
  86:  // Build link graph from clean markdown
  87:  const linkGraph = buildLinkGraph(manifests, root)
  88:
  89:  // Accumulate tool counts while processing transcripts
  90:  let toolCounts: Record<string, number> = {}
  91:
  92:  // Summary options
  93:  const summaryOptions: SummaryOptions = { cacheDir, noAi, model }
  94:
  95:  // Process each transcript: parse 鈫?summarize 鈫?render 鈫?write 鈫?discard
  96:  const snippets: Record<string, string> = {}
  97:  const searchTexts: Record<string, string> = {}
  98:  const summaries: Record<string, string> = {}
  99:  const summaryPromises: Array<Promise<void>> = []
 100:
 101:  for (const m of manifests) {
 102:    const parsedTranscript = loadStructuredTranscript(m, root)
 103:    const messages = parsedTranscript
 104:      ? parsedTranscript.messages.map(toRenderedMessage)
 105:      : parseCleanMarkdownMessages(m, root)
 106:    const events = parsedTranscript?.events ?? []
 107:
 108:    if (events.length > 0) {
 109:      toolCounts = accumulateToolCounts(toolCounts, extractToolNamesFromEvents(events))
 110:    } else {
 111:      const rawPath = resolveRawPath(m, root)
 112:      if (rawPath && existsSync(rawPath)) {
 113:      try {
 114:        const toolSummaries = extractToolSummariesFromRaw(rawPath, m.client)
 115:        const names = extractToolNames(toolSummaries)
 116:        toolCounts = accumulateToolCounts(toolCounts, names)
 117:      } catch {
 118:        // Skip if raw parsing fails
 119:      }
 120:      }
 121:    }
 122:
 123:    const firstMsg = messages[0]
 124:    snippets[m.session_id] = firstMsg ? firstMsg.text.slice(0, 300) : snippetFromEvents(events)
 125:    searchTexts[m.session_id] = buildSearchText(messages, events)
 126:
 127:    // Summarize + render (deferred to allow parallel API calls)
 128:    const manifest = m
 129:    const msgs = messages
 130:    const transcriptEvents = events
 131:    summaryPromises.push(
 132:      (async () => {
 133:        try {
 134:        const summary = await getSummary(manifest.raw_sha256, msgs, summaryOptions)
 135:        summaries[manifest.session_id] = summary
 136:        const backlinkIds = linkGraph.backlinks[manifest.session_id] ?? []
 137:        const backlinkManifests = backlinkIds
 138:          .map(id => manifests.find(x => x.session_id === id))
 139:          .filter((x): x is ManifestEntry => x !== undefined)
 140:
 141:        const html = renderTranscript(
 142:          msgs,
 143:          manifest,
 144:          summary,
 145:          backlinkManifests,
 146:          t,
 147:          reportBaseUrl,
 148:          transcriptEvents,
 149:        )
 150:        const outPath = transcriptOutputPath(output, manifest)
 151:        mkdirSync(dirname(outPath), { recursive: true })
 152:        writeFileSync(outPath, html, 'utf-8')
 153:        } catch (err: unknown) {
 154:          // eslint-disable-next-line no-console
 155:          getLogger().warn(`[build] Failed to render ${manifest.session_id}: ${String(err)}`)
 156:        }
 157:      })(),
 158:    )
 159:  }
 160:
 161:  // Wait for all transcript renders (parallel, bounded by semaphore in summarize.ts)
 162:  await Promise.all(summaryPromises)
 163:
 164:  // Extract tags in parallel (after summaries are ready)
 165:  const tagOptions = { cacheDir, noAi, model }
 166:  const tags: Record<string, string[]> = {}
 167:  await Promise.all(
 168:    manifests.map(async m => {
 169:      const summary = summaries[m.session_id] ?? ''
 170:      tags[m.session_id] = await getTags(m.raw_sha256, summary, tagOptions)
 171:    }),
 172:  )
 173:
 174:  // Compute final stats with accumulated tool counts
 175:  const stats = computeStats(manifests, toolCounts)
 176:
 177:  // Load markdown content for various pages
 178:  const goalFiles = loadMarkdownFiles(join(root, 'Memory', '01_goals'))
 179:  const todoFiles = loadMarkdownFiles(join(root, 'Memory', '02_todos'))
 180:  const knowledgeFiles = loadMarkdownFiles(join(root, 'Memory', '04_knowledge'))
 181:  const archiveFiles = loadMarkdownFiles(join(root, 'Memory', '05_archive'))
 182:
 183:  // Dashboard
 184:  writeFileSync(join(output, 'index.html'), renderDashboard(stats, manifests, t), 'utf-8')
 185:
 186:  // Session list
 187:  writeFileSync(
 188:    join(output, 'transcripts', 'index.html'),
 189:    renderTranscriptList(manifests, t, summaries, tags),
 190:    'utf-8',
 191:  )
 192:
 193:  // Goals page
 194:  writeFileSync(
 195:    join(output, 'goals', 'index.html'),
 196:    renderGoals(goalFiles, t),
 197:    'utf-8',
 198:  )
 199:
 200:  // Knowledge page
 201:  writeFileSync(
 202:    join(output, 'knowledge', 'index.html'),
 203:    renderKnowledge(knowledgeFiles, t),
 204:    'utf-8',
 205:  )
 206:
 207:  // Todos page
 208:  writeFileSync(
 209:    join(output, 'todos', 'index.html'),
 210:    renderTodos(todoFiles, t),
 211:    'utf-8',
 212:  )
 213:
 214:  // Archive page
 215:  writeFileSync(
 216:    join(output, 'archive', 'index.html'),
 217:    renderArchive(archiveFiles, t),
 218:    'utf-8',
 219:  )
 220:
 221:  // Projects page
 222:  writeFileSync(
 223:    join(output, 'projects', 'index.html'),
 224:    renderProjects(manifests, t),
 225:    'utf-8',
 226:  )
 227:
 228:  // Knowledge graph
 229:  writeFileSync(
 230:    join(output, 'graph.html'),
 231:    renderGraph(manifests, knowledgeFiles, linkGraph, t),
 232:    'utf-8',
 233:  )
 234:
 235:  // Search
 236:  const searchIndex = buildSearchIndex(
 237:    manifests,
 238:    m => snippets[m.session_id] ?? '',
 239:    m => searchTexts[m.session_id] ?? snippets[m.session_id] ?? '',
 240:  )
 241:  writeFileSync(join(output, 'search.html'), renderSearchPage(searchIndex, t), 'utf-8')
 242:
 243:  // RSS Feed
 244:  writeFileSync(join(output, 'feed.xml'), renderRssFeed(manifests, summaries, reportBaseUrl), 'utf-8')
 245:
 246:  // GitHub Pages deployment (non-blocking on failure)
 247:  if (ghPagesBranch) {
 248:    try {
 249:      const { deployGithubPages } = await import('./deploy/github-pages.js')
 250:      await deployGithubPages({ repoRoot: root, outputDir: output, branch: ghPagesBranch, cname })
 251:    } catch {
 252:      // Logged inside deployGithubPages
 253:    }
 254:  } else if (cname) {
 255:    // Write CNAME even without deploy (writeFileSync already imported at top)
 256:    writeFileSync(join(output, 'CNAME'), cname + '\n', 'utf-8')
 257:  }
 258:
 259:  // Webhook notification (non-blocking on failure)
 260:  if (webhookUrl) {
 261:    try {
 262:      const { sendWebhook } = await import('./deploy/webhook.js')
 263:      await sendWebhook({
 264:        url: webhookUrl,
 265:        sessionCount: manifests.length,
 266:        newSessionIds,
 267:      })
 268:    } catch {
 269:      // Logged inside sendWebhook
 270:    }
 271:  }
 272:}
 273:
 274:// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 275:// Manifest loading
 276:// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 277:
 278:function loadManifests(root: string): ManifestEntry[] {
 279:  const manifestsDir = join(root, 'Memory', '06_transcripts', 'manifests')
 280:  return loadManifestsFromDir(manifestsDir)
 281:}
 282:
 283:function loadManifestsFromDir(manifestsDir: string): ManifestEntry[] {
 284:  if (!existsSync(manifestsDir)) return []
 285:  const manifests: ManifestEntry[] = []
 286:  loadManifestsRecursive(manifestsDir, manifests)
 287:  return manifests
 288:}
 289:
 290:function loadManifestsRecursive(dir: string, out: ManifestEntry[]): void {
 291:  let entries: string[]
 292:  try {
 293:    entries = readdirSync(dir)
 294:  } catch {
 295:    return
 296:  }
 297:
 298:  for (const entry of entries) {
 299:    const fullPath = join(dir, entry)
 300:    if (entry.endsWith('.json')) {
 301:      try {
 302:        const raw = readFileSync(fullPath, 'utf-8')
 303:        const parsed: unknown = JSON.parse(raw)
 304:        if (
 305:          parsed !== null &&
 306:          typeof parsed === 'object' &&
 307:          typeof (parsed as Record<string, unknown>)['session_id'] === 'string' &&
 308:          typeof (parsed as Record<string, unknown>)['client'] === 'string'
 309:        ) {
 310:          out.push(parsed as ManifestEntry)
 311:        }
 312:      } catch {
 313:        // Skip malformed manifests
 314:      }
 315:    } else {
 316:      // Recurse into subdirectories
 317:      loadManifestsRecursive(fullPath, out)
 318:    }
 319:  }
 320:}
 321:
 322:// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 323:// Clean markdown message parsing
 324:// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 325:
 326:/** Parse messages from a clean markdown file. */
 327:export function parseCleanMarkdownMessages(m: ManifestEntry, root: string): RenderedMessage[] {
 328:  const repoPath = m.repo_clean_path ? join(root, m.repo_clean_path) : null
 329:  const cleanPath = (repoPath && existsSync(repoPath)) ? repoPath : m.global_clean_path
 330:  if (!cleanPath || !existsSync(cleanPath)) return []
 331:
 332:  let content: string
 333:  try {
 334:    content = readFileSync(cleanPath, 'utf-8')
 335:  } catch {
 336:    return []
 337:  }
 338:
 339:  return parseMessagesFromMarkdown(content)
 340:}
 341:
 342:/** Extract role/timestamp/text from clean markdown format. */
 343:export function parseMessagesFromMarkdown(content: string): RenderedMessage[] {
 344:  const messages: RenderedMessage[] = []
 345:
 346:  // Find ## Messages section
 347:  const msgSection = content.indexOf('\n## Messages')
 348:  if (msgSection === -1) return []
 349:
 350:  const body = content.slice(msgSection + 12) // after "## Messages\n"
 351:
 352:  // Split on ### N. role headers
 353:  const msgRe = /^### \d+\.\s+(\w+)/gm
 354:  let match: RegExpExecArray | null
 355:  const starts: Array<{ index: number; role: string }> = []
 356:
 357:  while ((match = msgRe.exec(body)) !== null) {
 358:    starts.push({ index: match.index, role: match[1] ?? 'unknown' })
 359:  }
 360:
 361:  for (let i = 0; i < starts.length; i++) {
 362:    const start = starts[i]
 363:    if (!start) continue
 364:    const nextStart = starts[i + 1]
 365:    const chunk = nextStart
 366:      ? body.slice(start.index, nextStart.index)
 367:      : body.slice(start.index)
 368:
 369:    const lines = chunk.split('\n')
 370:    // First line is the header, second may be timestamp
 371:    let timestamp = ''
 372:    const textLines: string[] = []
 373:    let pastHeader = false
 374:
 375:    for (const line of lines) {
 376:      if (!pastHeader && line.startsWith('### ')) {
 377:        pastHeader = true
 378:        continue
 379:      }
 380:      if (!pastHeader) continue
 381:      const tsMatch = line.match(/^- Timestamp:\s*`([^`]+)`/)
 382:      if (tsMatch && !timestamp) {
 383:        timestamp = tsMatch[1] ?? ''
 384:        continue
 385:      }
 386:      textLines.push(line)
 387:    }
 388:
 389:    // Remove leading/trailing blank lines from text
 390:    const text = textLines.join('\n').trim()
 391:    if (text || timestamp) {
 392:      messages.push({ role: start.role, timestamp, text })
 393:    }
 394:  }
 395:
 396:  return messages
 397:}
 398:
 399:// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 400:// Raw transcript tool extraction
 401:// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 402:
 403:/** Best-effort extraction of tool event summaries from a raw JSONL file. */
 404:function extractToolSummariesFromRaw(rawPath: string, _client: string): string[] {
 405:  const summaries: string[] = []
 406:  let content: string
 407:  try {
 408:    content = readFileSync(rawPath, 'utf-8')
 409:  } catch {
 410:    return []
 411:  }
 412:
 413:  for (const line of content.split('\n')) {
 414:    const trimmed = line.trim()
 415:    if (!trimmed) continue
 416:    try {
 417:      const record = JSON.parse(trimmed) as Record<string, unknown>
 418:      // Codex: function_call type
 419:      const type = record['type'] as string | undefined
 420:      if (type === 'function_call' || type === 'custom_tool_call') {
 421:        const name = (record['name'] as string | undefined) ?? type
 422:        summaries.push(name)
 423:        continue
 424:      }
 425:      // Claude: tool_use content blocks
 426:      const payload = record['message'] as Record<string, unknown> | undefined
 427:      const content2 = (payload?.['content'] ?? record['content']) as unknown[] | undefined
 428:      if (Array.isArray(content2)) {
 429:        for (const block of content2) {
 430:          if (
 431:            block !== null &&
 432:            typeof block === 'object' &&
 433:            (block as Record<string, unknown>)['type'] === 'tool_use'
 434:          ) {
 435:            const name = ((block as Record<string, unknown>)['name'] as string | undefined) ?? 'tool_use'
 436:            summaries.push(name)
 437:          }
 438:        }
 439:      }
 440:    } catch {
 441:      // Skip malformed lines
 442:    }
 443:  }
 444:
 445:  return summaries
 446:}
 447:
 448:function extractToolNamesFromEvents(events: TranscriptEvent[]): string[] {
 449:  return events
 450:    .filter((event): event is Extract<TranscriptEvent, { kind: 'tool_call' }> => event.kind === 'tool_call')
 451:    .map(event => event.tool_name)
 452:}
 453:
 454:// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 455:// Output path helpers
 456:// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 457:
 458:function transcriptOutputPath(output: string, m: ManifestEntry): string {
 459:  const cleanPath = m.repo_clean_path || m.global_clean_path || ''
 460:  const stem = cleanPath ? basename(cleanPath, '.md') : m.session_id
 461:  return join(output, 'transcripts', m.client, `${stem}.html`)
 462:}
 463:
 464:function resolveRawPath(m: ManifestEntry, root: string): string | null {
 465:  if (m.repo_raw_path) {
 466:    const repoPath = join(root, m.repo_raw_path)
 467:    if (existsSync(repoPath)) return repoPath
 468:  }
 469:  if (m.global_raw_path) {
 470:    return m.global_raw_path
 471:  }
 472:  return null
 473:}
 474:
 475:function resolveFullPath(m: ManifestEntry, root: string): string | null {
 476:  if (m.repo_full_path) {
 477:    const repoPath = join(root, m.repo_full_path)
 478:    if (existsSync(repoPath)) return repoPath
 479:  }
 480:  if (m.global_full_path && existsSync(m.global_full_path)) {
 481:    return m.global_full_path
 482:  }
 483:  const derivedRepoPath = deriveFullPathFromCleanPath(m.repo_clean_path ? join(root, m.repo_clean_path) : '')
 484:  if (derivedRepoPath) {
 485:    return derivedRepoPath
 486:  }
 487:  const derivedGlobalPath = deriveFullPathFromCleanPath(m.global_clean_path)
 488:  if (derivedGlobalPath) {
 489:    return derivedGlobalPath
 490:  }
 491:  return null
 492:}
 493:
 494:function loadNormalizedTranscript(m: ManifestEntry, root: string): ParsedTranscript | null {
 495:  const fullPath = resolveFullPath(m, root)
 496:  if (!fullPath) return null
 497:
 498:  try {
 499:    const raw = readFileSync(fullPath, 'utf-8')
 500:    const parsed = JSON.parse(raw) as Record<string, unknown>
 501:    if (
 502:      !Array.isArray(parsed['messages']) ||
 503:      !Array.isArray(parsed['tool_events']) ||
 504:      !Array.isArray(parsed['events'])
 505:    ) {
 506:      return null
 507:    }
 508:
 509:    return {
 510:      client: String(parsed['client'] ?? m.client) as ParsedTranscript['client'],
 511:      session_id: String(parsed['session_id'] ?? m.session_id),
 512:      title: String(parsed['title'] ?? m.title),
 513:      started_at: String(parsed['started_at'] ?? m.started_at),
 514:      cwd: String(parsed['cwd'] ?? m.cwd),
 515:      branch: String(parsed['branch'] ?? m.branch),
 516:      messages: parsed['messages'] as ParsedTranscript['messages'],
 517:      tool_events: parsed['tool_events'] as ParsedTranscript['tool_events'],
 518:      events: parsed['events'] as ParsedTranscript['events'],
 519:      source_path: String(parsed['source_path'] ?? m.raw_source_path),
 520:    }
 521:  } catch {
 522:    return null
 523:  }
 524:}
 525:
 526:function loadStructuredTranscript(m: ManifestEntry, root: string): ParsedTranscript | null {
 527:  const normalizedTranscript = loadNormalizedTranscript(m, root)
 528:  if (normalizedTranscript) {
 529:    return normalizedTranscript
 530:  }
 531:
 532:  const rawPath = resolveRawPath(m, root)
 533:  if (!rawPath || !existsSync(rawPath)) {
 534:    return null
 535:  }
 536:
 537:  try {
 538:    return parseTranscript(m.client, rawPath)
 539:  } catch {
 540:    return null
Tool Result #519 shell_command call_cAXiu2pYn2X4r5RRRH49WAtj exit 0 02:32:57
shell_command output=Exit code: 0 Wall time: 0.5 seconds Output: Using Node v20.20.1 Using Node v20.20.1 46: /(?:secret|token)\s*[:=]\s*\S+/i, 47: /(?:sk-|pk_live_|sk_live_|ghp_|gho_|glpat-)\S{10,}/...
Show output payload

Wall time: 0.5 seconds
Output:
Using Node v20.20.1
Using Node v20.20.1
  46:  /(?:secret|token)\s*[:=]\s*\S+/i,
  47:  /(?:sk-|pk_live_|sk_live_|ghp_|gho_|glpat-)\S{10,}/,
  48:  /Bearer\s+\S{20,}/i,
  49:]
  50:
  51:const RAW_TRANSCRIPT_PREFIX = 'Memory/06_transcripts/raw/'
  52:const MAX_GIT_ADD_PATH_CHARS = 12_000
  53:
  54:// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  55:// Main entry point
  56:// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  57:
  58:export interface HeartbeatRunOptions {
  59:  readonly force?: boolean
  60:  readonly root?: string
  61:}
  62:
  63:export async function main(options: HeartbeatRunOptions = {}): Promise<number> {
  64:  const config = loadConfig()
  65:  setupLogging(config.log_level as LogLevel)
  66:  const logger = getLogger()
  67:
  68:  if (!acquireLock()) {
  69:    logger.info('Another heartbeat instance is running. Exiting.')
  70:    writeAlert('global', 'lock_held', 'Heartbeat exited: another instance held the lock.')
  71:    return 0
  72:  }
  73:
  74:  try {
  75:    return await runHeartbeat(config, options)
  76:  } finally {
  77:    releaseLock()
  78:  }
  79:}
  80:
  81:// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  82:// Heartbeat orchestration
  83:// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  84:
  85:export async function runHeartbeat(config: Config, options: HeartbeatRunOptions = {}): Promise<number> {
  86:  const logger = getLogger()
  87:  const targetProject = options.root ? findProjectForPath(config, resolve(options.root)) : null
  88:
  89:  if (config.projects.length === 0) {
  90:    logger.info('No projects registered in config.toml. Nothing to do.')
  91:    return 0
  92:  }
  93:  if (options.root && !targetProject) {
  94:    logger.warn(`No registered project matched: ${resolve(options.root)}`)
  95:    return 1
  96:  }
  97:
  98:  const projects = targetProject ? [targetProject] : config.projects
  99:
 100:  logger.info(`Heartbeat started. ${projects.length} project(s) selected.`)
 101:
 102:  let nextConfig = config
 103:  let configChanged = false
 104:  const now = new Date()
 105:  const runTimestamp = now.toISOString()
 106:
 107:  for (const entry of projects) {
 108:    const projectName = projectDisplayName(entry)
 109:    const projectPath = resolve(projectExecutionPath(entry))
 110:    const heartbeatDue = options.force === true || projectIsDue(entry, now)
 111:
 112:    if (!heartbeatDue) {
 113:      logger.debug(`[${projectName}] Not due yet, skipping.`)
 114:      continue
 115:    }
 116:
 117:    try {
 118:      const worktree = ensureProjectWorktree(entry)
 119:      if (!existsSync(projectPath)) {
 120:        logger.warn(`Project path does not exist, skipping: ${projectPath}`)
 121:        continue
 122:      }
 123:
 124:      if (worktree.created) {
 125:        logger.info(`[${projectName}] Created worktree on branch '${worktree.branch}'.`)
 126:      }
 127:
 128:      const contextSync = syncProjectContextToMemory(entry)
 129:      if (!contextSync.skipped) {
 130:        logger.info(
 131:          `[${projectName}] Synced context to ${worktree.branch} ` +
 132:          `(copied ${contextSync.copied}, deleted ${contextSync.deleted}).`,
 133:        )
 134:      }
 135:
 136:      const extraManifestDirs = collectExtraManifestDirs(projectPath)
 137:      await processProject(config, projectPath, projectName, entry, extraManifestDirs)
 138:      nextConfig = noteProjectHeartbeatRun(nextConfig, entry.id, runTimestamp)
 139:      configChanged = true
 140:
 141:      const outputSync = syncProjectOutputsToDevelopment(entry)
 142:      if (!outputSync.skipped) {
 143:        logger.info(
 144:          `[${projectName}] Synced outputs back to development directory ` +
 145:          `(copied ${outputSync.copied}, deleted ${outputSync.deleted}).`,
 146:        )
 147:      }
 148:    } catch (err: unknown) {
 149:      logger.exception(`Error processing project: ${projectPath}`, err)
 150:      writeAlertWithThreshold(
 151:        toPosixPath(projectPath),
 152:        'push_failed',
 153:        `Heartbeat error for project: ${basename(projectPath)}`,
 154:      )
 155:    }
 156:  }
 157:
 158:  if (configChanged) {
 159:    saveConfig(nextConfig)
 160:  }
 161:
 162:  logger.info('Heartbeat finished.')
 163:  return 0
 164:}
 165:
 166:// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 167:// Per-project processing
 168:// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 169:
 170:export async function processProject(
 171:  config: Config,
 172:  projectPath: string,
 173:  projectName: string,
 174:  project?: ProjectEntry,
 175:  extraManifestDirs?: string[],
 176:): Promise<void> {
 177:  const logger = getLogger()
 178:  const repoSlug = slugify(projectName, 'project')
 179:  const globalRoot = defaultGlobalTranscriptRoot()
 180:  const branch = currentBranch(projectPath)
 181:  const mirrorToRepo = isDedicatedMemorytreeBranch(branch, project)
 182:  const autoPush = project?.auto_push ?? config.auto_push ?? true
 183:  const generateReport = project?.generate_report ?? config.generate_report ?? false
 184:  const aiSummaryModel = project?.ai_summary_model ?? config.ai_summary_model ?? 'claude-haiku-4-5-20251001'
 185:  const locale = project?.locale ?? config.locale ?? 'en'
 186:  const ghPagesBranch = project?.gh_pages_branch ?? config.gh_pages_branch ?? ''
 187:  const cname = project?.cname ?? config.cname ?? ''
 188:  const webhookUrl = project?.webhook_url ?? config.webhook_url ?? ''
 189:  const reportBaseUrl = project?.report_base_url ?? config.report_base_url ?? ''
 190:  const rawUploadPermission = project?.raw_upload_permission ?? 'not-set'
 191:
 192:  if (!mirrorToRepo) {
 193:    logger.warn(
 194:      `[${projectName}] Current branch '${branch}' is not a dedicated MemoryTree branch. ` +
 195:      'Importing to the global archive only.',
 196:    )
 197:  }
 198:
 199:  const discovered = discoverSourceFiles()
 200:  let importedCount = 0
 201:
 202:  for (const [client, source] of discovered) {
 203:    let parsed: ParsedTranscript
 204:    try {
 205:      parsed = parseTranscript(client, source)
 206:    } catch {
 207:      logger.debug(`Failed to parse ${source}, skipping.`)
 208:      continue
 209:    }
 210:
 211:    if (!transcriptHasContent(parsed)) continue
 212:    if (!transcriptMatchesRepo(parsed, projectPath, repoSlug)) continue
 213:
 214:    scanSensitive(parsed, projectPath)
 215:
 216:    try {
 217:      await importTranscript(parsed, projectPath, globalRoot, repoSlug, rawUploadPermission, mirrorToRepo)
 218:      importedCount++
 219:    } catch {
 220:      logger.exception(`Failed to import transcript: ${source}`)
 221:    }
 222:  }
 223:
 224:  if (importedCount === 0) {
 225:    logger.info(`[${projectName}] No new transcripts to import.`)
 226:  } else {
 227:    logger.info(`[${projectName}] Imported ${importedCount} transcript(s).`)
 228:  }
 229:
 230:  if (generateReport) {
 231:    try {
 232:      const { buildReport } = await import('../report/build.js')
 233:      await buildReport({
 234:        root: projectPath,
 235:        output: join(projectPath, 'Memory', '07_reports'),
 236:        noAi: !process.env['ANTHROPIC_API_KEY'],
 237:        model: aiSummaryModel,
 238:        locale,
 239:        ghPagesBranch,
 240:        cname,
 241:        webhookUrl,
 242:        reportBaseUrl,
 243:        ...(extraManifestDirs ? { extraManifestDirs } : {}),
 244:      })
 245:      logger.info(`[${projectName}] Report generated.`)
 246:    } catch (err: unknown) {
 247:      logger.warn(`[${projectName}] Report generation failed: ${String(err)}`)
 248:      // Never propagate 鈥?report failure must not abort heartbeat cycle
 249:    }
 250:  }
 251:
 252:  if (mirrorToRepo) {
 253:    gitCommitAndPush({ auto_push: autoPush }, projectPath, projectName, importedCount, rawUploadPermission)
 254:  } else {
 255:    logger.info(`[${projectName}] Skipped repo-local commit/push on branch '${branch}'.`)
 256:  }
 257:}
 258:
 259:// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 260:// Sensitive pattern scanning
 261:// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 262:
 263:export function scanSensitive(parsed: ParsedTranscript, projectPath: string): void {
 264:  const logger = getLogger()
 265:  for (const msg of parsed.messages) {
 266:    for (const pattern of SENSITIVE_PATTERNS) {
 267:      if (pattern.test(msg.text)) {
 268:        logger.warn(
 269:          `Sensitive pattern detected in transcript ${parsed.source_path} (project: ${basename(projectPath)}, role: ${msg.role})`,
 270:        )
 271:        writeAlert(
 272:          toPosixPath(projectPath),
 273:          'sensitive_match',
 274:          `Sensitive pattern in transcript: ${basename(parsed.source_path)}`,
 275:        )
 276:        return
 277:      }
 278:    }
 279:  }
 280:}
 281:
 282:// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 283:// Git operations
 284:// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 285:
 286:export function gitCommitAndPush(
 287:  config: Pick<Config, 'auto_push'>,
 288:  projectPath: string,
 289:  projectName: string,
 290:  importedCount: number,
 291:  rawUploadPermission: RawUploadPermission = 'not-set',
 292:): void {
 293:  const logger = getLogger()
 294:
 295:  const changedPaths = changedManagedPaths(projectPath)
 296:  if (changedPaths.length === 0) {
 297:    logger.info(`[${projectName}] No git changes in managed MemoryTree content.`)
 298:    return
 299:  }
 300:
 301:  const stageablePaths = changedPaths.filter(path => shouldStageManagedPath(path, rawUploadPermission))
 302:  if (stageablePaths.length === 0) {
 303:    logger.info(`[${projectName}] Only raw transcript mirror changes detected without approval; skipping commit.`)
 304:    return
 305:  }
 306:
 307:  const commitMessage = importedCount > 0
 308:    ? `memorytree(transcripts): import ${importedCount} transcript(s)`
 309:    : 'memorytree(snapshot): heartbeat sync'
 310:
 311:  stageManagedPaths(projectPath, stageablePaths)
 312:  git(projectPath, 'commit', '-m', commitMessage)
 313:  if (importedCount > 0) {
 314:    logger.info(`[${projectName}] Committed ${importedCount} transcript import(s).`)
 315:  } else {
 316:    logger.info(`[${projectName}] Committed heartbeat snapshot.`)
 317:  }
 318:
 319:  if (!config.auto_push) {
 320:    logger.info(`[${projectName}] auto_push disabled, skipping push.`)
 321:    return
 322:  }
 323:
 324:  const remotes = git(projectPath, 'remote')
 325:  if (!remotes.trim()) {
 326:    logger.warn(`[${projectName}] No git remote configured, skipping push.`)
 327:    writeAlert(toPosixPath(projectPath), 'no_remote', 'Push skipped: no Git remote configured.')
 328:    return
 329:  }
 330:
 331:  if (!tryPush(projectPath, projectName)) {
 332:    logger.warn(`[${projectName}] Push failed, retrying once...`)
 333:    if (!tryPush(projectPath, projectName)) {
 334:      logger.error(`[${projectName}] Push failed after retry.`)
 335:      writeAlertWithThreshold(toPosixPath(projectPath), 'push_failed', 'Push failed after retry.')
 336:      return
 337:    }
 338:  }
 339:
 340:  resetFailureCount(toPosixPath(projectPath), 'push_failed')
 341:}
 342:
 343:export function tryPush(projectPath: string, projectName: string): boolean {
 344:  try {
 345:    const branch = currentBranch(projectPath)
 346:    if (hasTrackingUpstream(projectPath)) {
 347:      git(projectPath, 'push')
 348:    } else {
 349:      const upstream = ensureBranchUpstream(projectPath, branch)
 350:      if (upstream.remote === null) {
 351:        return false
 352:      }
 353:      getLogger().info(`[${projectName}] Configured upstream ${upstream.remote}/${branch}.`)
 354:    }
 355:    getLogger().info(`[${projectName}] Pushed successfully.`)
 356:    return true
 357:  } catch {
 358:    return false
 359:  }
 360:}
 361:
 362:export function currentBranch(projectPath: string): string {
 363:  return git(projectPath, 'rev-parse', '--abbrev-ref', 'HEAD').trim()
 364:}
 365:
 366:export function isDedicatedMemorytreeBranch(
 367:  branch: string,
 368:  project?: Pick<ProjectEntry, 'memory_branch'>,
 369:): boolean {
 370:  return isProjectMemoryBranch(branch, project)
 371:}
 372:
 373:export function changedManagedPaths(projectPath: string): string[] {
 374:  const seen = new Set<string>()
 375:  const paths: string[] = []
 376:
 377:  for (const path of collectChangedManagedPaths(projectPath)) {
 378:    if (seen.has(path)) continue
 379:    seen.add(path)
 380:    paths.push(path)
 381:  }
 382:
 383:  return paths
 384:}
 385:
 386:export function isRepoRawTranscriptPath(path: string): boolean {
 387:  return path.replace(/\\/g, '/').startsWith(RAW_TRANSCRIPT_PREFIX)
 388:}
 389:
 390:function shouldStageManagedPath(path: string, rawUploadPermission: RawUploadPermission): boolean {
 391:  if (!isRepoRawTranscriptPath(path)) {
 392:    return true
 393:  }
 394:
 395:  return rawUploadPermission === 'approved'
 396:}
 397:
 398:function unquotePath(path: string): string {
 399:  if (!(path.startsWith('"') && path.endsWith('"'))) return path
 400:
 401:  return path
 402:    .slice(1, -1)
 403:    .replace(/\\"/g, '"')
 404:    .replace(/\\\\/g, '\\')
 405:}
 406:
 407:function collectChangedManagedPaths(projectPath: string): string[] {
 408:  return [
 409:    ...gitPathLines(projectPath, 'diff', '--name-only', '--', ...MANAGED_REPO_PATHS),
 410:    ...gitPathLines(projectPath, 'diff', '--cached', '--name-only', '--', ...MANAGED_REPO_PATHS),
 411:    ...gitPathLines(projectPath, 'ls-files', '--others', '--exclude-standard', '--', ...MANAGED_REPO_PATHS),
 412:    ...gitPathLines(
 413:      projectPath,
 414:      'ls-files',
 415:      '--others',
 416:      '--ignored',
 417:      '--exclude-standard',
 418:      '--',
 419:      ...MANAGED_REPO_PATHS,
 420:    ),
 421:  ]
 422:}
 423:
 424:function stageManagedPaths(projectPath: string, stageablePaths: readonly string[]): void {
 425:  let batch: string[] = []
 426:  let batchChars = 0
 427:
 428:  for (const path of stageablePaths) {
 429:    const pathChars = path.length + 1
 430:    if (batch.length > 0 && batchChars + pathChars > MAX_GIT_ADD_PATH_CHARS) {
 431:      git(projectPath, 'add', '-A', '-f', '--', ...batch)
 432:      batch = []
 433:      batchChars = 0
 434:    }
 435:
 436:    batch.push(path)
 437:    batchChars += pathChars
 438:  }
 439:
 440:  if (batch.length > 0) {
 441:    git(projectPath, 'add', '-A', '-f', '--', ...batch)
 442:  }
 443:}
 444:
 445:function gitPathLines(projectPath: string, ...args: string[]): string[] {
 446:  const output = git(projectPath, ...args)
 447:  const paths: string[] = []
 448:
 449:  for (const rawLine of output.split(/\r?\n/)) {
 450:    const path = unquotePath(rawLine.trim())
 451:    if (!path) continue
 452:    paths.push(path)
 453:  }
 454:
 455:  return paths

  14:// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  15:// Constants
  16:// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  17:
  18:const DEFAULT_HEARTBEAT_INTERVAL = '5m'
  19:export const DEFAULT_MEMORY_BRANCH = 'memorytree'
  20:const DEFAULT_AUTO_PUSH = true
  21:const DEFAULT_LOG_LEVEL = 'info'
  22:const DEFAULT_GENERATE_REPORT = false
  23:const DEFAULT_AI_SUMMARY_MODEL = 'claude-haiku-4-5-20251001'
  24:const DEFAULT_LOCALE = 'en'
  25:const DEFAULT_GH_PAGES_BRANCH = ''
  26:const DEFAULT_CNAME = ''
  27:const DEFAULT_WEBHOOK_URL = ''
  28:const DEFAULT_REPORT_BASE_URL = ''
  29:const DEFAULT_REPORT_PORT = 10010
  30:const DEFAULT_REPORT_EXPOSURE = 'local'
  31:export const DEFAULT_RAW_UPLOAD_PERMISSION = 'not-set'
  32:const VALID_LOG_LEVELS: ReadonlySet<string> = new Set(['debug', 'info', 'warn', 'error'])
  33:
  34:// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  35:// Types
  36:// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  37:
  38:export type ReportExposure = 'local' | 'lan'
  39:export type RawUploadPermission = 'not-set' | 'approved' | 'denied'
  40:
  41:export interface ProjectEntry {
  42:  readonly id: string
  43:  readonly path: string
  44:  readonly name: string
  45:  readonly development_path: string
  46:  readonly memory_path: string
  47:  readonly memory_branch: string
  48:  readonly heartbeat_interval: string
  49:  readonly auto_push: boolean
  50:  readonly generate_report: boolean
  51:  readonly ai_summary_model: string
  52:  readonly locale: string
  53:  readonly gh_pages_branch: string
  54:  readonly cname: string
  55:  readonly webhook_url: string
  56:  readonly report_base_url: string
  57:  readonly report_port: number
  58:  readonly report_exposure: ReportExposure
  59:  readonly raw_upload_permission: RawUploadPermission
  60:  readonly last_heartbeat_at: string
  61:}
  62:
  63:export interface Config {
  64:  readonly heartbeat_interval: string
  65:  readonly watch_dirs: readonly string[]
  66:  readonly projects: readonly ProjectEntry[]
  67:  readonly auto_push: boolean
  68:  readonly log_level: string
  69:  readonly generate_report: boolean
  70:  readonly ai_summary_model: string
  71:  readonly locale: string
  72:  readonly gh_pages_branch: string
  73:  readonly cname: string
  74:  readonly webhook_url: string
  75:  /** Base URL for RSS/OG meta (e.g. 'https://memory.example.com'). Empty = skip. */
  76:  readonly report_base_url: string
  77:  /** Port for the report HTTP server. Default: 10010. */
  78:  readonly report_port: number
  79:  /** Exposure for local report hosting. Default: local. */
  80:  readonly report_exposure: ReportExposure
  81:}
  82:
  83:type ProjectLike = Partial<ProjectEntry> & {
  84:  readonly path?: string
  85:  readonly name?: string
  86:  readonly development_path?: string
  87:  readonly memory_path?: string
  88:}
  89:
  90:// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  91:// Path helpers
  92:// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  93:
  94:export function memorytreeRoot(): string {
  95:  return resolve(homedir(), '.memorytree')
  96:}
  97:
  98:export function configPath(): string {
  99:  return resolve(memorytreeRoot(), 'config.toml')
 100:}
 101:
 102:// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 103:// Load / Save
 104:// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 105:
 106:export function loadConfig(): Config {
 107:  const path = configPath()
 108:  if (!existsSync(path)) {
 109:    return defaultConfig()
 110:  }
 111:
 112:  let raw: Record<string, unknown>
 113:  try {
 114:    const text = readFileSync(path, 'utf-8')
 115:    raw = parseToml(text) as Record<string, unknown>
 116:  } catch {
 117:    return defaultConfig()
 118:  }
 119:
 120:  return parseRaw(raw)
 121:}
 122:
 123:export function saveConfig(cfg: Config): void {
 124:  const normalized = normalizeConfig(cfg)
 125:  const path = configPath()
 126:  mkdirSync(dirname(path), { recursive: true })
 127:
 128:  const lines: string[] = [
 129:    `heartbeat_interval = ${tomlString(normalized.heartbeat_interval)}`,
 130:    `auto_push = ${normalized.auto_push ? 'true' : 'false'}`,
 131:    `log_level = ${tomlString(normalized.log_level)}`,
 132:    `generate_report = ${normalized.generate_report ? 'true' : 'false'}`,
 133:    `ai_summary_model = ${tomlString(normalized.ai_summary_model)}`,
 134:    `locale = ${tomlString(normalized.locale)}`,
 135:    `gh_pages_branch = ${tomlString(normalized.gh_pages_branch)}`,
 136:    `cname = ${tomlString(normalized.cname)}`,
 137:    `webhook_url = ${tomlString(normalized.webhook_url)}`,
 138:    `report_base_url = ${tomlString(normalized.report_base_url)}`,
 139:    `report_port = ${normalized.report_port}`,
 140:    `report_exposure = ${tomlString(normalized.report_exposure)}`,
 141:  ]
 142:
 143:  if (normalized.watch_dirs.length > 0) {
 144:    const items = normalized.watch_dirs.map(dir => tomlString(dir)).join(', ')
 145:    lines.push(`watch_dirs = [${items}]`)
 146:  } else {
 147:    lines.push('watch_dirs = []')
 148:  }
 149:
 150:  lines.push('')
 151:  for (const project of normalized.projects) {
 152:    lines.push('[[projects]]')
 153:    lines.push(`id = ${tomlString(project.id)}`)
 154:    lines.push(`path = ${tomlString(project.path)}`)
 155:    lines.push(`name = ${tomlString(project.name)}`)
 156:    lines.push(`development_path = ${tomlString(project.development_path)}`)
 157:    lines.push(`memory_path = ${tomlString(project.memory_path)}`)
 158:    lines.push(`memory_branch = ${tomlString(project.memory_branch)}`)
 159:    lines.push(`heartbeat_interval = ${tomlString(project.heartbeat_interval)}`)
 160:    lines.push(`auto_push = ${project.auto_push ? 'true' : 'false'}`)
 161:    lines.push(`generate_report = ${project.generate_report ? 'true' : 'false'}`)
 162:    lines.push(`ai_summary_model = ${tomlString(project.ai_summary_model)}`)
 163:    lines.push(`locale = ${tomlString(project.locale)}`)
 164:    lines.push(`gh_pages_branch = ${tomlString(project.gh_pages_branch)}`)
 165:    lines.push(`cname = ${tomlString(project.cname)}`)
 166:    lines.push(`webhook_url = ${tomlString(project.webhook_url)}`)
 167:    lines.push(`report_base_url = ${tomlString(project.report_base_url)}`)
 168:    lines.push(`report_port = ${project.report_port}`)
 169:    lines.push(`report_exposure = ${tomlString(project.report_exposure)}`)
 170:    lines.push(`raw_upload_permission = ${tomlString(project.raw_upload_permission)}`)
 171:    if (project.last_heartbeat_at) {
 172:      lines.push(`last_heartbeat_at = ${tomlString(project.last_heartbeat_at)}`)
 173:    }
 174:    lines.push('')
 175:  }
 176:
 177:  writeFileSync(path, lines.join('\n') + '\n', 'utf-8')
 178:}
 179:
 180:// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 181:// Interval parsing
 182:// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 183:
 184:export function intervalToSeconds(interval: string): number {
 185:  const match = interval.trim().toLowerCase().match(/^(\d+)\s*(s|m|h)$/)
 186:  if (!match) {
 187:    return intervalToSeconds(DEFAULT_HEARTBEAT_INTERVAL)
 188:  }
 189:  const value = parseInt(match[1]!, 10)
 190:  const unit = match[2]!
 191:  if (value <= 0) {
 192:    return intervalToSeconds(DEFAULT_HEARTBEAT_INTERVAL)
 193:  }
 194:  const multiplier: Record<string, number> = { s: 1, m: 60, h: 3600 }
 195:  return value * (multiplier[unit] ?? 60)
 196:}
 197:
 198:// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 199:// Project helpers
 200:// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 201:
 202:export function registerProject(
 203:  cfg: Config,
 204:  repoPath: string,
 205:  overrides: Partial<ProjectLike> = {},
 206:): Config {
 207:  const normalized = normalizeConfig(cfg)
 208:  const resolved = normalizePath(repoPath)
 209:  for (const entry of normalized.projects) {
 210:    if (projectContainsPath(entry, resolved)) {
 211:      return normalized
 212:    }
 213:  }
 214:
 215:  const projectInput: Record<string, unknown> = {
 216:    path: overrides.path ?? resolved,
 217:    development_path: overrides.development_path ?? resolved,
 218:    memory_path: overrides.memory_path ?? resolved,
 219:  }
 220:  if (overrides.name !== undefined) projectInput.name = overrides.name
 221:  if (overrides.id !== undefined) projectInput.id = overrides.id
 222:  if (overrides.heartbeat_interval !== undefined) projectInput.heartbeat_interval = overrides.heartbeat_interval
 223:  if (overrides.memory_branch !== undefined) projectInput.memory_branch = overrides.memory_branch
 224:  if (overrides.auto_push !== undefined) projectInput.auto_push = overrides.auto_push
 225:  if (overrides.generate_report !== undefined) projectInput.generate_report = overrides.generate_report
 226:  if (overrides.ai_summary_model !== undefined) projectInput.ai_summary_model = overrides.ai_summary_model
 227:  if (overrides.locale !== undefined) projectInput.locale = overrides.locale
 228:  if (overrides.gh_pages_branch !== undefined) projectInput.gh_pages_branch = overrides.gh_pages_branch
 229:  if (overrides.cname !== undefined) projectInput.cname = overrides.cname
 230:  if (overrides.webhook_url !== undefined) projectInput.webhook_url = overrides.webhook_url
 231:  if (overrides.report_base_url !== undefined) projectInput.report_base_url = overrides.report_base_url
 232:  if (overrides.report_port !== undefined) projectInput.report_port = overrides.report_port
 233:  if (overrides.report_exposure !== undefined) projectInput.report_exposure = overrides.report_exposure
 234:  if (overrides.raw_upload_permission !== undefined) projectInput.raw_upload_permission = overrides.raw_upload_permission
 235:  if (overrides.last_heartbeat_at !== undefined) projectInput.last_heartbeat_at = overrides.last_heartbeat_at
 236:
 237:  const project = normalizeProjectEntry(projectInput as ProjectLike, normalized)
 238:
 239:  return {
 240:    ...normalized,
 241:    projects: [...normalized.projects, project],
 242:  }
 243:}
 244:
 245:export function upsertProject(
 246:  cfg: Config,
 247:  repoPath: string,
 248:  overrides: Partial<ProjectLike> = {},
 249:): Config {
 250:  const normalized = normalizeConfig(cfg)
 251:  const resolved = normalizePath(repoPath)
 252:  const existing = findProjectForPath(normalized, resolved)
 253:  if (existing === null) {
 254:    return registerProject(normalized, repoPath, overrides)
 255:  }
 256:
 257:  const project = normalizeProjectEntry({
 258:    ...existing,
 259:    ...overrides,
 260:    development_path: overrides.development_path ?? existing.development_path,
 261:    memory_path: overrides.memory_path ?? existing.memory_path,
 262:    memory_branch: overrides.memory_branch ?? existing.memory_branch,
 263:    path: overrides.path ?? existing.path,
 264:  }, normalized)
 265:
 266:  return {
 267:    ...normalized,
 268:    projects: normalized.projects.map(entry => (
 269:      entry.id === existing.id ? project : entry
 270:    )),
 271:  }
 272:}
 273:
 274:export function findProjectForPath(config: Config, candidatePath: string): ProjectEntry | null {
 275:  const normalized = normalizePath(candidatePath)
 276:  let bestMatch: ProjectEntry | null = null
 277:  let bestLength = -1
 278:
 279:  for (const entry of config.projects) {
 280:    for (const root of projectRoots(entry)) {
 281:      if (!pathContains(root, normalized)) continue
 282:      if (root.length > bestLength) {
 283:        bestMatch = entry
 284:        bestLength = root.length
 285:      }
 286:    }
 287:  }
 288:
 289:  return bestMatch
 290:}
 291:
 292:export function resolveReportPort(config: Config, candidatePath: string): number {
 293:  const project = findProjectForPath(config, candidatePath)
 294:  return project?.report_port ?? config.report_port
 295:}
 296:
 297:export function resolveReportExposure(config: Config, candidatePath: string): ReportExposure {
 298:  const project = findProjectForPath(config, candidatePath)
 299:  return project?.report_exposure ?? config.report_exposure
 300:}
 301:
 302:export function projectExecutionPath(project: ProjectEntry): string {
 303:  return normalizePath(project.memory_path || project.path || project.development_path)
 304:}
 305:
 306:export function projectDisplayName(project: ProjectEntry): string {
 307:  return project.name || basename(project.development_path || project.path || project.memory_path)
 308:}
 309:
 310:export function projectIsDue(project: ProjectEntry, now: Date = new Date()): boolean {
 311:  if (!project.last_heartbeat_at) return true
 312:
 313:  const lastRunMs = Date.parse(project.last_heartbeat_at)
 314:  if (!Number.isFinite(lastRunMs)) return true
 315:
 316:  const dueAfterMs = intervalToSeconds(project.heartbeat_interval) * 1000
 317:  return now.getTime() - lastRunMs >= dueAfterMs
 318:}
 319:
 320:export function noteProjectHeartbeatRun(config: Config, projectId: string, at: string): Config {

   1:import { copyFileSync, existsSync, lstatSync, mkdirSync, readdirSync, rmSync } from 'node:fs'
   2:import { dirname, join, resolve } from 'node:path'
   3:
   4:import type { ProjectEntry } from './config.js'
   5:
   6:export const DEV_TO_MEMORY_PATHS = [
   7:  'AGENTS.md',
   8:  'Memory/01_goals',
   9:  'Memory/02_todos',
  10:  'Memory/03_chat_logs',
  11:  'Memory/04_knowledge',

  13:] as const
  14:
  15:export const MEMORY_TO_DEV_PATHS = [
  16:  'Memory/06_transcripts',
  17:  'Memory/07_reports',
  18:] as const
  19:
  20:export const MANAGED_REPO_PATHS = [
  21:  ...DEV_TO_MEMORY_PATHS,
  22:  ...MEMORY_TO_DEV_PATHS,
  23:] as const
  24:
  25:export interface SyncStats {
  26:  readonly copied: number
  27:  readonly deleted: number
  28:  readonly skipped: boolean
  29:}
  30:
  31:export function projectUsesIsolatedMemoryPath(project: ProjectEntry): boolean {
  32:  return normalizeComparablePath(project.development_path) !== normalizeComparablePath(project.memory_path)
  33:}
  34:
  35:export function syncProjectContextToMemory(project: ProjectEntry): SyncStats {
  36:  if (!projectUsesIsolatedMemoryPath(project)) {
  37:    return { copied: 0, deleted: 0, skipped: true }
  38:  }
  39:
  40:  return syncPathSet(project.development_path, project.memory_path, DEV_TO_MEMORY_PATHS)
  41:}
  42:
  43:export function syncProjectOutputsToDevelopment(project: ProjectEntry): SyncStats {
  44:  if (!projectUsesIsolatedMemoryPath(project)) {
  45:    return { copied: 0, deleted: 0, skipped: true }
  46:  }
  47:
  48:  return syncPathSet(project.memory_path, project.development_path, MEMORY_TO_DEV_PATHS)
  49:}
  50:
  51:function syncPathSet(
  52:  sourceRoot: string,
  53:  targetRoot: string,
  54:  relativePaths: readonly string[],
  55:): SyncStats {
  56:  let copied = 0
  57:  let deleted = 0
  58:
  59:  for (const relativePath of relativePaths) {
  60:    const stats = syncManagedPath(
  61:      resolve(sourceRoot, relativePath),
  62:      resolve(targetRoot, relativePath),
  63:    )
  64:    copied += stats.copied
  65:    deleted += stats.deleted
  66:  }
  67:
  68:  return {
  69:    copied,
  70:    deleted,
  71:    skipped: false,
  72:  }
  73:}
  74:
  75:function syncManagedPath(sourcePath: string, targetPath: string): Omit<SyncStats, 'skipped'> {
  76:  if (!existsSync(sourcePath)) {
  77:    return {
  78:      copied: 0,
  79:      deleted: removeTree(targetPath),
  80:    }
  81:  }
  82:
  83:  const sourceStats = lstatSync(sourcePath)
  84:  if (sourceStats.isDirectory()) {
  85:    return syncDirectory(sourcePath, targetPath)
  86:  }
  87:
  88:  mkdirSync(dirname(targetPath), { recursive: true })
  89:  if (existsSync(targetPath) && lstatSync(targetPath).isDirectory()) {
  90:    rmSync(targetPath, { recursive: true, force: true })
  91:  }
  92:  copyFileSync(sourcePath, targetPath)
  93:  return { copied: 1, deleted: 0 }
  94:}
  95:
  96:function syncDirectory(sourceDir: string, targetDir: string): Omit<SyncStats, 'skipped'> {
  97:  if (existsSync(targetDir) && !lstatSync(targetDir).isDirectory()) {
  98:    rmSync(targetDir, { recursive: true, force: true })
  99:  }
 100:
 101:  mkdirSync(targetDir, { recursive: true })
 102:
 103:  let copied = 0
 104:  let deleted = 0
 105:  const sourceNames = new Set(readdirSync(sourceDir))
 106:
 107:  for (const name of sourceNames) {
 108:    const stats = syncManagedPath(join(sourceDir, name), join(targetDir, name))
 109:    copied += stats.copied
 110:    deleted += stats.deleted
 111:  }
 112:
 113:  for (const name of readdirSync(targetDir)) {
 114:    if (sourceNames.has(name)) continue
 115:    deleted += removeTree(join(targetDir, name))
 116:  }
 117:
 118:  return { copied, deleted }
 119:}
 120:
 121:function removeTree(targetPath: string): number {
 122:  if (!existsSync(targetPath)) {
 123:    return 0
 124:  }
 125:
 126:  const count = countFiles(targetPath)
 127:  rmSync(targetPath, { recursive: true, force: true })
 128:  return count
 129:}
 130:
 131:function countFiles(targetPath: string): number {
 132:  const stats = lstatSync(targetPath)
 133:  if (!stats.isDirectory()) {
 134:    return 1
 135:  }
 136:
 137:  let total = 0
 138:  for (const name of readdirSync(targetPath)) {
 139:    total += countFiles(join(targetPath, name))
 140:  }
 141:  return total
 142:}
 143:
 144:function normalizeComparablePath(value: string): string {
 145:  return resolve(value).replace(/\\/g, '/').replace(/\/+$/, '')
 146:}

结论先说：你纠正得对，前一轮我漏掉了 `.gitignore` 和 `5m/30m` 这两点。现在按代码核对后的结论是： 1. 现在的主链路确实是 `jsonl -> 结构化 json -> html`，Markdown 不是主输出。导入时会同时写 clean markdown 和 full json，[src/transcript/import.ts](/d:/demo1/memorytree-workflow/src/tran...

Expand full message

结论先说：你纠正得对，前一轮我漏掉了 .gitignore 和 5m/30m 这两点。现在按代码核对后的结论是：

1. 现在的主链路确实是 jsonl -> 结构化 json -> html，Markdown 不是主输出。导入时会同时写 clean markdown 和 full json，[src/transcript/import.ts](/d:/demo1/memorytree-workflow/src/transcript/import.ts#L97)；生成报告时优先读 structured/full json，[src/report/build.ts](/d:/demo1/memorytree-workflow/src/report/build.ts#L102) [src/report/build.ts](/d:/demo1/memorytree-workflow/src/report/build.ts#L494) [src/report/build.ts](/d:/demo1/memorytree-workflow/src/report/build.ts#L526)，只有拿不到结构化数据时才回退到 clean markdown [src/report/build.ts](/d:/demo1/memorytree-workflow/src/report/build.ts#L327)。所以对，Markdown 现在更像“可读索引/兜底”。

2. 30m refresh 这个运行时概念已经去掉了。默认心跳就是 5m [src/heartbeat/config.ts](/d:/demo1/memorytree-workflow/src/heartbeat/config.ts#L18)，quick-start 也是写死 5m [src/cli/main.ts](/d:/demo1/memorytree-workflow/src/cli/main.ts#L421)。旧的 refresh_interval / last_refresh_at 现在只作为兼容输入被忽略，测试也明确校验了 [tests/heartbeat/config.test.ts](/d:/demo1/memorytree-workflow/tests/heartbeat/config.test.ts#L181)。你看到文案里那个 “refreshes ... local cache mirror” 只是说镜像刷新，不是另一个 30 分钟调度器。

3. 根目录 Memory 确实应该进 .gitignore。当前仓库本来就已经有 Memory/ 了 [/.gitignore](/d:/demo1/memorytree-workflow/.gitignore#L8)，所以 quick-start 输出没再提；而且 heartbeat 的 sync 清单本来也不包含 .gitignore，只同步 AGENTS.md、Memory/01-05 到 memory worktree，再把 Memory/06-07 拉回开发目录 [src/heartbeat/sync.ts](/d:/demo1/memorytree-workflow/src/heartbeat/sync.ts#L6)。这次我把这件事补成了产品行为：init、upgrade、register/quick-start 现在都会自动确保 AGENTS.md、Memory/、memory/ 存在 [src/project/scaffold.ts](/d:/demo1/memorytree-workflow/src/project/scaffold.ts#L24) [src/cli/cmd-init.ts](/d:/demo1/memorytree-workflow/src/cli/cmd-init.ts#L69) [src/project/upgrade.ts](/d:/demo1/memorytree-workflow/src/project/upgrade.ts#L215) [src/cli/cmd-daemon.ts](/d:/demo1/memorytree-workflow/src/cli/cmd-daemon.ts#L211)。当前仓库的 .gitignore 我也补了 memory/ [/.gitignore](/d:/demo1/memorytree-workflow/.gitignore#L9)。

4. “直接跑会改真实 memory 分支”的意思是：heartbeat 实际执行目录取的是 memory_path，不是你当前开发目录 [src/heartbeat/config.ts](/d:/demo1/memorytree-workflow/src/heartbeat/config.ts#L302)。也就是这次 quick-start 真正操作的是 C:/Users/ai/.memorytree/worktrees/memorytree-workflow-active 这个 worktree；如果有变更，就会在那里真实 commit，并且在 auto_push=true 时真实 push [src/heartbeat/heartbeat.ts](/d:/demo1/memorytree-workflow/src/heartbeat/heartbeat.ts#L107) [src/heartbeat/heartbeat.ts](/d:/demo1/memorytree-workflow/src/heartbeat/heartbeat.ts#L311) [src/heartbeat/heartbeat.ts](/d:/demo1/memorytree-workflow/src/heartbeat/heartbeat.ts#L319)。它不是改你的 main，但也不是 dry-run。

至于“为什么有这么多报错”：
- Sensitive pattern detected ... 是告警，不是失败；只是扫描到疑似敏感串就记 warning [src/heartbeat/heartbeat.ts](/d:/demo1/memorytree-workflow/src/heartbeat/heartbeat.ts#L263)。
- 真正导致这次 heartbeat 失败的是 Windows 的 spawnSync git ENAMETOOLONG。我已经把 git add 改成分批 staging 了 [src/heartbeat/heartbeat.ts](/d:/demo1/memorytree-workflow/src/heartbeat/heartbeat.ts#L52) [src/heartbeat/heartbeat.ts](/d:/demo1/memorytree-workflow/src/heartbeat/heartbeat.ts#L424)。

验证我已经跑过：npm test -- tests/cli/init-upgrade.test.ts tests/cli/daemon.test.ts tests/heartbeat/branch-safety.test.ts、npm run typecheck、npm run build 都通过了。没有直接帮你再跑 heartbeat，因为当前配置还是 auto_push=true，那会真的动到 memorytree worktree/branch；如果你要，我下一步可以先关掉 auto_push，再安全地跑一次验证。

task_completed #536 019d22cf-6250-7b12-9efb-a8e0c1f32df9 02:34:58
结论先说：你纠正得对，前一轮我漏掉了 `.gitignore` 和 `5m/30m` 这两点。现在按代码核对后的结论是： 1. 现在的主链路确实是 `jsonl -> 结构化 json -> html`，Markdown 不是主输出。导入时会同时写 clean markdown 和 full json，[src/transcript/import.ts](/d:/demo1/memorytree-workflow/src/transcript/import.ts#L97...
Show task summary

结论先说：你纠正得对，前一轮我漏掉了 .gitignore 和 5m/30m 这两点。现在按代码核对后的结论是：

1. 现在的主链路确实是 jsonl -> 结构化 json -> html，Markdown 不是主输出。导入时会同时写 clean markdown 和 full json，[src/transcript/import.ts](/d:/demo1/memorytree-workflow/src/transcript/import.ts#L97)；生成报告时优先读 structured/full json，[src/report/build.ts](/d:/demo1/memorytree-workflow/src/report/build.ts#L102) [src/report/build.ts](/d:/demo1/memorytree-workflow/src/report/build.ts#L494) [src/report/build.ts](/d:/demo1/memorytree-workflow/src/report/build.ts#L526)，只有拿不到结构化数据时才回退到 clean markdown [src/report/build.ts](/d:/demo1/memorytree-workflow/src/report/build.ts#L327)。所以对，Markdown 现在更像“可读索引/兜底”。

2. 30m refresh 这个运行时概念已经去掉了。默认心跳就是 5m [src/heartbeat/config.ts](/d:/demo1/memorytree-workflow/src/heartbeat/config.ts#L18)，quick-start 也是写死 5m [src/cli/main.ts](/d:/demo1/memorytree-workflow/src/cli/main.ts#L421)。旧的 refresh_interval / last_refresh_at 现在只作为兼容输入被忽略，测试也明确校验了 [tests/heartbeat/config.test.ts](/d:/demo1/memorytree-workflow/tests/heartbeat/config.test.ts#L181)。你看到文案里那个 “refreshes ... local cache mirror” 只是说镜像刷新，不是另一个 30 分钟调度器。

3. 根目录 Memory 确实应该进 .gitignore。当前仓库本来就已经有 Memory/ 了 [/.gitignore](/d:/demo1/memorytree-workflow/.gitignore#L8)，所以 quick-start 输出没再提；而且 heartbeat 的 sync 清单本来也不包含 .gitignore，只同步 AGENTS.md、Memory/01-05 到 memory worktree，再把 Memory/06-07 拉回开发目录 [src/heartbeat/sync.ts](/d:/demo1/memorytree-workflow/src/heartbeat/sync.ts#L6)。这次我把这件事补成了产品行为：init、upgrade、register/quick-start 现在都会自动确保 AGENTS.md、Memory/、memory/ 存在 [src/project/scaffold.ts](/d:/demo1/memorytree-workflow/src/project/scaffold.ts#L24) [src/cli/cmd-init.ts](/d:/demo1/memorytree-workflow/src/cli/cmd-init.ts#L69) [src/project/upgrade.ts](/d:/demo1/memorytree-workflow/src/project/upgrade.ts#L215) [src/cli/cmd-daemon.ts](/d:/demo1/memorytree-workflow/src/cli/cmd-daemon.ts#L211)。当前仓库的 .gitignore 我也补了 memory/ [/.gitignore](/d:/demo1/memorytree-workflow/.gitignore#L9)。

4. “直接跑会改真实 memory 分支”的意思是：heartbeat 实际执行目录取的是 memory_path，不是你当前开发目录 [src/heartbeat/config.ts](/d:/demo1/memorytree-workflow/src/heartbeat/config.ts#L302)。也就是这次 quick-start 真正操作的是 C:/Users/ai/.memorytree/worktrees/memorytree-workflow-active 这个 worktree；如果有变更，就会在那里真实 commit，并且在 auto_push=true 时真实 push [src/heartbeat/heartbeat.ts](/d:/demo1/memorytree-workflow/src/heartbeat/heartbeat.ts#L107) [src/heartbeat/heartbeat.ts](/d:/demo1/memorytree-workflow/src/heartbeat/heartbeat.ts#L311) [src/heartbeat/heartbeat.ts](/d:/demo1/memorytree-workflow/src/heartbeat/heartbeat.ts#L319)。它不是改你的 main，但也不是 dry-run。

至于“为什么有这么多报错”：
- Sensitive pattern detected ... 是告警，不是失败；只是扫描到疑似敏感串就记 warning [src/heartbeat/heartbeat.ts](/d:/demo1/memorytree-workflow/src/heartbeat/heartbeat.ts#L263)。
- 真正导致这次 heartbeat 失败的是 Windows 的 spawnSync git ENAMETOOLONG。我已经把 git add 改成分批 staging 了 [src/heartbeat/heartbeat.ts](/d:/demo1/memorytree-workflow/src/heartbeat/heartbeat.ts#L52) [src/heartbeat/heartbeat.ts](/d:/demo1/memorytree-workflow/src/heartbeat/heartbeat.ts#L424)。

验证我已经跑过：npm test -- tests/cli/init-upgrade.test.ts tests/cli/daemon.test.ts tests/heartbeat/branch-safety.test.ts、npm run typecheck、npm run build 都通过了。没有直接帮你再跑 heartbeat，因为当前配置还是 auto_push=true，那会真的动到 memorytree worktree/branch；如果你要，我下一步可以先关掉 auto_push，再安全地跑一次验证。

  "user_instructions": "# AGENTS.md\n\n## Read Order\n- Read this file first.\n- Read the latest file in `Memory/01_goals/`.\n- Read the latest todo bound to that goal in `Memory/02_todos/`.\n- Read `Memory/04_knowledge/` only when needed.\n- Read `Memory/06_transcripts/clean/` and transcript manifests only when needed.\n- Read `Memory/03_chat_logs/` and `Memory/05_archive/` only when needed.\n\n## Memory Rules\n- Change the active goal only after explicit user confirmation of a requirement or scope change.\n- Keep the active todo synchronized with the active goal.\n- Append chat logs only. Never rewrite or delete prior entries.\n- Keep active files concise and move stale context to knowledge or archive files.\n- Treat cleaned transcript indexes as search aids. Confirm exact wording against the raw transcript archive when precision matters.\n\n## Transcript Rules\n- If transcript archival is enabled, archive transcripts by client, project, and session.\n- Keep raw transcripts in both this repository's `Memory/06_transcripts/raw/` mirror and the user-level MemoryTree archive.\n- Keep this repository mirror limited to transcripts that belong to the current project. Archive unrelated projects in the global MemoryTree archive only.\n- Generate cleaned transcript indexes with deterministic code, not model-generated rewriting.\n- Raw transcript upload permission for this repository: not set. Ask the user before the first raw transcript commit or push, then record the answer here.\n- If raw transcript uploads are not approved, keep `Memory/06_transcripts/raw/**` unstaged and commit only cleaned transcript indexes or manifests for this repository.\n\n## Git Rules\n- Obey this repository's branch, PR, CI, review, and release rules.\n- Auto-commit and push only MemoryTree-owned changes (`Memory/**` and this file when it is managed by MemoryTree), excluding `Memory/06_transcripts/raw/**` until raw transcript uploads are approved for this repository.\n- Use a MemoryTree-scoped commit title. Prefer `memorytree(<scope>): <subject>`, or the repository-required equivalent such as `docs(memorytree): <subject>`.\n- Use a dedicated branch and PR for MemoryTree-only changes. Enable auto-merge only when repository rules permit it.\n- If a diff includes product code, shared policy files, cross-project transcript files, or unclear ownership, stop and ask the user before staging or pushing.\n- When `auto_push` is enabled, the heartbeat process pushes automatically after committing. If no remote is configured or a push fails, an alert is written to `~/.memorytree/alerts.json`.\n\n## Heartbeat Rules\n- Transcript discovery, import, cleaning, and push are handled by the background heartbeat process. The model does not execute these operations.\n- The model only writes chat log summaries and updates goals and todos during interactive sessions.\n- If `~/.memorytree/alerts.json` contains pending notifications, display them at the start of the session.\n- If `memorytree-daemon` is available but not registered on this machine, ask the user for their preferred settings and offer to run `memorytree-daemon install`.\n- When the user asks to see their most recent conversation, trigger an on-demand sync for the current project, locate the latest session across all clients, and generate a continuation summary.\n- All interactive prompts must use plain-text questions. Do not rely on client-specific UI components.\n",

    "mode": "tokens",
    "limit": 10000
  }
}

  let content = readFileSync(templatePath, 'utf-8')
  for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(values)) {
    content = content.replaceAll(`{{${key}}}`, value)
  }
  mkdirSync(join(targetPath, '..'), { recursive: true })
  writeFileSync(targetPath, content, 'utf-8')
  return true
}

export function ensureGitignoreEntries(root: string, entries: readonly string[]): void {
  if (!existsSync(root) || !isDirectory(root)) return

  const gitignorePath = join(root, '.gitignore')
  let existing = ''
  if (existsSync(gitignorePath)) {
    try {
      existing = readFileSync(gitignorePath, 'utf-8')
    } catch {
      return
    }
  }

  const lines = existing.replace(/\r\n/g, '\n').split('\n')
  if (lines.length > 0 && lines[lines.length - 1] === '') {
    lines.pop()
  }

  const seen = new Set(lines.map(line => line.trim()))
  let changed = false

  for (const entry of entries) {
    const normalized = entry.trim()
    if (!normalized || seen.has(normalized)) continue
    lines.push(entry)
    seen.add(normalized)
    changed = true
  }

  if (!changed) return
  writeFileSync(gitignorePath, `${lines.join('\n')}\n`, 'utf-8')
}

export function ensureManagedGitignore(root: string): void {
  ensureGitignoreEntries(root, MANAGED_GITIGNORE_ENTRIES)
}

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Scaffold paths
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

export function resolveScaffoldPaths(root: string, dt: Date): ScaffoldPaths {
  const y = dt.getFullYear()
  const m = String(dt.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0')
  const d = String(dt.getDate()).padStart(2, '0')
  const hh = String(dt.getHours()).padStart(2, '0')
  const mm = String(dt.getMinutes()).padStart(2, '0')

  const dateToken = `${y}${m}${d}`
  const dateLabel = `${y}-${m}-${d}`
  const timeLabel = `${hh}:${mm}`
  const chatFilename = `${y}-${m}-${d}_${hh}-${mm}.md`

  const goalDir = join(root, 'Memory', '01_goals')
  const todoDir = join(root, 'Memory', '02_todos')
  const chatDir = join(root, 'Memory', '03_chat_logs')

  let goalVersion = findLatestVersion(goalDir, /^goal_v(\d{3})_\d{8}\.md$/)
  if (goalVersion === null) goalVersion = '001'
  const prevNum = parseInt(goalVersion, 10)
  const previousVersion = prevNum > 1 ? `v${String(prevNum - 1).padStart(3, '0')}` : 'none'

  let todoVersion = findLatestTodoVersion(todoDir, goalVersion)
  if (todoVersion === null) todoVersion = '001'

  const goalPath = findLatestGoalFile(goalDir) ?? join(goalDir, `goal_v${goalVersion}_${dateToken}.md`)
  const todoPath = findLatestTodoFile(todoDir, goalVersion) ?? join(todoDir, `todo_v${goalVersion}_${todoVersion}_${dateToken}.md`)
  const chatPath = findLatestChatLogFile(chatDir) ?? join(chatDir, chatFilename)

  return {
    root,

/**
 * CLI: memorytree init 鈥?initialize a MemoryTree workspace.
 * Port of scripts/init-memorytree.py
 */

import { existsSync } from 'node:fs'
import { resolve, join } from 'node:path'

import {
  buildDatetime,
  createMemoryDirs,
  ensureManagedGitignore,
  findExternalPolicySources,
  resolveScaffoldPaths,
  resolveTemplateDir,
  scaffoldContentFiles,
  writeTemplate,
} from '../project/scaffold.js'
import { resolveSkillRoot } from '../utils/path.js'

export interface InitOptions {
  root: string
  projectName: string
  goalSummary: string
  locale: string
  date: string
  time: string
  skipAgents: boolean
  force: boolean
}

export function cmdInit(options: InitOptions): number {
  const root = resolve(options.root)
  if (!existsSync(root)) {
    process.stderr.write(`root does not exist: ${root}\n`)
    return 1
  }

  if (options.skipAgents) {
    process.stderr.write(
      '--skip-agents is not supported for fresh initialization. ' +
      'Use memorytree upgrade when preserving or merging an existing AGENTS.md.\n',
    )
    return 1
  }

  const agentsPath = join(root, 'AGENTS.md')
  if (existsSync(agentsPath)) {
    process.stderr.write(
      'AGENTS.md already exists. Use memorytree upgrade to preserve or merge existing repo policy.\n',
    )
    return 1
  }

  const policySources = findExternalPolicySources(root)
  if (policySources.length > 0) {
    const preview = policySources.slice(0, 3).join(', ') + (policySources.length > 3 ? ', ...' : '')
    process.stderr.write(
      `External repo policy files detected (${preview}). ` +
      'Use memorytree upgrade to preserve host commit and PR rules.\n',
    )
    return 1
  }

  const skillRoot = resolveSkillRoot(import.meta.url)
  const templates = resolveTemplateDir(skillRoot, root, options.locale)
  const dt = buildDatetime(options.date, options.time)

  createMemoryDirs(root)
  const paths = resolveScaffoldPaths(root, dt)
  scaffoldContentFiles(paths, templates, options.goalSummary, options.projectName, options.force)
  writeTemplate(join(templates, 'agents.md'), agentsPath, options.force, {})
  ensureManagedGitignore(root)
  writeHeartbeatNextStep(root)

  return 0
}

function writeHeartbeatNextStep(root: string): void {
  const displayRoot = root.includes(' ') ? `"${root}"` : root
  process.stdout.write(`Initialized MemoryTree files in: ${root}\n`)
  process.stdout.write('This command did not register heartbeat or modify ~/.memorytree/config.toml.\n')
  process.stdout.write('If you want the default heartbeat setup for this repository, run:\n')
  process.stdout.write(`  memorytree daemon quick-start --root ${displayRoot}\n`)
  process.stdout.write(
    'Heartbeat keeps the dedicated MemoryTree branch as the shared source of truth ' +
    'and refreshes this repository directory as a local cache mirror.\n',
  )
}
