/**
 * CLI: memorytree upgrade 鈥?upgrade a repo to MemoryTree safely.
 * Port of scripts/upgrade-memorytree.py CLI wrapper.
 */

import { existsSync } from 'node:fs'
import { resolve } from 'node:path'

import { normalizeLocale } from '../project/locale.js'
import { buildDatetime, resolveTemplateDir } from '../project/scaffold.js'
import { upgrade, formatResultText } from '../project/upgrade.js'
import { resolveSkillRoot } from '../utils/path.js'

export interface UpgradeOptions {
  root: string
  projectName: string
  goalSummary: string
  locale: string
  date: string
  time: string
  format: string
}

export function cmdUpgrade(options: UpgradeOptions): number {
  const root = resolve(options.root)
  if (!existsSync(root)) {
    process.stderr.write(`root does not exist: ${root}\n`)
    return 1
  }

  const skillRoot = resolveSkillRoot(import.meta.url)
  const templates = resolveTemplateDir(skillRoot, root, options.locale)
  const effectiveLocale = normalizeLocale(options.locale, root)
  const dt = buildDatetime(options.date, options.time)

  const result = upgrade(
    root,
    skillRoot,
    templates,
    effectiveLocale,
    options.locale,
    options.goalSummary,
    options.projectName,
    dt,
  )

  if (options.format === 'json') {
    process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify(result) + '\n')
    writeHeartbeatNextStep(root, process.stderr)
  } else {
    process.stdout.write(formatResultText(result) + '\n')
    writeHeartbeatNextStep(root)
  }
  return 0
}

function writeHeartbeatNextStep(
  root: string,
  stream: Pick<NodeJS.WriteStream, 'write'> = process.stdout,
): void {
  const displayRoot = root.includes(' ') ? `"${root}"` : root
  stream.write('This command updated repository files only.\n')
  stream.write('It did not register heartbeat or modify ~/.memorytree/config.toml.\n')
  stream.write('If you want the default heartbeat setup for this repository, run:\n')
  stream.write(`  memorytree daemon quick-start --root ${displayRoot}\n`)
  stream.write(
    'Heartbeat keeps the dedicated MemoryTree branch as the shared source of truth ' +
    'and refreshes this repository directory as a local cache mirror.\n',
  )
}
Tool Result #554 shell_command call_JQcWhS4e6L5skVHtrMjYejao exit 0 02:43:29
shell_command output=Exit code: 0 Wall time: 0.5 seconds Output: Using Node v20.20.1 Using Node v20.20.1 if (rawUploadPermission === null) { process.stderr.write('Invalid raw upload permission. Use ...
Show output payload 
Exit code: 0
Wall time: 0.5 seconds
Output:
Using Node v20.20.1
Using Node v20.20.1
  if (rawUploadPermission === null) {
    process.stderr.write('Invalid raw upload permission. Use not-set, approved, or denied.\n')
    return 1
  }

  const requestedPort = options.reportPort ? parseInt(options.reportPort, 10) : NaN
  const reportPort = Number.isInteger(requestedPort) && requestedPort > 0 && requestedPort <= 65535
    ? requestedPort
    : existingProject?.report_port ?? config.report_port

  const updated = upsertProject(config, root, {
    name: options.name ?? existingProject?.name ?? basename(root),
    development_path: root,
    memory_path: options.worktree
      ? resolve(options.worktree)
      : existingProject?.memory_path ?? defaultProjectWorktreePath(root),
    memory_branch: requestedBranch,
    heartbeat_interval: heartbeatInterval,
    auto_push: autoPush,
    generate_report: generateReport,
    report_port: reportPort,
    raw_upload_permission: rawUploadPermission,
  })

  const project = findProjectForPath(updated, root)
  if (!project) {
    process.stderr.write(`Failed to register project: ${root}\n`)
    return 1
  }

  const worktree = ensureProjectWorktree(project)
  saveConfig(updated)
  ensureManagedGitignore(root)
  let upstream: ReturnType<typeof ensureBranchUpstream> | null = null
  let upstreamError = ''
  if (project.auto_push) {
    try {
      upstream = ensureBranchUpstream(project.memory_path, worktree.branch)
    } catch (error: unknown) {
      upstreamError = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error)
    }
  }

  process.stdout.write(`Registered project: ${project.name}\n`)
  process.stdout.write(`Development path: ${project.development_path}\n`)
  process.stdout.write(`Memory path: ${project.memory_path}\n`)
  process.stdout.write(`Memory branch: ${project.memory_branch}\n`)
  process.stdout.write(`Heartbeat interval: ${project.heartbeat_interval}\n`)
  process.stdout.write(`Auto-push: ${project.auto_push}\n`)
  process.stdout.write(`Generate report: ${project.generate_report}\n`)
  process.stdout.write(`Raw upload permission: ${project.raw_upload_permission}\n`)
  process.stdout.write(`Worktree branch: ${worktree.branch}\n`)
  process.stdout.write(`Worktree created: ${worktree.created ? 'yes' : 'no'}\n`)
  if (upstreamError) {
    process.stderr.write(`Upstream configured: failed (${upstreamError})\n`)
  } else if (upstream === null) {
    process.stdout.write('Upstream configured: skipped (auto_push disabled)\n')
  } else if (upstream.remote === null) {
    process.stdout.write('Upstream configured: no remote available\n')
  } else {
    process.stdout.write(`Upstream configured: ${upstream.created ? 'yes' : 'already'} (${upstream.remote}/${worktree.branch})\n`)
  }
  return upstreamError ? 1 : 0
}

function parseRawUploadPermissionOption(value: string): 'not-set' | 'approved' | 'denied' | null {
  const normalized = normalizeRawUploadPermission(value, DEFAULT_RAW_UPLOAD_PERMISSION)
  return normalized === DEFAULT_RAW_UPLOAD_PERMISSION && value.trim().toLowerCase() !== DEFAULT_RAW_UPLOAD_PERMISSION
    ? null
    : normalized
}

export async function cmdQuickStart(options: {
  root: string
  name?: string
}): Promise<number> {
  const root = resolve(options.root)
  const config = loadConfig()
  const quickStartSeconds = intervalToSeconds(QUICK_START_HEARTBEAT_INTERVAL)
  const schedulerIntervalSeconds = registeredHeartbeatIntervalSeconds()

 export const MANAGED_GITIGNORE_ENTRIES: readonly string[] = [
   'AGENTS.md',
   'Memory/**',
   'memory/**',
 ] as const
+
+export interface GitignoreEnsureResult {
+  readonly path: string
+  readonly added: readonly string[]
+  readonly changed: boolean
+}
@@
-export function ensureGitignoreEntries(root: string, entries: readonly string[]): void {
-  if (!existsSync(root) || !isDirectory(root)) return
+export function ensureGitignoreEntries(root: string, entries: readonly string[]): GitignoreEnsureResult | null {
+  if (!existsSync(root) || !isDirectory(root)) return null
 
   const gitignorePath = join(root, '.gitignore')
   let existing = ''
   if (existsSync(gitignorePath)) {
     try {
       existing = readFileSync(gitignorePath, 'utf-8')
     } catch {
-      return
+      return null
     }
   }
 
   const lines = existing.replace(/\r\n/g, '\n').split('\n')
   if (lines.length > 0 && lines[lines.length - 1] === '') {
     lines.pop()
   }
 
   const seen = new Set(lines.map(line => line.trim()))
+  const added: string[] = []
   let changed = false
 
   for (const entry of entries) {
     const normalized = entry.trim()
     if (!normalized || seen.has(normalized)) continue
     lines.push(entry)
     seen.add(normalized)
+    added.push(entry)
     changed = true
   }
 
-  if (!changed) return
-  writeFileSync(gitignorePath, `${lines.join('\n')}\n`, 'utf-8')
+  if (changed) {
+    writeFileSync(gitignorePath, `${lines.join('\n')}\n`, 'utf-8')
+  }
+
+  return {
+    path: gitignorePath,
+    added,
+    changed,
+  }
 }
 
-export function ensureManagedGitignore(root: string): void {
-  ensureGitignoreEntries(root, MANAGED_GITIGNORE_ENTRIES)
+export function ensureManagedGitignore(root: string): GitignoreEnsureResult | null {
+  return ensureGitignoreEntries(root, MANAGED_GITIGNORE_ENTRIES)
 }

Using Node v20.20.1
Using Node v20.20.1
  dt: Date,
): UpgradeResult {
  const initialState = detectState(root)

  const createdDirs = createMemoryDirs(root)
  const paths = resolveScaffoldPaths(root, dt)
  const { created: createdFiles, preserved: preservedFiles } = scaffoldContentFiles(
    paths, templates, goalSummary, projectName, false,
  )

  const agentsPath = join(root, 'AGENTS.md')
  let agentsAction = 'preserved_existing'
  if (!existsSync(agentsPath)) {
    const agentsTemplate = join(templates, 'agents.md')
    if (existsSync(agentsTemplate) && writeTemplate(agentsTemplate, agentsPath, false, {})) {
      createdFiles.push('AGENTS.md')
      agentsAction = 'created'
    }
  } else {
    preservedFiles.push('AGENTS.md')
  }
  ensureManagedGitignore(root)
  const mergeRequired = agentsAction === 'preserved_existing' && needsAgentsMerge(agentsPath)

  return {
    state_before: initialState,
    state_after: detectState(root),
    requested_locale: requestedLocale,
    effective_locale: effectiveLocale,
    created_dirs: createdDirs,
    created_files: createdFiles,
    preserved_files: preservedFiles,
    agents_action: agentsAction,
    agents_merge_required: mergeRequired,
  }

  79:
  80:function writeHeartbeatNextStep(root: string, gitignoreResult: GitignoreEnsureResult | null): void {
  81:  const displayRoot = root.includes(' ') ? `"${root}"` : root
  82:  process.stdout.write(`Initialized MemoryTree files in: ${root}\n`)
  83:  writeGitignoreStatus(process.stdout, gitignoreResult)
  84:  process.stdout.write('This command did not register heartbeat or modify ~/.memorytree/config.toml.\n')
  85:  process.stdout.write('If you want the default heartbeat setup for this repository, run:\n')
  86:  process.stdout.write(`  memorytree daemon quick-start --root ${displayRoot}\n`)
  87:  process.stdout.write(
  88:    'Heartbeat keeps the dedicated MemoryTree branch as the shared source of truth ' +
  89:    'and refreshes this repository directory as a local cache mirror.\n',
  90:  )
  91:}
  92:
  93:function writeGitignoreStatus(
  94:  stream: Pick<NodeJS.WriteStream, 'write'>,
  95:  result: GitignoreEnsureResult | null,
  96:): void {
  97:  if (result === null) return
  98:  if (result.changed) {
  99:    stream.write(`.gitignore updated: ${result.added.join(', ')}\n`)
 100:    return
 101:  }
 102:  stream.write('.gitignore already contains managed MemoryTree entries.\n')
 103:}

 256:  if (existsSync(targetPath) && !force) return false
 257:  let content = readFileSync(templatePath, 'utf-8')
 258:  for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(values)) {

 265:
 266:export function ensureGitignoreEntries(root: string, entries: readonly string[]): GitignoreEnsureResult | null {
 267:  if (!existsSync(root) || !isDirectory(root)) return null
 268:
 269:  const gitignorePath = join(root, '.gitignore')
 270:  let existing = ''
 271:  if (existsSync(gitignorePath)) {
 272:    try {
 273:      existing = readFileSync(gitignorePath, 'utf-8')
 274:    } catch {
 275:      return null
 276:    }
 277:  }
 278:
 279:  const lines = existing.replace(/\r\n/g, '\n').split('\n')
 280:  if (lines.length > 0 && lines[lines.length - 1] === '') {
 281:    lines.pop()
 282:  }
 283:
 284:  const seen = new Set(lines.map(line => line.trim()))
 285:  const added: string[] = []
 286:  let changed = false
 287:
 288:  for (const entry of entries) {
 289:    const normalized = entry.trim()
 290:    if (!normalized || seen.has(normalized)) continue
 291:    lines.push(entry)
 292:    seen.add(normalized)
 293:    added.push(entry)
 294:    changed = true
 295:  }
 296:
 297:  if (changed) {
 298:    writeFileSync(gitignorePath, `${lines.join('\n')}\n`, 'utf-8')
 299:  }
 300:
 301:  return {
 302:    path: gitignorePath,
 303:    added,
 304:    changed,
 305:  }

assistant #613 commentary 02:45:55

位置我已经对上了，能明确告诉你现在终端里会出现哪一行。下面我就直接回答你的两个问题，不绕弯。

reasoning #614 02:46:04
Private reasoning captured; content is encrypted.

assistant #615 final_answer 02:46:17

是，但要分两层看：

如果只是新建一个普通仓库，然后跑 memorytree init / memorytree upgrade，不会碰真实 memory 分支。那两个命令只改仓库文件，不注册 heartbeat，也不改 ~/.memorytree/config.toml，[cmd-init.ts](/d:/demo1/memorytree-workflow/src/cli/cmd-init.ts#L82) 和 [cmd-upgrade.ts](/d:/demo1/memorytree-workflow/src/cli/cmd-upgrade.ts#L65) 的输出就是这么定义的。只有你对这个仓库执行了 memorytree daemon quick-start 或 memorytree daemon register，然后 heartbeat 真跑起来，才会去操作这个仓库对应的真实 memory_path worktree 和它的 memory_branch。所以不是“每建一个仓库自动就会遇到”，而是“每个被 quick-start/register 的仓库，都会按当前设计写它自己的真实 memory 分支”。这其实是当前产品设计，不是偶发 bug。顺便提醒一句：现在 auto_push=false 也只是“不 push”，本地 commit 还是会发生；如果你要完全不动真实 memory 分支，产品现在还缺一个真正的 dry-run/no-commit 模式。

.gitignore 这块现在我已经补成“会明确打印”。你之后在终端里会直接看到两种文案之一：
.gitignore updated: AGENTS.md, Memory/, memory/
或者
.gitignore already contains managed MemoryTree entries.
对应代码在 [cmd-daemon.ts](/d:/demo1/memorytree-workflow/src/cli/cmd-daemon.ts#L234)、[cmd-init.ts](/d:/demo1/memorytree-workflow/src/cli/cmd-init.ts#L82)、[cmd-upgrade.ts](/d:/demo1/memorytree-workflow/src/cli/cmd-upgrade.ts#L65)。quick-start 里你会在 Step 2 注册仓库那一段看到，因为它内部就是走 register。另外，当前仓库的忽略规则也已经在文件里了：[.gitignore](/d:/demo1/memorytree-workflow/.gitignore#L8)。

这次我顺手把相关测试也补了，test、typecheck、build 都过了。下一步如果你认可，我建议我们直接加一个真正的 --dry-run，这样以后新仓库第一次验证就不会碰真实 memory 分支。

token_count #616 02:46:18
total_tokens=9936418
total 9936418in 11099845out 123480reason 30450

是，但要分两层看： 如果只是新建一个普通仓库，然后跑 `memorytree init` / `memorytree upgrade`，不会碰真实 memory 分支。那两个命令只改仓库文件，不注册 heartbeat，也不改 `~/.memorytree/config.toml`，[cmd-init.ts](/d:/demo1/memorytree-workflow/src/cli/cmd-init.ts#L82) 和 [cmd-upgrade.ts](/d:/dem...
Show task summary

是，但要分两层看：

如果只是新建一个普通仓库，然后跑 memorytree init / memorytree upgrade，不会碰真实 memory 分支。那两个命令只改仓库文件，不注册 heartbeat，也不改 ~/.memorytree/config.toml，[cmd-init.ts](/d:/demo1/memorytree-workflow/src/cli/cmd-init.ts#L82) 和 [cmd-upgrade.ts](/d:/demo1/memorytree-workflow/src/cli/cmd-upgrade.ts#L65) 的输出就是这么定义的。只有你对这个仓库执行了 memorytree daemon quick-start 或 memorytree daemon register，然后 heartbeat 真跑起来，才会去操作这个仓库对应的真实 memory_path worktree 和它的 memory_branch。所以不是“每建一个仓库自动就会遇到”，而是“每个被 quick-start/register 的仓库，都会按当前设计写它自己的真实 memory 分支”。这其实是当前产品设计，不是偶发 bug。顺便提醒一句：现在 auto_push=false 也只是“不 push”，本地 commit 还是会发生；如果你要完全不动真实 memory 分支，产品现在还缺一个真正的 dry-run/no-commit 模式。

.gitignore 这块现在我已经补成“会明确打印”。你之后在终端里会直接看到两种文案之一：
.gitignore updated: AGENTS.md, Memory/, memory/
或者
.gitignore already contains managed MemoryTree entries.
对应代码在 [cmd-daemon.ts](/d:/demo1/memorytree-workflow/src/cli/cmd-daemon.ts#L234)、[cmd-init.ts](/d:/demo1/memorytree-workflow/src/cli/cmd-init.ts#L82)、[cmd-upgrade.ts](/d:/demo1/memorytree-workflow/src/cli/cmd-upgrade.ts#L65)。quick-start 里你会在 Step 2 注册仓库那一段看到，因为它内部就是走 register。另外，当前仓库的忽略规则也已经在文件里了：[.gitignore](/d:/demo1/memorytree-workflow/.gitignore#L8)。

这次我顺手把相关测试也补了，test、typecheck、build 都过了。下一步如果你认可，我建议我们直接加一个真正的 --dry-run，这样以后新仓库第一次验证就不会碰真实 memory 分支。

turn_context #619 02:48:09
model=gpt-5.4cwd=d:\demo1\memorytree-workflowcurrent_date=2026-03-25timezone=Asia/Shanghaiapproval_policy=never
Show context payload 
{
  "turn_id": "019d22e4-70c2-7a83-9f44-ae3a15025a1e",
  "cwd": "d:\\demo1\\memorytree-workflow",
  "current_date": "2026-03-25",
  "timezone": "Asia/Shanghai",
  "approval_policy": "never",
  "sandbox_policy": {
    "type": "danger-full-access"
  },
  "model": "gpt-5.4",
  "personality": "friendly",
  "collaboration_mode": {
    "mode": "default",
    "settings": {
      "model": "gpt-5.4",
      "reasoning_effort": "xhigh",
      "developer_instructions": "# Collaboration Mode: Default\r\n\r\nYou are now in Default mode. Any previous instructions for other modes (e.g. Plan mode) are no longer active.\r\n\r\nYour active mode changes only when new developer instructions with a different `<collaboration_mode>...</collaboration_mode>` change it; user requests or tool descriptions do not change mode by themselves. Known mode names are Default and Plan.\r\n\r\n## request_user_input availability\r\n\r\nThe `request_user_input` tool is unavailable in Default mode. If you call it while in Default mode, it will return an error.\r\n\r\nIn Default mode, strongly prefer making reasonable assumptions and executing the user's request rather than stopping to ask questions. If you absolutely must ask a question because the answer cannot be discovered from local context and a reasonable assumption would be risky, ask the user directly with a concise plain-text question. Never write a multiple choice question as a textual assistant message.\r\n"
    }
  },
  "realtime_active": false,
  "effort": "xhigh",
  "summary": "none",
  "user_instructions": "# AGENTS.md\n\n## Read Order\n- Read this file first.\n- Read the latest file in `Memory/01_goals/`.\n- Read the latest todo bound to that goal in `Memory/02_todos/`.\n- Read `Memory/04_knowledge/` only when needed.\n- Read `Memory/06_transcripts/clean/` and transcript manifests only when needed.\n- Read `Memory/03_chat_logs/` and `Memory/05_archive/` only when needed.\n\n## Memory Rules\n- Change the active goal only after explicit user confirmation of a requirement or scope change.\n- Keep the active todo synchronized with the active goal.\n- Append chat logs only. Never rewrite or delete prior entries.\n- Keep active files concise and move stale context to knowledge or archive files.\n- Treat cleaned transcript indexes as search aids. Confirm exact wording against the raw transcript archive when precision matters.\n\n## Transcript Rules\n- If transcript archival is enabled, archive transcripts by client, project, and session.\n- Keep raw transcripts in both this repository's `Memory/06_transcripts/raw/` mirror and the user-level MemoryTree archive.\n- Keep this repository mirror limited to transcripts that belong to the current project. Archive unrelated projects in the global MemoryTree archive only.\n- Generate cleaned transcript indexes with deterministic code, not model-generated rewriting.\n- Raw transcript upload permission for this repository: not set. Ask the user before the first raw transcript commit or push, then record the answer here.\n- If raw transcript uploads are not approved, keep `Memory/06_transcripts/raw/**` unstaged and commit only cleaned transcript indexes or manifests for this repository.\n\n## Git Rules\n- Obey this repository's branch, PR, CI, review, and release rules.\n- Auto-commit and push only MemoryTree-owned changes (`Memory/**` and this file when it is managed by MemoryTree), excluding `Memory/06_transcripts/raw/**` until raw transcript uploads are approved for this repository.\n- Use a MemoryTree-scoped commit title. Prefer `memorytree(<scope>): <subject>`, or the repository-required equivalent such as `docs(memorytree): <subject>`.\n- Use a dedicated branch and PR for MemoryTree-only changes. Enable auto-merge only when repository rules permit it.\n- If a diff includes product code, shared policy files, cross-project transcript files, or unclear ownership, stop and ask the user before staging or pushing.\n- When `auto_push` is enabled, the heartbeat process pushes automatically after committing. If no remote is configured or a push fails, an alert is written to `~/.memorytree/alerts.json`.\n\n## Heartbeat Rules\n- Transcript discovery, import, cleaning, and push are handled by the background heartbeat process. The model does not execute these operations.\n- The model only writes chat log summaries and updates goals and todos during interactive sessions.\n- If `~/.memorytree/alerts.json` contains pending notifications, display them at the start of the session.\n- If `memorytree-daemon` is available but not registered on this machine, ask the user for their preferred settings and offer to run `memorytree-daemon install`.\n- When the user asks to see their most recent conversation, trigger an on-demand sync for the current project, locate the latest session across all clients, and generate a continuation summary.\n- All interactive prompts must use plain-text questions. Do not rely on client-specific UI components.\n",
  "truncation_policy": {
    "mode": "tokens",
    "limit": 10000
  }
}
user #620 02:48:09

第一个问题 我不懂

token_count #621 02:48:14
total_tokens=9936418
total 9936418in 11099845out 123480reason 30450
assistant #622 final_answer 02:48:21

简单说：

会不会“改真实 memory 分支”，不取决于“你新建了一个仓库”，而取决于“你有没有对这个仓库执行 memorytree daemon quick-start 或 memorytree daemon register”。

分成 3 种情况就清楚了：

1. 只是新建仓库
不会改。

2. 只运行 memorytree init 或 memorytree upgrade
也不会改。
这两个只是创建/补齐 Memory/、AGENTS.md、.gitignore 这些仓库文件。

3. 运行了 memorytree daemon quick-start
会改。
因为它会：
先把这个仓库注册到 ~/.memorytree/config.toml
再创建/使用对应的 memory_path worktree
然后立刻跑一次 heartbeat
heartbeat 会在那个 worktree 里真实 commit
如果 auto_push=true，还会真实 push

所以你可以把它理解成：

init/upgrade = 只搭脚手架，不动 memory 分支
quick-start/register = 接入真实后台流程，会动 memory 分支

如果你愿意，我下一条可以直接用“新仓库从 0 到 quick-start”的时间线，给你画成 5 步。

total_tokens=10073995
total 10073995in 11237140out 124044reason 30450

简单说： 会不会“改真实 memory 分支”，不取决于“你新建了一个仓库”，而取决于“你有没有对这个仓库执行 `memorytree daemon quick-start` 或 `memorytree daemon register`”。 分成 3 种情况就清楚了： 1. 只是新建仓库 不会改。 2. 只运行 `memorytree init` 或 `memorytree upgrade` 也不会改。 这两个只是创建/补齐 `Memory/`、`AGENTS.md`、...

简单说：

会不会“改真实 memory 分支”，不取决于“你新建了一个仓库”，而取决于“你有没有对这个仓库执行 memorytree daemon quick-start 或 memorytree daemon register”。

分成 3 种情况就清楚了：

1. 只是新建仓库
不会改。

2. 只运行 memorytree init 或 memorytree upgrade
也不会改。
这两个只是创建/补齐 Memory/、AGENTS.md、.gitignore 这些仓库文件。

3. 运行了 memorytree daemon quick-start
会改。
因为它会：
先把这个仓库注册到 ~/.memorytree/config.toml
再创建/使用对应的 memory_path worktree
然后立刻跑一次 heartbeat
heartbeat 会在那个 worktree 里真实 commit
如果 auto_push=true，还会真实 push

所以你可以把它理解成：

init/upgrade = 只搭脚手架，不动 memory 分支
quick-start/register = 接入真实后台流程，会动 memory 分支

如果你愿意，我下一条可以直接用“新仓库从 0 到 quick-start”的时间线，给你画成 5 步。

user #627 02:48:21

请通俗的解读一下

token_count #628 02:48:23
total_tokens=10073995
total 10073995in 11237140out 124044reason 30450
assistant #629 final_answer 02:48:31

通俗版就是：

你家里有两个地方。

1. 你的项目文件夹
就是你平时写代码的地方，比如 D:\demo1\memorytree-workflow

2. MemoryTree 的“记忆仓库”
就是它专门拿来存记忆、转录、报告的地方，比如
C:\Users\ai\.memorytree\worktrees\memorytree-workflow-active

你运行 quick-start 以后，系统的意思不是“先试试看”，而是：

“好，这个项目我正式接管了。
以后这个项目的记忆，放到那个专门的记忆仓库里。
我现在立刻去那边跑一次正式同步。”

所以我说“会改真实 memory 分支”，意思就是：

它真的会去那个专门的记忆仓库里写东西、提交东西；
如果开着 auto_push=true，还会把这些提交推到远程。

不是改你现在开发代码的 main 分支。
但它也不是演习，不是假动作。

你可以这样记：

- init / upgrade 像“装修房间”
只是把目录、文件、规则准备好
不会真的开始往记忆仓库里存东西

- quick-start 像“正式启用这套系统”
一启用，就马上开始真正记账、真正入库

所以不是“每新建一个仓库都会自动发生”，而是：

“只要你对这个仓库执行了 quick-start，它就会进入正式运行模式”

如果你愿意，我下一条可以直接拿你这次这条命令
memorytree daemon quick-start --root .
按“它背后偷偷做了哪 4 件事”给你讲一遍。

total_tokens=10211976
total 10211976in 11374731out 124825reason 30450

user #634 02:49:49

对啊 但是我们现在新建了一个D:\demo1\kkk的项目，执行了memorytree daemon quick-start --root .这个，会影响本机这个skill吗

token_count #635 02:49:51
total_tokens=10211976
total 10211976in 11374731out 124825reason 30450
reasoning #636 02:50:02
Private reasoning captured; content is encrypted.

Private reasoning captured. Raw content is encrypted and not displayed.

assistant #637 commentary 02:50:04

我用“会不会动代码本体”和“会不会动这台机器的 MemoryTree 环境”这两个维度给你说清楚，不会太绕。

assistant #638 final_answer 02:50:16

不会影响“这个 skill 的代码本体”，但会影响“这台机器上的 MemoryTree 全局环境”。

通俗点说：

- C:\Users\ai\.codex\skills\memorytree-workflow
这是“工具本身”
像一个程序安装目录

- D:\demo1\kkk
这是“你要托管的新项目”

你在 D:\demo1\kkk 里执行：

memorytree daemon quick-start --root .

它做的是“把 kkk 接入这套工具”，不是“改这套工具本身”。

所以分开看：

1. 不会影响 skill 本体
不会去改 memorytree-workflow 这个 skill 的源码、规则、模板。
也不会把 kkk 变成这个 skill 仓库的一部分。

2. 会影响这台机器的全局 MemoryTree 配置
会往 ~/.memorytree/config.toml 里注册一个新项目 kkk
以后后台 heartbeat 会知道：
“这台机器上现在又多了一个要管的项目”

3. 会影响这台机器的全局 heartbeat 调度
如果你机器上还没装 scheduler，quick-start 会装
如果已经有了，一般复用
如果已有调度比 5m 慢，它可能会重装成 5m

4. 会给 kkk 创建它自己的 memory worktree
比如类似：

C:\Users\ai\.memorytree\worktrees\kkk-active

以后 kkk 的记忆提交，会进它自己的 memorytree 分支/worktree
不是进 memorytree-workflow 这个仓库

所以最准确的一句话是：

quick-start kkk 不会改 skill 本身，但会让这台机器“多托管一个项目 kkk”。

你可以把它理解成：

- skill = 管家这个人
- kkk = 新住户
- quick-start = 把新住户登记到管家名册里

不会把“管家本人”改掉
但会让“管家的工作名单”多一项

如果你愿意，我下一条可以直接画一个表，告诉你：
会被改的路径 和 不会被改的路径 分别有哪些。

token_count #639 02:50:16
total_tokens=10351071
total 10351071in 11512757out 126964reason 30966

所以分开看：

4. 会给 kkk 创建它自己的 memory worktree

所以最准确的一句话是：

quick-start kkk 不会改 skill 本身，但会让这台机器“多托管一个项目 kkk”。

你可以把它理解成：

- skill = 管家这个人
- kkk = 新住户
- quick-start = 把新住户登记到管家名册里

不会把“管家本人”改掉
但会让“管家的工作名单”多一项

如果你愿意，我下一条可以直接画一个表，告诉你：
会被改的路径 和 不会被改的路径 分别有哪些。

Any previous instructions for other modes (e.g. Plan mode) are no longer active.\r\n\r\nYour active mode changes only when new developer instructions with a different `<collaboration_mode>...</collaboration_mode>` change it; user requests or tool descriptions do not change mode by themselves. Known mode names are Default and Plan.\r\n\r\n## request_user_input availability\r\n\r\nThe `request_user_input` tool is unavailable in Default mode. If you call it while in Default mode, it will return an error.\r\n\r\nIn Default mode, strongly prefer making reasonable assumptions and executing the user's request rather than stopping to ask questions. If you absolutely must ask a question because the answer cannot be discovered from local context and a reasonable assumption would be risky, ask the user directly with a concise plain-text question. Never write a multiple choice question as a textual assistant message.\r\n"
    }
  },
  "realtime_active": false,
  "effort": "xhigh",
  "summary": "none",
  "user_instructions": "# AGENTS.md\n\n## Read Order\n- Read this file first.\n- Read the latest file in `Memory/01_goals/`.\n- Read the latest todo bound to that goal in `Memory/02_todos/`.\n- Read `Memory/04_knowledge/` only when needed.\n- Read `Memory/06_transcripts/clean/` and transcript manifests only when needed.\n- Read `Memory/03_chat_logs/` and `Memory/05_archive/` only when needed.\n\n## Memory Rules\n- Change the active goal only after explicit user confirmation of a requirement or scope change.\n- Keep the active todo synchronized with the active goal.\n- Append chat logs only. Never rewrite or delete prior entries.\n- Keep active files concise and move stale context to knowledge or archive files.\n- Treat cleaned transcript indexes as search aids. Confirm exact wording against the raw transcript archive when precision matters.\n\n## Transcript Rules\n- If transcript archival is enabled, archive transcripts by client, project, and session.\n- Keep raw transcripts in both this repository's `Memory/06_transcripts/raw/` mirror and the user-level MemoryTree archive.\n- Keep this repository mirror limited to transcripts that belong to the current project. Archive unrelated projects in the global MemoryTree archive only.\n- Generate cleaned transcript indexes with deterministic code, not model-generated rewriting.\n- Raw transcript upload permission for this repository: not set. Ask the user before the first raw transcript commit or push, then record the answer here.\n- If raw transcript uploads are not approved, keep `Memory/06_transcripts/raw/**` unstaged and commit only cleaned transcript indexes or manifests for this repository.\n\n## Git Rules\n- Obey this repository's branch, PR, CI, review, and release rules.\n- Auto-commit and push only MemoryTree-owned changes (`Memory/**` and this file when it is managed by MemoryTree), excluding `Memory/06_transcripts/raw/**` until raw transcript uploads are approved for this repository.\n- Use a MemoryTree-scoped commit title. Prefer `memorytree(<scope>): <subject>`, or the repository-required equivalent such as `docs(memorytree): <subject>`.\n- Use a dedicated branch and PR for MemoryTree-only changes. Enable auto-merge only when repository rules permit it.\n- If a diff includes product code, shared policy files, cross-project transcript files, or unclear ownership, stop and ask the user before staging or pushing.\n- When `auto_push` is enabled, the heartbeat process pushes automatically after committing. If no remote is configured or a push fails, an alert is written to `~/.memorytree/alerts.json`.\n\n## Heartbeat Rules\n- Transcript discovery, import, cleaning, and push are handled by the background heartbeat process. The model does not execute these operations.\n- The model only writes chat log summaries and updates goals and todos during interactive sessions.\n- If `~/.memorytree/alerts.json` contains pending notifications, display them at the start of the session.\n- If `memorytree-daemon` is available but not registered on this machine, ask the user for their preferred settings and offer to run `memorytree-daemon install`.\n- When the user asks to see their most recent conversation, trigger an on-demand sync for the current project, locate the latest session across all clients, and generate a continuation summary.\n- All interactive prompts must use plain-text questions. Do not rely on client-specific UI components.\n",
  "truncation_policy": {
    "mode": "tokens",
    "limit": 10000
  }
}

+const MAX_GIT_ADD_PATH_CHARS = 12_000
 
 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 // Main entry point
@@ -307,7 +308,7 @@ export function gitCommitAndPush(
     ? `memorytree(transcripts): import ${importedCount} transcript(s)`
     : 'memorytree(snapshot): heartbeat sync'
 
-  git(projectPath, 'add', '-A', '-f', '--', ...stageablePaths)
+  stageManagedPaths(projectPath, stageablePaths)
   git(projectPath, 'commit', '-m', commitMessage)
   if (importedCount > 0) {
     logger.info(`[${projectName}] Committed ${importedCount} transcript import(s).`)
@@ -420,6 +421,27 @@ function collectChangedManagedPaths(projectPath: string): string[] {
   ]
 }
 
+function stageManagedPaths(projectPath: string, stageablePaths: readonly string[]): void {
+  let batch: string[] = []
+  let batchChars = 0
+
+  for (const path of stageablePaths) {
+    const pathChars = path.length + 1
+    if (batch.length > 0 && batchChars + pathChars > MAX_GIT_ADD_PATH_CHARS) {
+      git(projectPath, 'add', '-A', '-f', '--', ...batch)
+      batch = []
+      batchChars = 0
+    }
+
+    batch.push(path)
+    batchChars += pathChars
+  }
+
+  if (batch.length > 0) {
+    git(projectPath, 'add', '-A', '-f', '--', ...batch)
+  }
+}
+
 function gitPathLines(projectPath: string, ...args: string[]): string[] {
   const output = git(projectPath, ...args)
   const paths: string[] = []
diff --git a/src/project/scaffold.ts b/src/project/scaffold.ts
index 8a5d49c..61c1439 100644
--- a/src/project/scaffold.ts
+++ b/src/project/scaffold.ts
@@ -21,6 +21,18 @@ export const MEMORY_DIRS: readonly string[] = [
   'Memory/05_archive',
 ]
 
+export const MANAGED_GITIGNORE_ENTRIES: readonly string[] = [
+  'AGENTS.md',
+  'Memory/**',
+  'memory/**',
+] as const
+
+export interface GitignoreEnsureResult {
+  readonly path: string
+  readonly added: readonly string[]
+  readonly changed: boolean
+}
+
 export const CONTENT_POLICY_SOURCE_PATTERNS: readonly string[] = [
   'CONTRIBUTING',
   'CONTRIBUTING.md',
@@ -251,6 +263,52 @@ export function writeTemplate(
   return true
 }
 
+export function ensureGitignoreEntries(root: string, entries: readonly string[]): GitignoreEnsureResult | null {
+  if (!existsSync(root) || !isDirectory(root)) return null
+
+  const gitignorePath = join(root, '.gitignore')
+  let existing = ''
+  if (existsSync(gitignorePath)) {
+    try {
+      existing = readFileSync(gitignorePath, 'utf-8')
+    } catch {
+      return null
+    }
+  }
+
+  const lines = existing.replace(/\r\n/g, '\n').split('\n')
+  if (lines.length > 0 && lines[lines.length - 1] === '') {
+    lines.pop()
+  }
+
+  const seen = new Set(lines.map(line => line.trim()))
+  const added: string[] = []
+  let changed = false
+
+  for (const entry of entries) {
+    const normalized = entry.trim()
+    if (!normalized || seen.has(normalized)) continue
+    lines.push(entry)
+    seen.add(normalized)
+    added.push(entry)
+    changed = true
+  }
+
+  if (changed) {
+    writeFileSync(gitignorePath, `${lines.join('\n')}\n`, 'utf-8')
+  }
+
+  return {
+    path: gitignorePath,
+    added,
+    changed,
+  }
+}
+
+export function ensureManagedGitignore(root: string): GitignoreEnsureResult | null {
+  return ensureGitignoreEntries(root, MANAGED_GITIGNORE_ENTRIES)
+}
+
 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 // Scaffold paths
 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
@@ -378,3 +436,7 @@ export function scaffoldContentFiles(
 function isFile(p: string): boolean {
   try { return statSync(p).isFile() } catch { return false }
 }
+
+function isDirectory(p: string): boolean {
+  try { return statSync(p).isDirectory() } catch { return false }
+}

+    expect(output).toContain('.gitignore')
     expect(output).toContain('did not register heartbeat')
     expect(output).toContain('memorytree daemon quick-start --root')
     expect(output).toContain('shared source of truth')
@@ -65,12 +70,17 @@ describe('cmdUpgrade', () => {
     expect(result).toBe(0)
     expect(existsSync(join(tmpDir, 'AGENTS.md'))).toBe(true)
     expect(existsSync(join(tmpDir, 'Memory', '01_goals', 'goal_v001_20250615.md'))).toBe(true)
+    const gitignore = readFileSync(join(tmpDir, '.gitignore'), 'utf-8')
+    expect(gitignore).toContain('AGENTS.md')
+    expect(gitignore).toContain('Memory/**')
+    expect(gitignore).toContain('memory/**')
 
     const output = stdout.mock.calls.map(call => String(call[0])).join('')
     const errorOutput = stderr.mock.calls.map(call => String(call[0])).join('')
     expect(output).toContain('"state_before":"not-installed"')
     expect(output).toContain('"state_after":"installed"')
     expect(errorOutput).toContain('This command updated repository files only.')
+    expect(errorOutput).toContain('.gitignore')
     expect(errorOutput).toContain('did not register heartbeat')
     expect(errorOutput).toContain('memorytree daemon quick-start --root')
     expect(errorOutput).toContain('shared source of truth')
@@ -97,6 +107,7 @@ describe('cmdUpgrade', () => {
 
     const output = stdout.mock.calls.map(call => String(call[0])).join('')
     expect(output).toContain('This command updated repository files only.')
+    expect(output).toContain('.gitignore')
     expect(output).toContain('did not register heartbeat')
     expect(output).toContain('memorytree daemon quick-start --root')
     expect(output).toContain('shared source of truth')
diff --git a/tests/heartbeat/branch-safety.test.ts b/tests/heartbeat/branch-safety.test.ts
index e5ae446..feb45db 100644
--- a/tests/heartbeat/branch-safety.test.ts
+++ b/tests/heartbeat/branch-safety.test.ts
@@ -287,4 +287,27 @@ describe('gitCommitAndPush raw transcript staging', () => {
     expect(mocks.git).not.toHaveBeenCalledWith('D:/repo', 'commit', '-m', 'memorytree(transcripts): import 1 transcript(s)')
     expect(mocks.git).not.toHaveBeenCalledWith('D:/repo', 'push')
   })
+
+  it('splits large staging sets across multiple git add calls', () => {
+    const manyPaths = Array.from({ length: 220 }, (_, index) =>
+      `Memory/06_transcripts/clean/codex/2024/01/session-${String(index).padStart(3, '0')}-` +
+      `${'x'.repeat(40)}.md`,
+    )
+
+    mocks.git.mockImplementation((_cwd: string, ...args: string[]) => {
+      if (args[0] === 'ls-files' && !args.includes('--ignored')) {
+        return manyPaths.join('\n') + '\n'
+      }
+      return ''
+    })
+
+    gitCommitAndPush({ auto_push: false } as never, 'D:/repo', 'demo-project', 0)
+
+    const addCalls = mocks.git.mock.calls.filter((call): call is [string, ...string[]] => call[1] === 'add')
+    expect(addCalls.length).toBeGreaterThan(1)
+
+    const stagedPaths = addCalls.flatMap(call => call.slice(5))
+    expect(stagedPaths).toEqual(manyPaths)
+    expect(mocks.git).toHaveBeenCalledWith('D:/repo', 'commit', '-m', 'memorytree(snapshot): heartbeat sync')
+  })
 })

assistant #692 final_answer 02:52:55

两轮 review 都过了：一轮看代码逻辑，一轮看测试和边界，没发现阻塞提交的问题。

已经推到 GitHub，分支是 main，提交是 0922e7e，提交信息是 fix(heartbeat): batch staging and surface gitignore status。

这次提交包含两块核心修改：一是修复 Windows 上 heartbeat git add 过长导致的 ENAMETOOLONG，二是让 init / upgrade / quick-start 明确输出 .gitignore 状态，并自动确保 AGENTS.md、Memory/、memory/ 的忽略规则存在。

我也重新跑过验证：vitest 相关测试、npm run typecheck、npm run build 都通过了。.claude/、docs/...、~/ 这些无关未跟踪内容没有被提交。

total 11227749in 12386616out 132605reason 32491

Show task summary

两轮 review 都过了：一轮看代码逻辑，一轮看测试和边界，没发现阻塞提交的问题。

已经推到 GitHub，分支是 main，提交是 0922e7e，提交信息是 fix(heartbeat): batch staging and surface gitignore status。

这次提交包含两块核心修改：一是修复 Windows 上 heartbeat git add 过长导致的 ENAMETOOLONG，二是让 init / upgrade / quick-start 明确输出 .gitignore 状态，并自动确保 AGENTS.md、Memory/、memory/ 的忽略规则存在。

我也重新跑过验证：vitest 相关测试、npm run typecheck、npm run build 都通过了。.claude/、docs/...、~/ 这些无关未跟踪内容没有被提交。

Any previous instructions for other modes (e.g. Plan mode) are no longer active.\r\n\r\nYour active mode changes only when new developer instructions with a different `<collaboration_mode>...</collaboration_mode>` change it; user requests or tool descriptions do not change mode by themselves. Known mode names are Default and Plan.\r\n\r\n## request_user_input availability\r\n\r\nThe `request_user_input` tool is unavailable in Default mode. If you call it while in Default mode, it will return an error.\r\n\r\nIn Default mode, strongly prefer making reasonable assumptions and executing the user's request rather than stopping to ask questions. If you absolutely must ask a question because the answer cannot be discovered from local context and a reasonable assumption would be risky, ask the user directly with a concise plain-text question. Never write a multiple choice question as a textual assistant message.\r\n"
    }
  },
  "realtime_active": false,
  "effort": "xhigh",
  "summary": "none",
  "user_instructions": "# AGENTS.md\n\n## Read Order\n- Read this file first.\n- Read the latest file in `Memory/01_goals/`.\n- Read the latest todo bound to that goal in `Memory/02_todos/`.\n- Read `Memory/04_knowledge/` only when needed.\n- Read `Memory/06_transcripts/clean/` and transcript manifests only when needed.\n- Read `Memory/03_chat_logs/` and `Memory/05_archive/` only when needed.\n\n## Memory Rules\n- Change the active goal only after explicit user confirmation of a requirement or scope change.\n- Keep the active todo synchronized with the active goal.\n- Append chat logs only. Never rewrite or delete prior entries.\n- Keep active files concise and move stale context to knowledge or archive files.\n- Treat cleaned transcript indexes as search aids. Confirm exact wording against the raw transcript archive when precision matters.\n\n## Transcript Rules\n- If transcript archival is enabled, archive transcripts by client, project, and session.\n- Keep raw transcripts in both this repository's `Memory/06_transcripts/raw/` mirror and the user-level MemoryTree archive.\n- Keep this repository mirror limited to transcripts that belong to the current project. Archive unrelated projects in the global MemoryTree archive only.\n- Generate cleaned transcript indexes with deterministic code, not model-generated rewriting.\n- Raw transcript upload permission for this repository: not set. Ask the user before the first raw transcript commit or push, then record the answer here.\n- If raw transcript uploads are not approved, keep `Memory/06_transcripts/raw/**` unstaged and commit only cleaned transcript indexes or manifests for this repository.\n\n## Git Rules\n- Obey this repository's branch, PR, CI, review, and release rules.\n- Auto-commit and push only MemoryTree-owned changes (`Memory/**` and this file when it is managed by MemoryTree), excluding `Memory/06_transcripts/raw/**` until raw transcript uploads are approved for this repository.\n- Use a MemoryTree-scoped commit title. Prefer `memorytree(<scope>): <subject>`, or the repository-required equivalent such as `docs(memorytree): <subject>`.\n- Use a dedicated branch and PR for MemoryTree-only changes. Enable auto-merge only when repository rules permit it.\n- If a diff includes product code, shared policy files, cross-project transcript files, or unclear ownership, stop and ask the user before staging or pushing.\n- When `auto_push` is enabled, the heartbeat process pushes automatically after committing. If no remote is configured or a push fails, an alert is written to `~/.memorytree/alerts.json`.\n\n## Heartbeat Rules\n- Transcript discovery, import, cleaning, and push are handled by the background heartbeat process. The model does not execute these operations.\n- The model only writes chat log summaries and updates goals and todos during interactive sessions.\n- If `~/.memorytree/alerts.json` contains pending notifications, display them at the start of the session.\n- If `memorytree-daemon` is available but not registered on this machine, ask the user for their preferred settings and offer to run `memorytree-daemon install`.\n- When the user asks to see their most recent conversation, trigger an on-demand sync for the current project, locate the latest session across all clients, and generate a continuation summary.\n- All interactive prompts must use plain-text questions. Do not rely on client-specific UI components.\n",
  "truncation_policy": {
    "mode": "tokens",
    "limit": 10000
  }
}

assistant #708 commentary 02:58:56

我先不猜，直接查两件事：你现在执行的 memorytree 命令到底指向哪里，以及它实际运行的代码里有没有 .gitignore 这条输出。这样能很快判断是“没有报错但功能没走到”，还是“你跑的不是刚更新后的版本”。

Source             : C:\Users\ai\AppData\Local\fnm_multishells\26576_1774407537245\memorytree.ps1
Visibility         : Public
ScriptBlock        : #!/usr/bin/env pwsh
                     $basedir=Split-Path $MyInvocation.MyCommand.Definition -Parent
                     
                     $exe=""
                     if ($PSVersionTable.PSVersion -lt "6.0" -or $IsWindows) {
                       # Fix case when both the Windows and Linux builds of Node
                       # are installed in the same directory
                       $exe=".exe"
                     }
                     $ret=0
                     if (Test-Path "$basedir/node$exe") {
                       # Support pipeline input
                       if ($MyInvocation.ExpectingInput) {
                         $input | & "$basedir/node$exe"  "$basedir/node_modules/memorytree-workflow/dist/cli.js" $args
                       } else {
                         & "$basedir/node$exe"  "$basedir/node_modules/memorytree-workflow/dist/cli.js" $args
                       }
                       $ret=$LASTEXITCODE
                     } else {
                       # Support pipeline input
                       if ($MyInvocation.ExpectingInput) {
                         $input | & "node$exe"  "$basedir/node_modules/memorytree-workflow/dist/cli.js" $args
                       } else {
                         & "node$exe"  "$basedir/node_modules/memorytree-workflow/dist/cli.js" $args
                       }
                       $ret=$LASTEXITCODE
                     }
                     exit $ret
                     
OutputType         : {}
ScriptContents     : #!/usr/bin/env pwsh
                     $basedir=Split-Path $MyInvocation.MyCommand.Definition -Parent
                     
                     $exe=""
                     if ($PSVersionTable.PSVersion -lt "6.0" -or $IsWindows) {
                       # Fix case when both the Windows and Linux builds of Node
                       # are installed in the same directory
                       $exe=".exe"
                     }
                     $ret=0
                     if (Test-Path "$basedir/node$exe") {
                       # Support pipeline input
                       if ($MyInvocation.ExpectingInput) {
                         $input | & "$basedir/node$exe"  "$basedir/node_modules/memorytree-workflow/dist/cli.js" $args
                       } else {
                         & "$basedir/node$exe"  "$basedir/node_modules/memorytree-workflow/dist/cli.js" $args
                       }
                       $ret=$LASTEXITCODE
                     } else {
                       # Support pipeline input
                       if ($MyInvocation.ExpectingInput) {
                         $input | & "node$exe"  "$basedir/node_modules/memorytree-workflow/dist/cli.js" $args
                       } else {
                         & "node$exe"  "$basedir/node_modules/memorytree-workflow/dist/cli.js" $args
                       }
                       $ret=$LASTEXITCODE
                     }
                     exit $ret

C:\Users\ai\.codex\skills\memorytree-workflow\dist\build-MIBOSHXY.js.map:1:{"version":3,"sources":["../src/report/build.ts","../src/report/stats.ts","../src/report/render/layout.ts","../src/report/render/css.ts","../src/report/render/charts.ts","../src/report/render/dashboard.ts","../src/report/tags.ts","../src/report/render/projects.ts","../src/report/render/transcript-list.ts","../src/report/render/transcript.ts","../src/report/render/markdown.ts","../src/report/render/toc.ts","../src/report/render/knowledge.ts","../src/report/render/goals.ts","../src/report/render/todos.ts","../src/report/render/archive.ts","../src/report/render/graph.ts","../src/report/render/search.ts","../src/report/render/links.ts","../src/report/render/rss.ts","../src/report/summarize.ts","../src/report/i18n/en.ts","../src/report/i18n/zh-CN.ts","../src/report/i18n/index.ts"],"sourcesContent":["/**\r\n * Report build orchestrator.\r\n * Generates a self-contained multi-page HTML website in Memory/07_reports/.\r\n */\r\n\r\nimport {\r\n  existsSync,\r\n  mkdirSync,\r\n  readdirSync,\r\n  readFileSync,\r\n  writeFileSync,\r\n  appendFileSync,\r\n  rmSync,\r\n} from 'node:fs'\r\nimport { basename, dirname, join } from 'node:path'\r\n\r\nimport type { BuildReportOptions } from '../types/report.js'\r\nimport type { ManifestEntry, ParsedTranscript, TranscriptEvent } from '../types/transcript.js'\r\nimport { parseTranscript } from '../transcript/parse.js'\r\nimport { computeStats, extractToolNames, accumulateToolCounts } from './stats.js'\r\nimport { renderDashboard } from './render/dashboard.js'\r\nimport { renderTranscriptList } from './render/transcript-list.js'\r\nimport { renderTranscript } from './render/transcript.js'\r\nimport type { RenderedMessage } from './render/transcript.js'\r\nimport { renderKnowledge } from './render/knowledge.js'\r\nimport { renderGoals } from './render/goals.js'\r\nimport { renderTodos } from './render/todos.js'\r\nimport { renderArchive } from './render/archive.js'\r\nimport { renderProjects } from './render/projects.js'\r\nimport { renderGraph } from './render/graph.js'\r\nimport { buildSearchIndex, renderSearchPage } from './render/search.js'\r\nimport { buildLinkGraph } from './render/links.js'\r\nimport { renderRssFeed } from './render/rss.js'\r\nimport { getSummary } from './summarize.js'\r\nimport type { SummaryOptions } from './summarize.js'\r\nimport { getTags } from './tags.js'\r\nimport { loadLocale } from './i18n/index.js'\r\nimport type { Translations } from './i18n/types.js'\r\nimport { getLogger } from '../heartbeat/log.js'\r\n\r\nconst DEFAULT_MODEL = 'claude-haiku-4-5-20251001'\r\n\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n// Main entry point\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n\r\nexport async function buildReport(options: BuildReportOptions): Promise<void> {\r\n  const { root, output } = options\r\n  const noAi = options.noAi ?? false\r\n  const model = options.model ?? DEFAULT_MODEL\r\n  const locale = options.locale ?? 'en'\r\n  const ghPagesBranch = options.ghPagesBranch ?? ''\r\n  const cname = options.cname ?? ''\r\n  const webhookUrl = options.webhookUrl ?? ''\r\n  const newSessionIds = options.newSessionIds ?? []\r\n  const reportBaseUrl = options.reportBaseUrl ?? ''\r\n  const extraManifestDirs = options.extraManifestDirs ?? []\r\n\r\n  // Cache lives outside the gitignored output dir so it survives rm -rf\r\n  const cacheDir = join(root, 'Memory', '.report-cache')\r\n\r\n  // Load translations\r\n  const t: Translations = loadLocale(locale)\r\n\r\n  clearOutputDir(output)\r\n\r\n  // Ensure output dirs exist\r\n  mkdirSync(output, { recursive: true })\r\n  mkdirSync(join(output, 'transcripts'), { recursive: true })\r\n  mkdirSync(join(output, 'goals'), { recursive: true })\r\n  mkdirSync(join(output, 'knowledge'), { recursive: true })\r\n  mkdirSync(join(output, 'todos'), { recursive: true })\r\n  mkdirSync(join(output, 'archive'), { recursive: true })\r\n  mkdirSync(join(output, 'projects'), { recursive: true })\r\n  mkdirSync(cacheDir, { recursive: true })\r\n\r\n  // Ensure Memory/07_reports is gitignored\r\n  ensureGitignore(root, 'Memory/07_reports/')\r\n\r\n  // Load all manifests (own project + extra registered projects)\r\n  const manifests = [\r\n    ...loadManifests(root),\r\n    ...extraManifestDirs.flatMap(dir => loadManifestsFromDir(dir)),\r\n  ]\r\n\r\n  // Build link graph from clean markdown\r\n  const linkGraph = buildLinkGraph(manifests, root)\r\n\r\n  // Accumulate tool counts while processing transcripts\r\n  let toolCounts: Record<string, number> = {}\r\n\r\n  // Summary options\r\n  const summaryOptions: SummaryOptions = { cacheDir, noAi, model }\r\n\r\n  // Process each transcript: parse → summarize → render → write → discard\r\n  const snippets: Record<string, string> = {}\r\n  const searchTexts: Record<string, string> = {}\r\n  const summaries: Record<string, string> = {}\r\n  const summaryPromises: Array<Promise<void>> = []\r\n\r\n  for (const m of manifests) {\r\n    const parsedTranscript = loadStructuredTranscript(m, root)\r\n    const messages = parsedTranscript\r\n      ? parsedTranscript.messages.map(toRenderedMessage)\r\n      : parseCleanMarkdownMessages(m, root)\r\n    const events = parsedTranscript?.events ?? []\r\n\r\n    if (events.length > 0) {\r\n      toolCounts = accumulateToolCounts(toolCounts, extractToolNamesFromEvents(events))\r\n    } else {\r\n      const rawPath = resolveRawPath(m, root)\r\n      if (rawPath && existsSync(rawPath)) {\r\n      try {\r\n        const toolSummaries = extractToolSummariesFromRaw(rawPath, m.client)\r\n        const names = extractToolNames(toolSummaries)\r\n        toolCounts = accumulateToolCounts(toolCounts, names)\r\n      } catch {\r\n        // Skip if raw parsing fails\r\n      }\r\n      }\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    const firstMsg = messages[0]\r\n    snippets[m.session_id] = firstMsg ? firstMsg.text.slice(0, 300) : snippetFromEvents(events)\r\n    searchTexts[m.session_id] = buildSearchText(messages, events)\r\n\r\n    // Summarize + render (deferred to allow parallel API calls)\r\n    const manifest = m\r\n    const msgs = messages\r\n    const transcriptEvents = events\r\n    summaryPromises.push(\r\n      (async () => {\r\n        try {\r\n        const summary = await getSummary(manifest.raw_sha256, msgs, summaryOptions)\r\n        summaries[manifest.session_id] = summary\r\n        const backlinkIds = linkGraph.backlinks[manifest.session_id] ?? []\r\n        const backlinkManifests = backlinkIds\r\n          .map(id => manifests.find(x => x.session_id === id))\r\n          .filter((x): x is ManifestEntry => x !== undefined)\r\n\r\n        const html = renderTranscript(\r\n          msgs,\r\n          manifest,\r\n          summary,\r\n          backlinkManifests,\r\n          t,\r\n          reportBaseUrl,\r\n          transcriptEvents,\r\n        )\r\n        const outPath = transcriptOutputPath(output, manifest)\r\n        mkdirSync(dirname(outPath), { recursive: true })\r\n        writeFileSync(outPath, html, 'utf-8')\r\n        } catch (err: unknown) {\r\n          // eslint-disable-next-line no-console\r\n          getLogger().warn(`[build] Failed to render ${manifest.session_id}: ${String(err)}`)\r\n        }\r\n      })(),\r\n    )\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  // Wait for all transcript renders (parallel, bounded by semaphore in summarize.ts)\r\n  await Promise.all(summaryPromises)\r\n\r\n  // Extract tags in parallel (after summaries are ready)\r\n  const tagOptions = { cacheDir, noAi, model }\r\n  const tags: Record<string, string[]> = {}\r\n  await Promise.all(\r\n    manifests.map(async m => {\r\n      const summary = summaries[m.session_id] ?? ''\r\n      tags[m.session_id] = await getTags(m.raw_sha256, summary, tagOptions)\r\n    }),\r\n  )\r\n\r\n  // Compute final stats with accumulated tool counts\r\n  const stats = computeStats(manifests, toolCounts)\r\n\r\n  // Load markdown content for various pages\r\n  const goalFiles = loadMarkdownFiles(join(root, 'Memory', '01_goals'))\r\n  const todoFiles = loadMarkdownFiles(join(root, 'Memory', '02_todos'))\r\n  const knowledgeFiles = loadMarkdownFiles(join(root, 'Memory', '04_knowledge'))\r\n  const archiveFiles = loadMarkdownFiles(join(root, 'Memory', '05_archive'))\r\n\r\n  // Dashboard\r\n  writeFileSync(join(output, 'index.html'), renderDashboard(stats, manifests, t), 'utf-8')\r\n\r\n  // Session list\r\n  writeFileSync(\r\n    join(output, 'transcripts', 'index.html'),\r\n    renderTranscriptList(manifests, t, summaries, tags),\r\n    'utf-8',\r\n  )\r\n\r\n  // Goals page\r\n  writeFileSync(\r\n    join(output, 'goals', 'index.html'),\r\n    renderGoals(goalFiles, t),\r\n    'utf-8',\r\n  )\r\n\r\n  // Knowledge page\r\n  writeFileSync(\r\n    join(output, 'knowledge', 'index.html'),\r\n    renderKnowledge(knowledgeFiles, t),\r\n    'utf-8',\r\n  )\r\n\r\n  // Todos page\r\n  writeFileSync(\r\n    join(output, 'todos', 'index.html'),\r\n    renderTodos(todoFiles, t),\r\n    'utf-8',\r\n  )\r\n\r\n  // Archive page\r\n  writeFileSync(\r\n    join(output, 'archive', 'index.html'),\r\n    renderArchive(archiveFiles, t),\r\n    'utf-8',\r\n  )\r\n\r\n  // Projects page\r\n  writeFileSync(\r\n    join(output, 'projects', 'index.html'),\r\n    renderProjects(manifests, t),\r\n    'utf-8',\r\n  )\r\n\r\n  // Knowledge graph\r\n  writeFileSync(\r\n    join(output, 'graph.html'),\r\n    renderGraph(manifests, knowledgeFiles, linkGraph, t),\r\n    'utf-8',\r\n  )\r\n\r\n  // Search\r\n  const searchIndex = buildSearchIndex(\r\n    manifests,\r\n    m => snippets[m.session_id] ?? '',\r\n    m => searchTexts[m.session_id] ?? snippets[m.session_id] ?? '',\r\n  )\r\n  writeFileSync(join(output, 'search.html'), renderSearchPage(searchIndex, t), 'utf-8')\r\n\r\n  // RSS Feed\r\n  writeFileSync(join(output, 'feed.xml'), renderRssFeed(manifests, summaries, reportBaseUrl), 'utf-8')\r\n\r\n  // GitHub Pages deployment (non-blocking on failure)\r\n  if (ghPagesBranch) {\r\n    try {\r\n      const { deployGithubPages } = await import('./deploy/github-pages.js')\r\n      await deployGithubPages({ repoRoot: root, outputDir: output, branch: ghPagesBranch, cname })\r\n    } catch {\r\n      // Logged inside deployGithubPages\r\n    }\r\n  } else if (cname) {\r\n    // Write CNAME even without deploy (writeFileSync already imported at top)\r\n    writeFileSync(join(output, 'CNAME'), cname + '\\n', 'utf-8')\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  // Webhook notification (non-blocking on failure)\r\n  if (webhookUrl) {\r\n    try {\r\n      const { sendWebhook } = await import('./deploy/webhook.js')\r\n      await sendWebhook({\r\n        url: webhookUrl,\r\n        sessionCount: manifests.length,\r\n        newSessionIds,\r\n      })\r\n    } catch {\r\n      // Logged inside sendWebhook\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n}\r\n\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n// Manifest loading\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n\r\nfunction loadManifests(root: string): ManifestEntry[] {\r\n  const manifestsDir = join(root, 'Memory', '06_transcripts', 'manifests')\r\n  return loadManifestsFromDir(manifestsDir)\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction loadManifestsFromDir(manifestsDir: string): ManifestEntry[] {\r\n  if (!existsSync(manifestsDir)) return []\r\n  const manifests: ManifestEntry[] = []\r\n  loadManifestsRecursive(manifestsDir, manifests)\r\n  return manifests\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction loadManifestsRecursive(dir: string, out: ManifestEntry[]): void {\r\n  let entries: string[]\r\n  try {\r\n    entries = readdirSync(dir)\r\n  } catch {\r\n    return\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  for (const entry of entries) {\r\n    const fullPath = join(dir, entry)\r\n    if (entry.endsWith('.json')) {\r\n      try {\r\n        const raw = readFileSync(fullPath, 'utf-8')\r\n        const parsed: unknown = JSON.parse(raw)\r\n        if (\r\n          parsed !== null &&\r\n          typeof parsed === 'object' &&\r\n          typeof (parsed as Record<string, unknown>)['session_id'] === 'string' &&\r\n          typeof (parsed as Record<string, unknown>)['client'] === 'string'\r\n        ) {\r\n          out.push(parsed as ManifestEntry)\r\n        }\r\n      } catch {\r\n        // Skip malformed manifests\r\n      }\r\n    } else {\r\n      // Recurse into subdirectories\r\n      loadManifestsRecursive(fullPath, out)\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n}\r\n\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n// Clean markdown message parsing\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n\r\n/** Parse messages from a clean markdown file. */\r\nexport function parseCleanMarkdownMessages(m: ManifestEntry, root: string): RenderedMessage[] {\r\n  const repoPath = m.repo_clean_path ? join(root, m.repo_clean_path) : null\r\n  const cleanPath = (repoPath && existsSync(repoPath)) ? repoPath : m.global_clean_path\r\n  if (!cleanPath || !existsSync(cleanPath)) return []\r\n\r\n  let content: string\r\n  try {\r\n    content = readFileSync(cleanPath, 'utf-8')\r\n  } catch {\r\n    return []\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  return parseMessagesFromMarkdown(content)\r\n}\r\n\r\n/** Extract role/timestamp/text from clean markdown format. */\r\nexport function parseMessagesFromMarkdown(content: string): RenderedMessage[] {\r\n  const messages: RenderedMessage[] = []\r\n\r\n  // Find ## Messages section\r\n  const msgSection = content.indexOf('\\n## Messages')\r\n  if (msgSection === -1) return []\r\n\r\n  const body = content.slice(msgSection + 12) // after \"## Messages\\n\"\r\n\r\n  // Split on ### N. role headers\r\n  const msgRe = /^### \\d+\\.\\s+(\\w+)/gm\r\n  let match: RegExpExecArray | null\r\n  const starts: Array<{ index: number; role: string }> = []\r\n\r\n  while ((match = msgRe.exec(body)) !== null) {\r\n    starts.push({ index: match.index, role: match[1] ?? 'unknown' })\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  for (let i = 0; i < starts.length; i++) {\r\n    const start = starts[i]\r\n    if (!start) continue\r\n    const nextStart = starts[i + 1]\r\n    const chunk = nextStart\r\n      ? body.slice(start.index, nextStart.index)\r\n      : body.slice(start.index)\r\n\r\n    const lines = chunk.split('\\n')\r\n    // First line is the header, second may be timestamp\r\n    let timestamp = ''\r\n    const textLines: string[] = []\r\n    let pastHeader = false\r\n\r\n    for (const line of lines) {\r\n      if (!pastHeader && line.startsWith('### ')) {\r\n        pastHeader = true\r\n        continue\r\n      }\r\n      if (!pastHeader) continue\r\n      const tsMatch = line.match(/^- Timestamp:\\s*`([^`]+)`/)\r\n      if (tsMatch && !timestamp) {\r\n        timestamp = tsMatch[1] ?? ''\r\n        continue\r\n      }\r\n      textLines.push(line)\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    // Remove leading/trailing blank lines from text\r\n    const text = textLines.join('\\n').trim()\r\n    if (text || timestamp) {\r\n      messages.push({ role: start.role, timestamp, text })\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  return messages\r\n}\r\n\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n// Raw transcript tool extraction\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n\r\n/** Best-effort extraction of tool event summaries from a raw JSONL file. */\r\nfunction extractToolSummariesFromRaw(rawPath: string, _client: string): string[] {\r\n  const summaries: string[] = []\r\n  let content: string\r\n  try {\r\n    content = readFileSync(rawPath, 'utf-8')\r\n  } catch {\r\n    return []\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  for (const line of content.split('\\n')) {\r\n    const trimmed = line.trim()\r\n    if (!trimmed) continue\r\n    try {\r\n      const record = JSON.parse(trimmed) as Record<string, unknown>\r\n      // Codex: function_call type\r\n      const type = record['type'] as string | undefined\r\n      if (type === 'function_call' || type === 'custom_tool_call') {\r\n        const name = (record['name'] as string | undefined) ?? type\r\n        summaries.push(name)\r\n        continue\r\n      }\r\n      // Claude: tool_use content blocks\r\n      const payload = record['message'] as Record<string, unknown> | undefined\r\n      const content2 = (payload?.['content'] ?? record['content']) as unknown[] | undefined\r\n      if (Array.isArray(content2)) {\r\n        for (const block of content2) {\r\n          if (\r\n            block !== null &&\r\n            typeof block === 'object' &&\r\n            (block as Record<string, unknown>)['type'] === 'tool_use'\r\n          ) {\r\n            const name = ((block as Record<string, unknown>)['name'] as string | undefined) ?? 'tool_use'\r\n            summaries.push(name)\r\n          }\r\n        }\r\n      }\r\n    } catch {\r\n      // Skip malformed lines\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  return summaries\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction extractToolNamesFromEvents(events: TranscriptEvent[]): string[] {\r\n  return events\r\n    .filter((event): event is Extract<TranscriptEvent, { kind: 'tool_call' }> => event.kind === 'tool_call')\r\n    .map(event => event.tool_name)\r\n}\r\n\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n// Output path helpers\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n\r\nfunction transcriptOutputPath(output: string, m: ManifestEntry): string {\r\n  const cleanPath = m.repo_clean_path || m.global_clean_path || ''\r\n  const stem = cleanPath ? basename(cleanPath, '.md') : m.session_id\r\n  return join(output, 'transcripts', m.client, `${stem}.html`)\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction resolveRawPath(m: ManifestEntry, root: string): string | null {\r\n  if (m.repo_raw_path) {\r\n    const repoPath = join(root, m.repo_raw_path)\r\n    if (existsSync(repoPath)) return repoPath\r\n  }\r\n  if (m.global_raw_path) {\r\n    return m.global_raw_path\r\n  }\r\n  return null\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction resolveFullPath(m: ManifestEntry, root: string): string | null {\r\n  if (m.repo_full_path) {\r\n    const repoPath = join(root, m.repo_full_path)\r\n    if (existsSync(repoPath)) return repoPath\r\n  }\r\n  if (m.global_full_path && existsSync(m.global_full_path)) {\r\n    return m.global_full_path\r\n  }\r\n  const derivedRepoPath = deriveFullPathFromCleanPath(m.repo_clean_path ? join(root, m.repo_clean_path) : '')\r\n  if (derivedRepoPath) {\r\n    return derivedRepoPath\r\n  }\r\n  const derivedGlobalPath = deriveFullPathFromCleanPath(m.global_clean_path)\r\n  if (derivedGlobalPath) {\r\n    return derivedGlobalPath\r\n  }\r\n  return null\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction loadNormalizedTranscript(m: ManifestEntry, root: string): ParsedTranscript | null {\r\n  const fullPath = resolveFullPath(m, root)\r\n  if (!fullPath) return null\r\n\r\n  try {\r\n    const raw = readFileSync(fullPath, 'utf-8')\r\n    const parsed = JSON.parse(raw) as Record<string, unknown>\r\n    if (\r\n      !Array.isArray(parsed['messages']) ||\r\n      !Array.isArray(parsed['tool_events']) ||\r\n      !Array.isArray(parsed['events'])\r\n    ) {\r\n      return null\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    return {\r\n      client: String(parsed['client'] ?? m.client) as ParsedTranscript['client'],\r\n      session_id: String(parsed['session_id'] ?? m.session_id),\r\n      title: String(parsed['title'] ?? m.title),\r\n      started_at: String(parsed['started_at'] ?? m.started_at),\r\n      cwd: String(parsed['cwd'] ?? m.cwd),\r\n      branch: String(parsed['branch'] ?? m.branch),\r\n      messages: parsed['messages'] as ParsedTranscript['messages'],\r\n      tool_events: parsed['tool_events'] as ParsedTranscript['tool_events'],\r\n      events: parsed['events'] as ParsedTranscript['events'],\r\n      source_path: String(parsed['source_path'] ?? m.raw_source_path),\r\n    }\r\n  } catch {\r\n    return null\r\n  }\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction loadStructuredTranscript(m: Manife…161116 tokens assistant #716 commentary 02:59:18

我已经定位到原因了，而且不是你看漏了。现在这个 memorytree 命令，跑的不是我们刚刚提交到 GitHub 的这份仓库代码。下一步我把“它实际跑的是哪份代码”再确认一下，这样你就能知道为什么终端里没有那条 .gitignore 提示。
