C:\Users\ai\AppData\Local\fnm_multishells\42600_1774407559122\node_modules\memorytree-workflow\dist\cmd-daemon-GSFIGIE3.js.map:1:{"version":3,"sources":["../src/cli/cmd-daemon.ts"],"sourcesContent":["/**\r\n * CLI: memorytree daemon install|uninstall|run-once|watch|status\r\n * Port of scripts/memorytree_daemon.py\r\n */\r\n\r\nimport { existsSync, mkdirSync, readFileSync, writeFileSync, unlinkSync } from 'node:fs'\r\nimport { homedir } from 'node:os'\r\nimport { basename, dirname, resolve } from 'node:path'\r\nimport { platform } from 'node:process'\r\nimport { fileURLToPath } from 'node:url'\r\n\r\nimport {\r\n  DEFAULT_MEMORY_BRANCH,\r\n  DEFAULT_RAW_UPLOAD_PERMISSION,\r\n  configPath,\r\n  findProjectForPath,\r\n  intervalToSeconds,\r\n  loadConfig,\r\n  normalizeRawUploadPermission,\r\n  saveConfig,\r\n  upsertProject,\r\n} from '../heartbeat/config.js'\r\nimport { readLockPid } from '../heartbeat/lock.js'\r\nimport {\n  describePushRemote,\n  defaultProjectWorktreePath,\n  defaultProjectWorktreeBranch,\n  ensureBranchUpstream,\n  ensureProjectWorktree,\n  isValidWorktreeBranchName,\n  redactRemoteUrl,\n} from '../heartbeat/worktree.js'\nimport { execCommand } from '../utils/exec.js'\r\n\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n// Constants\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n\r\nconst TASK_NAME = 'MemoryTree Heartbeat'\r\nconst LAUNCHD_LABEL = 'com.memorytree.heartbeat'\r\nconst QUICK_START_HEARTBEAT_INTERVAL = '5m'\r\n\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n// Subcommands\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n\r\nexport function cmdInstall(options: { interval?: string; autoPush?: string }): number {\r\n  let config = loadConfig()\r\n\r\n  if (options.interval) {\r\n    config = { ...config, heartbeat_interval: options.interval }\r\n  }\r\n  if (options.autoPush) {\r\n    config = { ...config, auto_push: options.autoPush === 'true' }\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  saveConfig(config)\r\n  const seconds = intervalToSeconds(config.heartbeat_interval)\r\n  const scriptPath = heartbeatScriptPath()\r\n\r\n  const sys = platform\r\n  if (sys === 'linux') return installCron(scriptPath, seconds)\r\n  if (sys === 'darwin') return installLaunchd(scriptPath, seconds)\r\n  if (sys === 'win32') return installSchtasks(scriptPath, seconds)\r\n\r\n  process.stderr.write(`Unsupported platform: ${sys}\\n`)\r\n  return 1\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport function cmdUninstall(): number {\r\n  const sys = platform\r\n  if (sys === 'linux') return uninstallCron()\r\n  if (sys === 'darwin') return uninstallLaunchd()\r\n  if (sys === 'win32') return uninstallSchtasks()\r\n\r\n  process.stderr.write(`Unsupported platform: ${sys}\\n`)\r\n  return 1\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport async function cmdRunOnce(options: { root?: string; force?: boolean } = {}): Promise<number> {\r\n  const { main } = await import('../heartbeat/heartbeat.js')\r\n  return main(options)\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport async function cmdWatch(options: { interval?: string }): Promise<number> {\r\n  const config = loadConfig()\r\n  const intervalStr = options.interval ?? config.heartbeat_interval\r\n  const seconds = intervalToSeconds(intervalStr)\r\n  const { main } = await import('../heartbeat/heartbeat.js')\r\n\r\n  process.stdout.write(`Watch mode: running heartbeat every ${seconds}s. Press Ctrl+C to stop.\\n`)\r\n  try {\r\n    // eslint-disable-next-line no-constant-condition\r\n    while (true) {\r\n      await main()\r\n      await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, seconds * 1000))\r\n    }\r\n  } catch {\r\n    process.stdout.write('\\nWatch mode stopped.\\n')\r\n  }\r\n  return 0\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport function cmdStatus(): number {\r\n  const registered = isHeartbeatRegistered()\r\n\r\n  const sys = platform\r\n  const platformName = sys === 'darwin' ? 'Darwin' : sys === 'win32' ? 'Windows' : 'Linux'\r\n  process.stdout.write(`Platform:   ${platformName}\\n`)\r\n  process.stdout.write(`Registered: ${registered ? 'yes' : 'no'}\\n`)\r\n\r\n  const pid = readLockPid()\r\n  if (pid !== null) {\r\n    process.stdout.write(`Lock:       held by PID ${pid}\\n`)\r\n  } else {\r\n    process.stdout.write('Lock:       not held\\n')\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  if (existsSync(configPath())) {\r\n    const config = loadConfig()\r\n    process.stdout.write(`Interval:   ${config.heartbeat_interval}\\n`)\r\n    process.stdout.write(`Auto-push:  ${config.auto_push}\\n`)\r\n    process.stdout.write(`Projects:   ${config.projects.length}\\n`)\r\n  } else {\r\n    process.stdout.write('Config:     not found (using defaults)\\n')\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  return 0\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport function isHeartbeatRegistered(): boolean {\r\n  const sys = platform\r\n  if (sys === 'linux') return isCronRegistered()\r\n  if (sys === 'darwin') return isLaunchdRegistered()\r\n  if (sys === 'win32') return isSchtasksRegistered()\r\n  return false\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport function cmdRegisterProject(options: {\r\n  root: string\r\n  name?: string\r\n  worktree?: string\r\n  branch?: string\r\n  quickStart?: boolean\r\n  heartbeatInterval?: string\r\n  autoPush?: string\r\n  generateReport?: string\r\n  reportPort?: string\r\n  rawUploadPermission?: string\r\n}): number {\r\n  const root = resolve(options.root)\r\n  const config = loadConfig()\r\n  const existingProject = findProjectForPath(config, root)\r\n\r\n  if (options.quickStart && options.branch !== undefined) {\r\n    process.stderr.write('Quick Start uses the default memorytree branch. Omit --branch to customize it.\\n')\r\n    return 1\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  const requestedBranch = options.quickStart\r\n    ? existingProject?.memory_branch ?? defaultProjectWorktreeBranch()\r\n    : options.branch ?? existingProject?.memory_branch ?? DEFAULT_MEMORY_BRANCH\r\n  if (!isValidWorktreeBranchName(requestedBranch)) {\r\n    process.stderr.write(`Invalid MemoryTree branch name: ${requestedBranch}\\n`)\r\n    return 1\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  const heartbeatInterval = options.quickStart\r\n    ? existingProject?.heartbeat_interval ?? QUICK_START_HEARTBEAT_INTERVAL\r\n    : options.heartbeatInterval ?? existingProject?.heartbeat_interval ?? config.heartbeat_interval\r\n  const autoPush = options.quickStart\r\n    ? existingProject?.auto_push ?? true\r\n    : parseOptionalBoolean(options.autoPush) ?? existingProject?.auto_push ?? config.auto_push\r\n  const generateReport = options.quickStart\r\n    ? existingProject?.generate_report ?? true\r\n    : parseOptionalBoolean(options.generateReport) ?? existingProject?.generate_report ?? config.generate_report\r\n  const rawUploadPermission = options.quickStart\r\n    ? existingProject?.raw_upload_permission ?? DEFAULT_RAW_UPLOAD_PERMISSION\r\n    : options.rawUploadPermission !== undefined\r\n      ? parseRawUploadPermissionOption(options.rawUploadPermission)\r\n      : existingProject?.raw_upload_permission ?? DEFAULT_RAW_UPLOAD_PERMISSION\r\n  if (rawUploadPermission === null) {\r\n    process.stderr.write('Invalid raw upload permission. Use not-set, approved, or denied.\\n')\r\n    return 1\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  const requestedPort = options.reportPort ? parseInt(options.reportPort, 10) : NaN\r\n  const reportPort = Number.isInteger(requestedPort) && requestedPort > 0 && requestedPort <= 65535\r\n    ? requestedPort\r\n    : existingProject?.report_port ?? config.report_port\r\n\r\n  const updated = upsertProject(config, root, {\r\n    name: options.name ?? existingProject?.name ?? basename(root),\r\n    development_path: root,\r\n    memory_path: options.worktree\r\n      ? resolve(options.worktree)\r\n      : existingProject?.memory_path ?? defaultProjectWorktreePath(root),\r\n    memory_branch: requestedBranch,\r\n    heartbeat_interval: heartbeatInterval,\r\n    auto_push: autoPush,\r\n    generate_report: generateReport,\r\n    report_port: reportPort,\r\n    raw_upload_permission: rawUploadPermission,\r\n  })\r\n\r\n  const project = findProjectForPath(updated, root)\r\n  if (!project) {\r\n    process.stderr.write(`Failed to register project: ${root}\\n`)\r\n    return 1\r\n  }\r\n\n  const worktree = ensureProjectWorktree(project)\n  saveConfig(updated)\n  const pushRemote = describePushRemote(project.memory_path)\n  let upstream: ReturnType<typeof ensureBranchUpstream> | null = null\n  let upstreamError = ''\n  if (project.auto_push) {\n    try {\n      upstream = ensureBranchUpstream(project.memory_path, worktree.branch)\n    } catch (error: unknown) {\r\n      upstreamError = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error)\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  process.stdout.write(`Registered project: ${project.name}\\n`)\r\n  process.stdout.write(`Development path: ${project.development_path}\\n`)\r\n  process.stdout.write(`Memory path: ${project.memory_path}\\n`)\r\n  process.stdout.write(`Memory branch: ${project.memory_branch}\\n`)\r\n  process.stdout.write(`Heartbeat interval: ${project.heartbeat_interval}\\n`)\r\n  process.stdout.write(`Auto-push: ${project.auto_push}\\n`)\r\n  process.stdout.write(`Generate report: ${project.generate_report}\\n`)\n  process.stdout.write(`Raw upload permission: ${project.raw_upload_permission}\\n`)\n  process.stdout.write(`Worktree branch: ${worktree.branch}\\n`)\n  process.stdout.write(`Worktree created: ${worktree.created ? 'yes' : 'no'}\\n`)\n  process.stdout.write(`Push remote: ${pushRemote.remote ?? 'none'}\\n`)\n  if (pushRemote.pushUrl !== null) {\n    process.stdout.write(`Push URL: ${redactRemoteUrl(pushRemote.pushUrl)}\\n`)\n  }\n  if (upstreamError) {\n    process.stderr.write(`Upstream configured: failed (${upstreamError})\\n`)\n  } else if (upstream === null) {\n    process.stdout.write('Upstream configured: skipped (auto_push disabled)\\n')\n  } else if (upstream.remote === null) {\n    process.stdout.write('Upstream configured: no remote available\\n')\n  } else {\n    process.stdout.write(`Upstream configured: ${upstream.created ? 'yes' : 'already'} (${upstream.remote}/${worktree.branch})\\n`)\n    if (upstream.usedFallback && upstream.pushUrl !== null) {\n      process.stdout.write(`Push fallback used: ${redactRemoteUrl(upstream.pushUrl)}\\n`)\n    }\n  }\n  return upstreamError ? 1 : 0\n}\n\r\nfunction parseRawUploadPermissionOption(value: string): 'not-set' | 'approved' | 'denied' | null {\r\n  const normalized = normalizeRawUploadPermission(value, DEFAULT_RAW_UPLOAD_PERMISSION)\r\n  return normalized === DEFAULT_RAW_UPLOAD_PERMISSION && value.trim().toLowerCase() !== DEFAULT_RAW_UPLOAD_PERMISSION\r\n    ? null\r\n    : normalized\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport async function cmdQuickStart(options: {\r\n  root: string\r\n  name?: string\r\n}): Promise<number> {\r\n  const root = resolve(options.root)\r\n  const config = loadConfig()\r\n  const quickStartSeconds = intervalToSeconds(QUICK_START_HEARTBEAT_INTERVAL)\r\n  const schedulerIntervalSeconds = registeredHeartbeatIntervalSeconds()\r\n  const effectiveSchedulerSeconds = schedulerIntervalSeconds ?? intervalToSeconds(config.heartbeat_interval)\r\n  const effectiveSchedulerLabel = schedulerIntervalSeconds === null\r\n    ? config.heartbeat_interval\r\n    : formatIntervalSeconds(schedulerIntervalSeconds)\r\n\r\n  process.stdout.write('Quick Start: prepare scheduler, register this repository in the single-source memory flow, and run one sync now.\\n')\r\n\r\n  if (!isHeartbeatRegistered()) {\r\n    process.stdout.write('Step 1/3: installing heartbeat scheduler with recommended defaults.\\n')\r\n    const installResult = cmdInstall({ interval: QUICK_START_HEARTBEAT_INTERVAL, autoPush: 'true' })\r\n    if (installResult !== 0) {\r\n      return installResult\r\n    }\r\n  } else if (effectiveSchedulerSeconds > quickStartSeconds) {\r\n    process.stdout.write(\r\n      `Step 1/3: heartbeat scheduler is registered at ${effectiveSchedulerLabel}; ` +\r\n      `reinstalling it to ${QUICK_START_HEARTBEAT_INTERVAL} so Quick Start can run on time.\\n`,\r\n    )\r\n    const uninstallResult = cmdUninstall()\r\n    if (uninstallResult !== 0) {\r\n      return uninstallResult\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    const installResult = cmdInstall({\r\n      interval: QUICK_START_HEARTBEAT_INTERVAL,\r\n      autoPush: config.auto_push ? 'true' : 'false',\r\n    })\r\n    if (installResult !== 0) {\r\n      return installResult\r\n    }\r\n  } else {\r\n    process.stdout.write(\r\n      `Step 1/3: heartbeat scheduler already registered at ${effectiveSchedulerLabel}; keeping the existing install.\\n`,\r\n    )\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  process.stdout.write('Step 2/3: registering the current repository with Quick Start settings.\\n')\r\n  const registerOptions: Parameters<typeof cmdRegisterProject>[0] = {\r\n    root,\r\n    quickStart: true,\r\n  }\r\n  if (options.name !== undefined) {\r\n    registerOptions.name = options.name\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  const registerResult = cmdRegisterProject(registerOptions)\r\n  if (registerResult !== 0) {\r\n    return registerResult\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  process.stdout.write('Step 3/3: running one immediate heartbeat sync.\\n')\r\n  return await cmdRunOnce({\r\n    root,\r\n    force: true,\r\n  })\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport function registeredHeartbeatIntervalSeconds(): number | null {\r\n  const sys = platform\r\n  if (sys === 'linux') return cronRegisteredIntervalSeconds()\r\n  if (sys === 'darwin') return launchdRegisteredIntervalSeconds()\r\n  if (sys === 'win32') return schtasksRegisteredIntervalSeconds()\r\n  return null\r\n}\r\n\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n// Linux (cron)\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n\r\nfunction installCron(scriptPath: string, seconds: number): number {\r\n  if (isCronRegistered()) {\r\n    process.stderr.write(\"Heartbeat is already registered in cron. Use 'uninstall' first.\\n\")\r\n    return 1\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  const minutes = Math.max(1, Math.floor(seconds / 60))\r\n  const logDir = resolve(homedir(), '.memorytree', 'logs')\r\n  mkdirSync(logDir, { recursive: true })\r\n\r\n  const cronLine = `*/${minutes} * * * * node \"${scriptPath}\" daemon run-once >> \"${resolve(logDir, 'heartbeat-cron.log')}\" 2>&1 # memorytree`\r\n  const existing = getCrontab()\r\n  const newCrontab = existing.trim()\r\n    ? existing.trimEnd() + '\\n' + cronLine + '\\n'\r\n    : cronLine + '\\n'\r\n\r\n  try {\r\n    const tmpFile = resolve(homedir(), '.memorytree', '.crontab.tmp')\r\n    writeFileSync(tmpFile, newCrontab)\r\n    execCommand('crontab', [tmpFile])\r\n    unlinkSync(tmpFile)\r\n  } catch {\r\n    process.stderr.write('Failed to install cron job.\\n')\r\n    return 1\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  process.stdout.write(`Heartbeat registered in cron (every ${minutes}m).\\n`)\r\n  return 0\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction uninstallCron(): number {\r\n  const existing = getCrontab()\r\n  const filtered = existing.split('\\n').filter(line => !line.includes('memorytree')).join('\\n') + '\\n'\r\n  try {\r\n    const tmpFile = resolve(homedir(), '.memorytree', '.crontab.tmp')\r\n    mkdirSync(dirname(tmpFile), { recursive: true })\r\n    writeFileSync(tmpFile, filtered)\r\n    execCommand('crontab', [tmpFile])\r\n    unlinkSync(tmpFile)\r\n  } catch {\r\n    // best effort\r\n  }\r\n  process.stdout.write('Heartbeat removed from cron.\\n')\r\n  return 0\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport function isCronRegistered(): boolean {\r\n  return getCrontab().includes('memorytree')\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction getCrontab(): string {\r\n  try {\r\n    return execCommand('crontab', ['-l'], { allowFailure: true })\r\n  } catch {\r\n    return ''\r\n  }\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction cronRegisteredIntervalSeconds(): number | null {\r\n  const line = getCrontab()\r\n    .split(/\\r?\\n/)\r\n    .find(candidate => candidate.includes('memorytree'))\r\n  if (!line) return null\r\n\r\n  const match = line.match(/^\\*\\/(\\d+)\\s+\\*\\s+\\*\\s+\\*\\s+\\*.*#\\s*memorytree\\s*$/)\r\n  if (!match) return null\r\n\r\n  const minutes = parseInt(match[1]!, 10)\r\n  return Number.isInteger(minutes) && minutes > 0 ? minutes * 60 : null\r\n}\r\n\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n// macOS (launchd)\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n\r\nfunction launchdPlistPath(): string {\r\n  return resolve(homedir(), 'Library', 'LaunchAgents', `${LAUNCHD_LABEL}.plist`)\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction installLaunchd(scriptPath: string, seconds: number): number {\r\n  const plistPath = launchdPlistPath()\r\n  if (existsSync(plistPath)) {\r\n    process.stderr.write(\"Heartbeat plist already exists. Use 'uninstall' first.\\n\")\r\n    return 1\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  const logDir = resolve(homedir(), '.memorytree', 'logs')\r\n  mkdirSync(logDir, { recursive: true })\r\n\r\n  const plistContent = `<?xml version=\"1.0\" encoding=\"UTF-8\"?>\r\n<!DOCTYPE plist PUBLIC \"-//Apple//DTD PLIST 1.0//EN\" \"http://www.apple.com/DTDs/PropertyList-1.0.dtd\">\r\n<plist version=\"1.0\">\r\n<dict>\r\n    <key>Label</key>\r\n    <string>${LAUNCHD_LABEL}</string>\r\n    <key>ProgramArguments</key>\r\n    <array>\r\n        <string>node</string>\r\n        <string>${scriptPath}</string>\r\n        <string>daemon</string>\r\n        <string>run-once</string>\r\n    </array>\r\n    <key>StartInterval</key>\r\n    <integer>${seconds}</integer>\r\n    <key>StandardOutPath</key>\r\n    <string>${resolve(logDir, 'heartbeat-launchd.log')}</string>\r\n    <key>StandardErrorPath</key>\r\n    <string>${resolve(logDir, 'heartbeat-launchd.log')}</string>\r\n</dict>\r\n</plist>\r\n`\r\n  mkdirSync(dirname(plistPath), { recursive: true })\r\n  writeFileSync(plistPath, plistContent, 'utf-8')\r\n\r\n  try {\r\n    execCommand('launchctl', ['load', plistPath])\r\n  } catch {\r\n    process.stderr.write('Failed to load plist.\\n')\r\n    return 1\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  process.stdout.write(`Heartbeat registered via launchd (every ${seconds}s).\\n`)\r\n  return 0\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction uninstallLaunchd(): number {\r\n  const plistPath = launchdPlistPath()\r\n  if (existsSync(plistPath)) {\r\n    try { execCommand('launchctl', ['unload', plistPath], { allowFailure: true }) } catch { /* ignore */ }\r\n    try { unlinkSync(plistPath) } catch { /* ignore */ }\r\n  }\r\n  process.stdout.write('Heartbeat removed from launchd.\\n')\r\n  return 0\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport function isLaunchdRegistered(): boolean {\r\n  return existsSync(launchdPlistPath())\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction launchdRegisteredIntervalSeconds(): number | null {\r\n  const plistPath = launchdPlistPath()\r\n  if (!existsSync(plistPath)) return null\r\n\r\n  try {\r\n    const text = readFileSync(plistPath, 'utf-8')\r\n    const match = text.match(/<key>StartInterval<\\/key>\\s*<integer>(\\d+)<\\/integer>/i)\r\n    if (!match) return null\r\n\r\n    const seconds = parseInt(match[1]!, 10)\r\n    return Number.isInteger(seconds) && seconds > 0 ? seconds : null\r\n  } catch {\r\n    return null\r\n  }\r\n}\r\n\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n// Windows (Task Scheduler)\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n\r\n// Write a VBScript launcher that runs node silently (no console window).\r\n// wscript.exe /B runs in batch mode (suppresses script error popups).\r\n// VBScript Run(..., 0, False): 0 = SW_HIDE hides the window; False = fire-and-forget.\r\n// Written as UTF-16 LE with BOM so wscript.exe handles non-ASCII paths (e.g. Chinese\r\n// usernames) correctly on all Windows versions.\r\nexport function vbsLauncherPath(): string {\r\n  return resolve(homedir(), '.memorytree', 'heartbeat-launcher.vbs')\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport function writeVbsLauncher(scriptPath: string): string {\r\n  const vbsPath = vbsLauncherPath()\r\n  mkdirSync(dirname(vbsPath), { recursive: true })\r\n  // Inside VBScript strings, double-quote is escaped as \"\"\r\n  const escapedScript = scriptPath.replace(/\"/g, '\"\"')\r\n  // Use the full node binary path so the launcher works even when Task Scheduler's\r\n  // PATH differs from the user's shell (e.g. nvm/fnm environments).\r\n  const escapedNode = process.execPath.replace(/\"/g, '\"\"')\r\n  const content = [\r\n    'Set WshShell = CreateObject(\"WScript.Shell\")',\r\n    `WshShell.Run \"\"\"${escapedNode}\"\" \"\"${escapedScript}\"\" daemon run-once\", 0, False`,\r\n  ].join('\\r\\n') + '\\r\\n'\r\n  // UTF-16 LE BOM: recognised by wscript.exe on all Windows versions and preserves\r\n  // non-ASCII characters (e.g. Chinese home directory paths) without corruption.\r\n  const buf = Buffer.concat([Buffer.from([0xff, 0xfe]), Buffer.from(content, 'utf16le')])\r\n  writeFileSync(vbsPath, buf)\r\n  return vbsPath\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction installSchtasks(scriptPath: string, seconds: number): number {\r\n  if (isSchtasksRegistered()) {\r\n    process.stderr.write(\"Heartbeat is already registered in Task Scheduler. Use 'uninstall' first.\\n\")\r\n    return 1\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  const minutes = Math.max(1, Math.floor(seconds / 60))\r\n  const vbsPath = writeVbsLauncher(scriptPath)\r\n  const trCommand = `wscript.exe /B \"${vbsPath}\"`\r\n\r\n  try {\r\n    execCommand('schtasks', [\r\n      '/create', '/tn', TASK_NAME, '/sc', 'minute', '/mo', String(minutes),\r\n      '/tr', trCommand, '/f',\r\n    ])\r\n  } catch {\r\n    // schtasks failed — remove the launcher file we just wrote to keep state clean\r\n    try { unlinkSync(vbsPath) } catch { /* ignore */ }\r\n    process.stderr.write('Failed to create scheduled task.\\n')\r\n    return 1\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  process.stdout.write(`Heartbeat registered in Task Scheduler (every ${minutes}m).\\n`)\r\n  return 0\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction uninstallSchtasks(): number {\r\n  try {\r\n    execCommand('schtasks', ['/delete', '/tn', TASK_NAME, '/f'], { allowFailure: true })\r\n  } catch {\r\n    // best effort\r\n  }\r\n  const vbsPath = vbsLauncherPath()\r\n  if (existsSync(vbsPath)) {\r\n    try { unlinkSync(vbsPath) } catch { /* ignore */ }\r\n  }\r\n  process.stdout.write('Heartbeat removed from Task Scheduler.\\n')\r\n  return 0\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport function isSchtasksRegistered(): boolean {\r\n  try {\r\n    execCommand('schtasks', ['/query', '/tn', TASK_NAME])\r\n    return true\r\n  } catch {\r\n    return false\r\n  }\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction schtasksRegisteredIntervalSeconds(): number | null {\r\n  try {\r\n    const xml = execCommand('schtasks', ['/query', '/tn', TASK_NAME, '/xml'], { allowFailure: true })\r\n    if (!xml.trim()) return null\r\n\r\n    const match = xml.match(/<Interval>([^<]+)<\\/Interval>/i)\r\n    if (!match) return null\r\n\r\n    return parseIsoDurationToSeconds(match[1]!)\r\n  } catch {\r\n    return null\r\n  }\r\n}\r\n\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n// Helpers\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n\r\nexport function heartbeatScriptPath(): string {\r\n  // Use process.argv[1] which is the actual script being executed,\r\n  // more reliable than import.meta.url which varies between tsx and bundled output\r\n  const scriptArg = process.argv[1] ?? ''\r\n  if (scriptArg && scriptArg.endsWith('cli.js')) {\r\n    return resolve(scriptArg)\r\n  }\r\n  return fallbackHeartbeatScriptPath(import.meta.url)\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport function fallbackHeartbeatScriptPath(moduleUrl: string): string {\r\n  const moduleDir = dirname(fileURLToPath(moduleUrl))\r\n  if (basename(moduleDir).toLowerCase() === 'dist') {\r\n    return resolve(moduleDir, 'cli.js')\r\n  }\r\n  return resolve(moduleDir, '..', '..', 'dist', 'cli.js')\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction parseOptionalBoolean(value: string | undefined): boolean | undefined {\r\n  if (value === undefined) return undefined\r\n  if (value === 'true') return true\r\n  if (value === 'false') return false\r\n  return undefined\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction parseIsoDurationToSeconds(value: string): number | null {\r\n  const match = value.trim().match(/^P(?:(\\d+)D)?(?:T(?:(\\d+)H)?(?:(\\d+)M)?(?:(\\d+)S)?)?$/i)\r\n  if (!match) return null\r\n\r\n  const days = parseInt(match[1] ?? '0', 10)\r\n  const hours = parseInt(match[2] ?? '0', 10)\r\n  const minutes = parseInt(match[3] ?? '0', 10)\r\n  const seconds = parseInt(match[4] ?? '0', 10)\r\n  const total = (days * 86400) + (hours * 3600) + (minutes * 60) + seconds\r\n  return total > 0 ? total : null\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction formatIntervalSeconds(seconds: number): string {\r\n  if (seconds % 3600 === 0) return `${String(seconds / 3600)}h`\r\n  if (seconds % 60 === 0) return `${String(seconds / 60)}m`\r\n  return {
  "name": "memorytree-workflow",
  "version": "0.1.0",

  "description": "MemoryTree Skill 鈥?transcript import, dedup, indexing, and session continuity for AI coding assistants",
  "engines": {
    "node": ">=20"
  },
  "bin": {
    "memorytree": "./dist/cli.js",
    "memorytree-daemon": "./dist/cli.js"
  },
  "scripts": {
    "build": "tsup",
    "dev": "tsx src/cli/main.ts",
    "pretest:e2e": "npm run build",
    "test:e2e": "vitest run --config vitest.e2e.config.ts",
    "test": "vitest run",
    "lint": "eslint src tests --ext .ts",
    "typecheck": "tsc --noEmit"

assistant #726 final_answer 03:00:06

没有“硬报错”。

这次日志里看到的是两类东西：

| 类型 | 结论 | 说明 |
|---|---|---|
| WARN Sensitive pattern detected ... | 这是告警，不是失败 | 只是扫描到疑似敏感信息 |
| 最终结果 | 这次执行成功了 | 后面已经出现了 Imported 73、Report generated、Committed、Pushed successfully、Heartbeat finished |

所以这次不是报错中断，而是“有告警，但流程跑完了”。

你没看到 .gitignore 那条输出，原因我已经查到了：

| 现象 | 原因 |
|---|---|
| 你终端里出现了 Push remote / Push URL | 说明你运行的不是我们刚改完并推到 GitHub 的这份本地仓库代码 |
| 你没看到 .gitignore updated: ... 或 .gitignore already contains ... | 因为当前 memorytree 命令实际指向的是机器上已安装的旧包，它还没有这条输出 |

你现在的 memorytree 命令实际跑的是这个安装包：

[C:\Users\ai\AppData\Local\fnm_multishells\45984_1774407559122\node_modules\memorytree-workflow\dist\cli.js](C:\Users\ai\AppData\Local\fnm_multishells\45984_1774407559122\node_modules\memorytree-workflow\dist\cli.js)

不是这份仓库里的本地源码：

[D:\demo1\memorytree-workflow\src\cli\cmd-daemon.ts](D:\demo1\memorytree-workflow\src\cli\cmd-daemon.ts)

而且我也确认了，当前你机器里这个已安装包的代码里有 Push remote / Push URL，但没有我们刚加的 .gitignore 输出逻辑。

再说 .gitignore 本身：
当前这份仓库文件里其实已经有了：

[.gitignore](/d:/demo1/memorytree-workflow/.gitignore#L8)

里面有：

- AGENTS.md
- Memory/**
- memory/**

所以现在的问题不是“没写进去”，而是“你跑的那个已安装 CLI 版本没有把这件事打印出来”。

如果你要，我下一步可以直接帮你做一件事：
把这台机器上的 memorytree 安装版本更新到刚刚推到 GitHub 的版本，这样你再跑 quick-start 就能看到 .gitignore 的明确输出。

没有“硬报错”。 这次日志里看到的是两类东西： | 类型 | 结论 | 说明 | |---|---|---| | `WARN Sensitive pattern detected ...` | 这是告警，不是失败 | 只是扫描到疑似敏感信息 | | 最终结果 | 这次执行成功了 | 后面已经出现了 `Imported 73`、`Report generated`、`Committed`、`Pushed successfully`、`Heartbeat finished`...
Show task summary

没有“硬报错”。

这次日志里看到的是两类东西：

| 类型 | 结论 | 说明 |
|---|---|---|
| WARN Sensitive pattern detected ... | 这是告警，不是失败 | 只是扫描到疑似敏感信息 |
| 最终结果 | 这次执行成功了 | 后面已经出现了 Imported 73、Report generated、Committed、Pushed successfully、Heartbeat finished |

所以这次不是报错中断，而是“有告警，但流程跑完了”。

你没看到 .gitignore 那条输出，原因我已经查到了：

| 现象 | 原因 |
|---|---|
| 你终端里出现了 Push remote / Push URL | 说明你运行的不是我们刚改完并推到 GitHub 的这份本地仓库代码 |
| 你没看到 .gitignore updated: ... 或 .gitignore already contains ... | 因为当前 memorytree 命令实际指向的是机器上已安装的旧包，它还没有这条输出 |

你现在的 memorytree 命令实际跑的是这个安装包：

[C:\Users\ai\AppData\Local\fnm_multishells\45984_1774407559122\node_modules\memorytree-workflow\dist\cli.js](C:\Users\ai\AppData\Local\fnm_multishells\45984_1774407559122\node_modules\memorytree-workflow\dist\cli.js)

而且我也确认了，当前你机器里这个已安装包的代码里有 Push remote / Push URL，但没有我们刚加的 .gitignore 输出逻辑。

再说 .gitignore 本身：
当前这份仓库文件里其实已经有了：

[.gitignore](/d:/demo1/memorytree-workflow/.gitignore#L8)

里面有：

- AGENTS.md
- Memory/**
- memory/**

所以现在的问题不是“没写进去”，而是“你跑的那个已安装 CLI 版本没有把这件事打印出来”。

{
  "turn_id": "019d22f1-9788-7903-8ef1-b859aa15715f",

  "approval_policy": "never",

    "type": "danger-full-access"
  },

  "collaboration_mode": {
    "mode": "default",
    "settings": {
      "model": "gpt-5.4",
      "reasoning_effort": "xhigh",
      "developer_instructions": "# Collaboration Mode: Default\r\n\r\nYou are now in Default mode. Any previous instructions for other modes (e.g. Plan mode) are no longer active.\r\n\r\nYour active mode changes only when new developer instructions with a different `<collaboration_mode>...</collaboration_mode>` change it; user requests or tool descriptions do not change mode by themselves. Known mode names are Default and Plan.\r\n\r\n## request_user_input availability\r\n\r\nThe `request_user_input` tool is unavailable in Default mode. If you call it while in Default mode, it will return an error.\r\n\r\nIn Default mode, strongly prefer making reasonable assumptions and executing the user's request rather than stopping to ask questions. If you absolutely must ask a question because the answer cannot be discovered from local context and a reasonable assumption would be risky, ask the user directly with a concise plain-text question. Never write a multiple choice question as a textual assistant message.\r\n"
    }
  },
  "realtime_active": false,
  "effort": "xhigh",
  "summary": "none",
  "user_instructions": "# AGENTS.md\n\n## Read Order\n- Read this file first.\n- Read the latest file in `Memory/01_goals/`.\n- Read the latest todo bound to that goal in `Memory/02_todos/`.\n- Read `Memory/04_knowledge/` only when needed.\n- Read `Memory/06_transcripts/clean/` and transcript manifests only when needed.\n- Read `Memory/03_chat_logs/` and `Memory/05_archive/` only when needed.\n\n## Memory Rules\n- Change the active goal only after explicit user confirmation of a requirement or scope change.\n- Keep the active todo synchronized with the active goal.\n- Append chat logs only. Never rewrite or delete prior entries.\n- Keep active files concise and move stale context to knowledge or archive files.\n- Treat cleaned transcript indexes as search aids. Confirm exact wording against the raw transcript archive when precision matters.\n\n## Transcript Rules\n- If transcript archival is enabled, archive transcripts by client, project, and session.\n- Keep raw transcripts in both this repository's `Memory/06_transcripts/raw/` mirror and the user-level MemoryTree archive.\n- Keep this repository mirror limited to transcripts that belong to the current project. Archive unrelated projects in the global MemoryTree archive only.\n- Generate cleaned transcript indexes with deterministic code, not model-generated rewriting.\n- Raw transcript upload permission for this repository: not set. Ask the user before the first raw transcript commit or push, then record the answer here.\n- If raw transcript uploads are not approved, keep `Memory/06_transcripts/raw/**` unstaged and commit only cleaned transcript indexes or manifests for this repository.\n\n## Git Rules\n- Obey this repository's branch, PR, CI, review, and release rules.\n- Auto-commit and push only MemoryTree-owned changes (`Memory/**` and this file when it is managed by MemoryTree), excluding `Memory/06_transcripts/raw/**` until raw transcript uploads are approved for this repository.\n- Use a MemoryTree-scoped commit title. Prefer `memorytree(<scope>): <subject>`, or the repository-required equivalent such as `docs(memorytree): <subject>`.\n- Use a dedicated branch and PR for MemoryTree-only changes. Enable auto-merge only when repository rules permit it.\n- If a diff includes product code, shared policy files, cross-project transcript files, or unclear ownership, stop and ask the user before staging or pushing.\n- When `auto_push` is enabled, the heartbeat process pushes automatically after committing. If no remote is configured or a push fails, an alert is written to `~/.memorytree/alerts.json`.\n\n## Heartbeat Rules\n- Transcript discovery, import, cleaning, and push are handled by the background heartbeat process. The model does not execute these operations.\n- The model only writes chat log summaries and updates goals and todos during interactive sessions.\n- If `~/.memorytree/alerts.json` contains pending notifications, display them at the start of the session.\n- If `memorytree-daemon` is available but not registered on this machine, ask the user for their preferred settings and offer to run `memorytree-daemon install`.\n- When the user asks to see their most recent conversation, trigger an on-demand sync for the current project, locate the latest session across all clients, and generate a continuation summary.\n- All interactive prompts must use plain-text questions. Do not rely on client-specific UI components.\n",
  "truncation_policy": {
    "mode": "tokens",
    "limit": 10000
  }
}

---CMD-INIT HEAD---
  writeTemplate(join(templates, 'agents.md'), agentsPath, options.force, {})
  writeHeartbeatNextStep(root)

  return 0
}

function writeHeartbeatNextStep(root: string): void {
  const displayRoot = root.includes(' ') ? `"${root}"` : root
  process.stdout.write(`Initialized MemoryTree files in: ${root}\n`)
  process.stdout.write('This command did not register heartbeat or modify ~/.memorytree/config.toml.\n')
  process.stdout.write('If you want the default heartbeat setup for this repository, run:\n')
  process.stdout.write(`  memorytree daemon quick-start --root ${displayRoot}\n`)
  process.stdout.write(
    'Heartbeat keeps the dedicated MemoryTree branch as the shared source of truth ' +
    'and refreshes this repository directory as a local cache mirror.\n',
  )

  if (gitignoreResult !== null) {

---LOCAL CMD-INIT HEAD---
  const paths = resolveScaffoldPaths(root, dt)
  scaffoldContentFiles(paths, templates, options.goalSummary, options.projectName, options.force)
  writeTemplate(join(templates, 'agents.md'), agentsPath, options.force, {})
  const gitignoreResult = ensureManagedGitignore(root)
  writeHeartbeatNextStep(root, gitignoreResult)

  return 0
}

function writeHeartbeatNextStep(root: string, gitignoreResult: GitignoreEnsureResult | null): void {
  const displayRoot = root.includes(' ') ? `"${root}"` : root
  process.stdout.write(`Initialized MemoryTree files in: ${root}\n`)
  writeGitignoreStatus(process.stdout, gitignoreResult)
  process.stdout.write('This command did not register heartbeat or modify ~/.memorytree/config.toml.\n')
  process.stdout.write('If you want the default heartbeat setup for this repository, run:\n')
  process.stdout.write(`  memorytree daemon quick-start --root ${displayRoot}\n`)

assistant #756 final_answer 03:03:41

对比结果很明确：你拉取的是一份仓库，但终端执行的是另一份。

| 位置 | 当前提交 | 作用 | 结果 |
|---|---|---|---|
| [D:\demo1\memorytree-workflow](/d:/demo1/memorytree-workflow) | 0922e7e | 你刚刚 push/pull 的仓库 | 有 .gitignore updated... 那段新逻辑 |
| [C:\Users\ai\.codex\skills\memorytree-workflow](/C:/Users/ai/.codex/skills/memorytree-workflow) | b77a2c3 | 终端 memorytree 实际跑的 skill 目录 | 还是旧逻辑，没有 .gitignore 输出 |

再补一条关键事实：

- memorytree 命令实际指向的是一个 fnm_multishells 里的 shim
- 这个 shim 最终连到 [C:\Users\ai\.codex\skills\memorytree-workflow](/C:/Users/ai/.codex/skills/memorytree-workflow)
- 不是你当前拉取的 [D:\demo1\memorytree-workflow](/d:/demo1/memorytree-workflow)

所以你看到的现象完全说得通：

- 能看到 Push remote / Push URL
因为旧 skill 里已经有这段逻辑
- 看不到 .gitignore updated: ...
因为你实际运行的 skill 目录还停在旧提交 b77a2c3

还有一点也确认了：
这次没有硬报错，只有 Sensitive pattern detected 的告警，heartbeat 最终是成功跑完的。

所以根因一句话就是：

你更新了开发仓库，但没有更新“实际被命令调用的 skill 仓库”。

如果你愿意，我下一步可以直接帮你把 [C:\Users\ai\.codex\skills\memorytree-workflow](/C:/Users/ai/.codex/skills/memorytree-workflow) 也同步到 0922e7e，然后你再跑一次 quick-start，就能看到 .gitignore 的明确输出。

{
  "turn_id": "019d22f3-cacd-7bc0-8905-8a3adeac8105",

  "approval_policy": "never",
  "sandbox_policy": {
    "type": "danger-full-access"
  },
  "model": "gpt-5.4",
  "personality": "friendly",
  "collaboration_mode": {
    "mode": "default",
    "settings": {
      "model": "gpt-5.4",
      "reasoning_effort": "xhigh",
      "developer_instructions": "# Collaboration Mode: Default\r\n\r\nYou are now in Default mode. Any previous instructions for other modes (e.g. Plan mode) are no longer active.\r\n\r\nYour active mode changes only when new developer instructions with a different `<collaboration_mode>...</collaboration_mode>` change it; user requests or tool descriptions do not change mode by themselves. Known mode names are Default and Plan.\r\n\r\n## request_user_input availability\r\n\r\nThe `request_user_input` tool is unavailable in Default mode. If you call it while in Default mode, it will return an error.\r\n\r\nIn Default mode, strongly prefer making reasonable assumptions and executing the user's request rather than stopping to ask questions. If you absolutely must ask a question because the answer cannot be discovered from local context and a reasonable assumption would be risky, ask the user directly with a concise plain-text question. Never write a multiple choice question as a textual assistant message.\r\n"
    }
  },
  "realtime_active": false,
  "effort": "xhigh",
  "summary": "none",
  "user_instructions": "# AGENTS.md\n\n## Read Order\n- Read this file first.\n- Read the latest file in `Memory/01_goals/`.\n- Read the latest todo bound to that goal in `Memory/02_todos/`.\n- Read `Memory/04_knowledge/` only when needed.\n- Read `Memory/06_transcripts/clean/` and transcript manifests only when needed.\n- Read `Memory/03_chat_logs/` and `Memory/05_archive/` only when needed.\n\n## Memory Rules\n- Change the active goal only after explicit user confirmation of a requirement or scope change.\n- Keep the active todo synchronized with the active goal.\n- Append chat logs only. Never rewrite or delete prior entries.\n- Keep active files concise and move stale context to knowledge or archive files.\n- Treat cleaned transcript indexes as search aids. Confirm exact wording against the raw transcript archive when precision matters.\n\n## Transcript Rules\n- If transcript archival is enabled, archive transcripts by client, project, and session.\n- Keep raw transcripts in both this repository's `Memory/06_transcripts/raw/` mirror and the user-level MemoryTree archive.\n- Keep this repository mirror limited to transcripts that belong to the current project. Archive unrelated projects in the global MemoryTree archive only.\n- Generate cleaned transcript indexes with deterministic code, not model-generated rewriting.\n- Raw transcript upload permission for this repository: not set. Ask the user before the first raw transcript commit or push, then record the answer here.\n- If raw transcript uploads are not approved, keep `Memory/06_transcripts/raw/**` unstaged and commit only cleaned transcript indexes or manifests for this repository.\n\n## Git Rules\n- Obey this repository's branch, PR, CI, review, and release rules.\n- Auto-commit and push only MemoryTree-owned changes (`Memory/**` and this file when it is managed by MemoryTree), excluding `Memory/06_transcripts/raw/**` until raw transcript uploads are approved for this repository.\n- Use a MemoryTree-scoped commit title. Prefer `memorytree(<scope>): <subject>`, or the repository-required equivalent such as `docs(memorytree): <subject>`.\n- Use a dedicated branch and PR for MemoryTree-only changes. Enable auto-merge only when repository rules permit it.\n- If a diff includes product code, shared policy files, cross-project transcript files, or unclear ownership, stop and ask the user before staging or pushing.\n- When `auto_push` is enabled, the heartbeat process pushes automatically after committing. If no remote is configured or a push fails, an alert is written to `~/.memorytree/alerts.json`.\n\n## Heartbeat Rules\n- Transcript discovery, import, cleaning, and push are handled by the background heartbeat process. The model does not execute these operations.\n- The model only writes chat log summaries and updates goals and todos during interactive sessions.\n- If `~/.memorytree/alerts.json` contains pending notifications, display them at the start of the session.\n- If `memorytree-daemon` is available but not registered on this machine, ask the user for their preferred settings and offer to run `memorytree-daemon install`.\n- When the user asks to see their most recent conversation, trigger an on-demand sync for the current project, locate the latest session across all clients, and generate a continuation summary.\n- All interactive prompts must use plain-text questions. Do not rely on client-specific UI components.\n",
  "truncation_policy": {
    "mode": "tokens",
    "limit": 10000
  }
}

assistant #764 final_answer 03:06:13

我对着你贴的流程和本机实际状态核过了，结论很明确： 这次 `quick-start` 没有硬报错，只有 `Sensitive pattern detected` 的告警；真正的问题是，你更新的不是“正在被 `memorytree` 命令执行的那份代码”。 **你这次流程里实际发生了什么** | 步骤 | 实际效果 | 结果 | |---|---|---| | `git clone ... "$env:USERPROFILE\\.c...

Expand full message

我对着你贴的流程和本机实际状态核过了，结论很明确：

这次 quick-start 没有硬报错，只有 Sensitive pattern detected 的告警；真正的问题是，你更新的不是“正在被 memorytree 命令执行的那份代码”。

你这次流程里实际发生了什么

| 步骤 | 实际效果 | 结果 |
|---|---|---|
| git clone ... "$env:USERPROFILE\\.codex\\skills\\memorytree-workflow" | 想把最新代码放到 skill 目录 | 失败了，因为目录已存在 |
| cd "$env:USERPROFILE\\.codex\\skills\\memorytree-workflow" | 进入已有的 skill 目录 | 进入的是旧 checkout，不是新 clone |
| npm install | 安装依赖并构建当前目录代码 | 只会构建“当前这份旧代码”，不会拉 GitHub 最新提交 |
| npm link | 把当前目录链接成全局 memorytree 命令 | 链接的仍然是旧代码 |
| memorytree daemon quick-start --root . | 运行全局 memorytree | 所以跑出来的还是旧行为 |

我核对到的两个目录

| 目录 | 当前提交 | 状态 |
|---|---|---|
| [D:\demo1\memorytree-workflow](/d:/demo1/memorytree-workflow) | 0922e7e | 这是你刚 push/pull 的新代码 |
| [C:\Users\ai\.codex\skills\memorytree-workflow](/C:/Users/ai/.codex/skills/memorytree-workflow) | b77a2c3 | 这是 memorytree 实际跑的 skill 目录，还是旧提交 |

所以你没看到 .gitignore updated: ...，原因不是功能没生效，而是：

- 你实际运行的 skill 目录还是旧版本
- 旧版本会打印 Push remote / Push URL
- 新版本才会打印 .gitignore updated: ... 或 .gitignore already contains ...

而你这次输出里确实出现了 Push remote / Push URL，这正好证明跑的是旧逻辑。

再补一句很关键的：

npm install 和 npm link 都不是 git pull。
它们不会把 [C:\Users\ai\.codex\skills\memorytree-workflow](/C:/Users/ai/.codex/skills/memorytree-workflow) 从 b77a2c3 变成 0922e7e。

而且这个 skill 目录现在还有本地未提交改动，所以我不建议直接粗暴覆盖。

如果你要，我下一步可以帮你安全地把 [C:\Users\ai\.codex\skills\memorytree-workflow](/C:/Users/ai/.codex/skills/memorytree-workflow) 同步到 0922e7e，再重新 npm link，这样你下次跑就能看到 .gitignore 那条输出。

| cd "$env:USERPROFILE\\.codex\\skills\\memorytree-workflow" | 进入已有的 skill 目录 | 进入的是旧 checkout，不是新 clone |
| npm install | 安装依赖并构建当前目录代码 | 只会构建“当前这份旧代码”，不会拉 GitHub 最新提交 |

| 目录 | 当前提交 | 状态 |

- 旧版本会打印 Push remote / Push URL
- 新版本才会打印 .gitignore updated: ... 或 .gitignore already contains ...

它们不会把 [C:\Users\ai\.codex\skills\memorytree-workflow](/C:/Users/ai/.codex/skills/memorytree-workflow) 从 b77a2c3 变成 0922e7e。

而且这个 skill 目录现在还有本地未提交改动，所以我不建议直接粗暴覆盖。

如果你要，我下一步可以帮你安全地把 [C:\Users\ai\.codex\skills\memorytree-workflow](/C:/Users/ai/.codex/skills/memorytree-workflow) 同步到 0922e7e，再重新 npm link，这样你下次跑就能看到 .gitignore 那条输出。

  "user_instructions": "# AGENTS.md\n\n## Read Order\n- Read this file first.\n- Read the latest file in `Memory/01_goals/`.\n- Read the latest todo bound to that goal in `Memory/02_todos/`.\n- Read `Memory/04_knowledge/` only when needed.\n- Read `Memory/06_transcripts/clean/` and transcript manifests only when needed.\n- Read `Memory/03_chat_logs/` and `Memory/05_archive/` only when needed.\n\n## Memory Rules\n- Change the active goal only after explicit user confirmation of a requirement or scope change.\n- Keep the active todo synchronized with the active goal.\n- Append chat logs only. Never rewrite or delete prior entries.\n- Keep active files concise and move stale context to knowledge or archive files.\n- Treat cleaned transcript indexes as search aids. Confirm exact wording against the raw transcript archive when precision matters.\n\n## Transcript Rules\n- If transcript archival is enabled, archive transcripts by client, project, and session.\n- Keep raw transcripts in both this repository's `Memory/06_transcripts/raw/` mirror and the user-level MemoryTree archive.\n- Keep this repository mirror limited to transcripts that belong to the current project. Archive unrelated projects in the global MemoryTree archive only.\n- Generate cleaned transcript indexes with deterministic code, not model-generated rewriting.\n- Raw transcript upload permission for this repository: not set. Ask the user before the first raw transcript commit or push, then record the answer here.\n- If raw transcript uploads are not approved, keep `Memory/06_transcripts/raw/**` unstaged and commit only cleaned transcript indexes or manifests for this repository.\n\n## Git Rules\n- Obey this repository's branch, PR, CI, review, and release rules.\n- Auto-commit and push only MemoryTree-owned changes (`Memory/**` and this file when it is managed by MemoryTree), excluding `Memory/06_transcripts/raw/**` until raw transcript uploads are approved for this repository.\n- Use a MemoryTree-scoped commit title. Prefer `memorytree(<scope>): <subject>`, or the repository-required equivalent such as `docs(memorytree): <subject>`.\n- Use a dedicated branch and PR for MemoryTree-only changes. Enable auto-merge only when repository rules permit it.\n- If a diff includes product code, shared policy files, cross-project transcript files, or unclear ownership, stop and ask the user before staging or pushing.\n- When `auto_push` is enabled, the heartbeat process pushes automatically after committing. If no remote is configured or a push fails, an alert is written to `~/.memorytree/alerts.json`.\n\n## Heartbeat Rules\n- Transcript discovery, import, cleaning, and push are handled by the background heartbeat process. The model does not execute these operations.\n- The model only writes chat log summaries and updates goals and todos during interactive sessions.\n- If `~/.memorytree/alerts.json` contains pending notifications, display them at the start of the session.\n- If `memorytree-daemon` is available but not registered on this machine, ask the user for their preferred settings and offer to run `memorytree-daemon install`.\n- When the user asks to see their most recent conversation, trigger an on-demand sync for the current project, locate the latest session across all clients, and generate a continuation summary.\n- All interactive prompts must use plain-text questions. Do not rely on client-specific UI components.\n",

    "mode": "tokens",
    "limit": 10000
  }

+  }

     process.stderr.write(`Upstream configured: failed (${upstreamError})\n`)
   } else if (upstream === null) {
@@ -237,6 +244,9 @@ export function cmdRegisterProject(options: {

   } else {
     process.stdout.write(`Upstream configured: ${upstream.created ? 'yes' : 'already'} (${upstream.remote}/${worktree.branch})\n`)

+      process.stdout.write(`Push fallback used: ${redactRemoteUrl(upstream.pushUrl)}\n`)
+    }
   }
   return upstreamError ? 1 : 0
 }

  /Bearer\s+\S{20,}/i,

const RAW_TRANSCRIPT_PREFIX = 'Memory/06_transcripts/raw/'

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Main entry point
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

export interface HeartbeatRunOptions {
  readonly force?: boolean
  readonly root?: string
}

export async function main(options: HeartbeatRunOptions = {}): Promise<number> {
  const config = loadConfig()
  setupLogging(config.log_level as LogLevel)
  const logger = getLogger()

  if (!acquireLock()) {
    logger.info('Another heartbeat instance is running. Exiting.')
    writeAlert('global', 'lock_held', 'Heartbeat exited: another instance held the lock.')
    return 0
  }

  try {
    return await runHeartbeat(config, options)
  } finally {
    releaseLock()
  }
}

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Heartbeat orchestration
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

export async function runHeartbeat(config: Config, options: HeartbeatRunOptions = {}): Promise<number> {
  const logger = getLogger()
  const targetProject = options.root ? findProjectForPath(config, resolve(options.root)) : null

  if (config.projects.length === 0) {
    logger.info('No projects registered in config.toml. Nothing to do.')
    return 0
  }
  if (options.root && !targetProject) {
    logger.warn(`No registered project matched: ${resolve(options.root)}`)
    return 1
  }

  const projects = targetProject ? [targetProject] : config.projects

  logger.info(`Heartbeat started. ${projects.length} project(s) selected.`)

  let nextConfig = config
  let configChanged = false
  const now = new Date()
  const runTimestamp = now.toISOString()

  for (const entry of projects) {
    const projectName = projectDisplayName(entry)
    const projectPath = resolve(projectExecutionPath(entry))
    const heartbeatDue = options.force === true || projectIsDue(entry, now)

    if (!heartbeatDue) {
      logger.debug(`[${projectName}] Not due yet, skipping.`)
      continue
    }

    try {
      const worktree = ensureProjectWorktree(entry)
      if (!existsSync(projectPath)) {
        logger.warn(`Project path does not exist, skipping: ${projectPath}`)
        continue
      }

      if (worktree.created) {
        logger.info(`[${projectName}] Created worktree on branch '${worktree.branch}'.`)
      }

      const contextSync = syncProjectContextToMemory(entry)
      if (!contextSync.skipped) {
        logger.info(
          `[${projectName}] Synced context to ${worktree.branch} ` +
          `(copied ${contextSync.copied}, deleted ${contextSync.deleted}).`,
        )
      }

      const extraManifestDirs = collectExtraManifestDirs(projectPath)
      await processProject(config, projectPath, projectName, entry, extraManifestDirs)
      nextConfig = noteProjectHeartbeatRun(nextConfig, entry.id, runTimestamp)
      configChanged = true

      const outputSync = syncProjectOutputsToDevelopment(entry)
      if (!outputSync.skipped) {
        logger.info(
          `[${projectName}] Synced outputs back to development directory ` +
          `(copied ${outputSync.copied}, deleted ${outputSync.deleted}).`,
        )
      }
    } catch (err: unknown) {
      logger.exception(`Error processing project: ${projectPath}`, err)
      writeAlertWithThreshold(
        toPosixPath(projectPath),
        'push_failed',
        `Heartbeat error for project: ${basename(projectPath)}`,
      )
    }
  }

  if (configChanged) {
    saveConfig(nextConfig)
  }

  logger.info('Heartbeat finished.')
  return 0
}

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Per-project processing
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

export async function processProject(
  config: Config,
  projectPath: string,
  projectName: string,
  project?: ProjectEntry,
  extraManifestDirs?: string[],
): Promise<void> {
  const logger = getLogger()
  const repoSlug = slugify(projectName, 'project')
  const globalRoot = defaultGlobalTranscriptRoot()
  const branch = currentBranch(projectPath)
  const mirrorToRepo = isDedicatedMemorytreeBranch(branch, project)
  const autoPush = project?.auto_push ?? config.auto_push ?? true
  const generateReport = project?.generate_report ?? config.generate_report ?? false
  const aiSummaryModel = project?.ai_summary_model ?? config.ai_summary_model ?? 'claude-haiku-4-5-20251001'
  const locale = project?.locale ?? config.locale ?? 'en'
  const ghPagesBranch = project?.gh_pages_branch ?? config.gh_pages_branch ?? ''
  const cname = project?.cname ?? config.cname ?? ''
  const webhookUrl = project?.webhook_url ?? config.webhook_url ?? ''
  const reportBaseUrl = project?.report_base_url ?? config.report_base_url ?? ''
  const rawUploadPermission = project?.raw_upload_permission ?? 'not-set'

  if (!mirrorToRepo) {
    logger.warn(
      `[${projectName}] Current branch '${branch}' is not a dedicated MemoryTree branch. ` +
      'Importing to the global archive only.',
    )
  }

  const discovered = discoverSourceFiles()
  let importedCount = 0

  for (const [client, source] of discovered) {
    let parsed: ParsedTranscript
    try {
      parsed = parseTranscript(client, source)
    } catch {
      logger.debug(`Failed to parse ${source}, skipping.`)
      continue
    }

    if (!transcriptHasContent(parsed)) continue
    if (!transcriptMatchesRepo(parsed, projectPath, repoSlug)) continue

    scanSensitive(parsed, projectPath)

    try {
      await importTranscript(parsed, projectPath, globalRoot, repoSlug, rawUploadPermission, mirrorToRepo)
      importedCount++
    } catch {
      logger.exception(`Failed to import transcript: ${source}`)
    }
  }

  if (importedCount === 0) {
    logger.info(`[${projectName}] No new transcripts to import.`)
  } else {
    logger.info(`[${projectName}] Imported ${importedCount} transcript(s).`)
  }

  if (generateReport) {
    try {
      const { buildReport } = await import('../report/build.js')
      await buildReport({
        root: projectPath,
        output: join(projectPath, 'Memory', '07_reports'),
        noAi: !process.env['ANTHROPIC_API_KEY'],
        model: aiSummaryModel,
        locale,
        ghPagesBranch,
        cname,
        webhookUrl,
        reportBaseUrl,
        ...(extraManifestDirs ? { extraManifestDirs } : {}),
      })
      logger.info(`[${projectName}] Report generated.`)
    } catch (err: unknown) {
      logger.warn(`[${projectName}] Report generation failed: ${String(err)}`)
      // Never propagate 鈥?report failure must not abort heartbeat cycle
    }
  }

  if (mirrorToRepo) {
    gitCommitAndPush({ auto_push: autoPush }, projectPath, projectName, importedCount, rawUploadPermission)
  } else {
    logger.info(`[${projectName}] Skipped repo-local commit/push on branch '${branch}'.`)
  }
}

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Sensitive pattern scanning
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

export function scanSensitive(parsed: ParsedTranscript, projectPath: string): void {
  const logger = getLogger()
  for (const msg of parsed.messages) {
    for (const pattern of SENSITIVE_PATTERNS) {
      if (pattern.test(msg.text)) {
        logger.warn(
          `Sensitive pattern detected in transcript ${parsed.source_path} (project: ${basename(projectPath)}, role: ${msg.role})`,
        )
        writeAlert(
          toPosixPath(projectPath),
          'sensitive_match',
          `Sensitive pattern in transcript: ${basename(parsed.source_path)}`,
        )
        return
      }
    }
  }
}

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Git operations
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

export function gitCommitAndPush(
  config: Pick<Config, 'auto_push'>,
  projectPath: string,
  projectName: string,
  importedCount: number,
  rawUploadPermission: RawUploadPermission = 'not-set',
): void {
  const logger = getLogger()

  const changedPaths = changedManagedPaths(projectPath)
  if (changedPaths.length === 0) {
    logger.info(`[${projectName}] No git changes in managed MemoryTree content.`)
    return
  }

  const stageablePaths = changedPaths.filter(path => shouldStageManagedPath(path, rawUploadPermission))
  if (stageablePaths.length === 0) {
    logger.info(`[${projectName}] Only raw transcript mirror changes detected without approval; skipping commit.`)
    return
  }

  const commitMessage = importedCount > 0
    ? `memorytree(transcripts): import ${importedCount} transcript(s)`
    : 'memorytree(snapshot): heartbeat sync'

  git(projectPath, 'add', '-A', '-f', '--', ...stageablePaths)
  git(projectPath, 'commit', '-m', commitMessage)
  if (importedCount > 0) {
    logger.info(`[${projectName}] Committed ${importedCount} transcript import(s).`)
  } else {
    logger.info(`[${projectName}] Committed heartbeat snapshot.`)
  }

  if (!config.auto_push) {
    logger.info(`[${projectName}] auto_push disabled, skipping push.`)
    return
  }

  const remotes = git(projectPath, 'remote')
  if (!remotes.trim()) {
    logger.warn(`[${projectName}] No git remote configured, skipping push.`)
    writeAlert(toPosixPath(projectPath), 'no_remote', 'Push skipped: no Git remote configured.')
    return
  }

  if (!tryPush(projectPath, projectName)) {
    logger.warn(`[${projectName}] Push failed, retrying once...`)
    if (!tryPush(projectPath, projectName)) {
      logger.error(`[${projectName}] Push failed after retry.`)
      writeAlertWithThreshold(toPosixPath(projectPath), 'push_failed', 'Push failed after retry.')
      return
    }
  }

  resetFailureCount(toPosixPath(projectPath), 'push_failed')
}

export function tryPush(projectPath: string, projectName: string): boolean {
  try {
    const branch = currentBranch(projectPath)
    if (hasTrackingUpstream(projectPath)) {
      const pushed = pushBranchToRemote(projectPath, branch)
      if (pushed.remote === null) {
        return false
      }
      if (pushed.usedFallback && pushed.pushUrl !== null) {
        getLogger().info(`[${projectName}] Pushed successfully via fallback ${redactRemoteUrl(pushed.pushUrl)}.`)
      }
    } else {
      const upstream = ensureBranchUpstream(projectPath, branch)
      if (upstream.remote === null) {
        return false
      }
      const fallbackNote = upstream.usedFallback && upstream.pushUrl !== null
        ? ` via fallback ${redactRemoteUrl(upstream.pushUrl)}`
        : ''
      getLogger().info(`[${projectName}] Configured upstream ${upstream.remote}/${branch}${fallbackNote}.`)
    }
    getLogger().info(`[${projectName}] Pushed successfully.`)
    return true
  } catch {
    return false
  }
}

export function currentBranch(projectPath: string): string {
  return git(projectPath, 'rev-parse', '--abbrev-ref', 'HEAD').trim()
}

export function isDedicatedMemorytreeBranch(
  branch: string,
  project?: Pick<ProjectEntry, 'memory_branch'>,
): boolean {
  return isProjectMemoryBranch(branch, project)
}

export function changedManagedPaths(projectPath: string): string[] {
  const seen = new Set<string>()
  const paths: string[] = []

  for (const path of collectChangedManagedPaths(projectPath)) {
    if (seen.has(path)) continue
    seen.add(path)
    paths.push(path)
  }

  return paths
}

export function isRepoRawTranscriptPath(path: string): boolean {
  return path.replace(/\\/g, '/').startsWith(RAW_TRANSCRIPT_PREFIX)
}

function shouldStageManagedPath(path: string, rawUploadPermission: RawUploadPermission): boolean {
  if (!isRepoRawTranscriptPath(path)) {
    return true
  }

  return rawUploadPermission === 'approved'
}

function unquotePath(path: string): string {
  if (!(path.startsWith('"') && path.endsWith('"'))) return path

  return path
    .slice(1, -1)
    .replace(/\\"/g, '"')
    .replace(/\\\\/g, '\\')
}

function collectChangedManagedPaths(projectPath: string): string[] {
  return [
    ...gitPathLines(projectPath, 'diff', '--name-only', '--', ...MANAGED_REPO_PATHS),
    ...gitPathLines(projectPath, 'diff', '--cached', '--name-only', '--', ...MANAGED_REPO_PATHS),
    ...gitPathLines(projectPath, 'ls-files', '--others', '--exclude-standard', '--', ...MANAGED_REPO_PATHS),
    ...gitPathLines(
      projectPath,
      'ls-files',
      '--others',
      '--ignored',
      '--exclude-standard',
      '--',
      ...MANAGED_REPO_PATHS,
    ),
  ]
}

function gitPathLines(projectPath: string, ...args: string[]): string[] {
  const output = git(projectPath, ...args)
  const paths: string[] = []

  for (const rawLine of output.split(/\r?\n/)) {
    const path = unquotePath(rawLine.trim())
    if (!path) continue
    paths.push(path)
  }

  return paths
}

  if (!project) {

    return 1

  const worktree = ensureProjectWorktree(project)
  saveConfig(updated)
  const pushRemote = describePushRemote(project.memory_path)

  let upstreamError = ''

    } catch (error: unknown) {

  process.stdout.write(`Development path: ${project.development_path}\n`)
  process.stdout.write(`Memory path: ${project.memory_path}\n`)
